name: Team Hawley
subject: It’s time to rebuild
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, The support Senate Republicans received this election was incredible. Thanks to your help, Conservatives saw a massive voter turnout, _but there’s still much work to be done_.

Now that election season is coming to a close, we need to rebuild our war chest and prepare for 2023. The new Senate convenes in just a few short weeks and we need all the help we can get to start strong and take our country back.

**As of this morning, we remain short of missing our November grassroots goal and we need to catch up. **To make up for lost time, we’re asking every top contributing member to RUSH a donation to help us rebuild.

---
[**RUSH IN A DONATION NOW**](http://links.gopwin.org/u/click?_t=880bb7f57f984ec39ea5a13773012007&_m=562c69cb7e3d4c37a05427cbd6647082&_e=Up4nskaoa9j94wy9ead6mRS04qVV_2h64nkaJyRbozACE3Q_NiA8JjzocRVygV_9v-RAP95w7U4llaiidDyiMQgWlZXFnhbdiOWS4C4Wi8r5lq1Xqo9Cmr6jFzOKUV8VJBBY6plJ0w3J3GlpBc2MpAnPrKgYRl2ZKv114LDXYktBrGZXEeDzFOx_bATxJNRPsNaplVQKvPG4tWoEtpvksYXtCJ55Ogi0iDJvF5bOd-sp1l3oftAJNO3KVLM4yPCBPlxRAFIW8kfeiKRW89MZFNOssT2aQO0bax5yF5ALVF009BH_8cYoGBVsFL9oqSmfn9h-XdOp-PiHKHPZNqGTNK56uNg9spEZtsea8-MjWyA%3D)

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, The support Senate Republicans received this election was incredible. Thanks to your help, Conservatives saw a massive voter turnout, but there’s still much work to be done. Now that election season is coming to a close, we need to rebuild our war chest and prepare for 2023. The new Senate convenes in just a few short weeks and we need all the help we can get to start strong and take our country back. As of this morning, we remain short of missing our November grassroots goal and we need to catch up. To make up for lost time, we’re asking every top contributing member to RUSH a donation to help us rebuild. Every dollar you give will help Conservatives get back on track. Thank you, Team Hawley | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

body:
let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.
| | |

Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.**

My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator.

Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:**

**[Please, friend, will you chip in $3 or more right now to split between me and Maggie Hassan so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55468475/381768995/-323915468?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2123-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzZiNzM2Zi05ZDcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Ec6ZSv8NCds32xTPuWwo05_j7fiOpJLAbCaBy1T07A=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55468476/381768996/-323915468?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2123-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzZiNzM2Zi05ZDcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Ec6ZSv8NCds32xTPuWwo05_j7fiOpJLAbCaBy1T07A=)
I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all in to defeat me and crush our progress.

**They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. **

**[So please, friend, I'm personally asking: Will you split $3 or more between me and Maggie Hassan to become one of the 25,000 donors we need to kickstart our runoff campaign, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55468477/381768997/-323915468?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2123-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzZiNzM2Zi05ZDcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Ec6ZSv8NCds32xTPuWwo05_j7fiOpJLAbCaBy1T07A=)**

Thank you,
Reverend Warnock

---
| | **No More Woke Wish Lists 🚮**
---
| |
---
It’s that wonderful time of year...when children are creating their Christmas wish lists, getting ready for Santa’s arrival in just a few weeks. While our kids have to be good little boys and girls to get their presents, the swamp creatures in D.C. have a different way of getting what they want. Where am I going with this analogy? I'll cut to the chase. Under our Democrat-led government, Americans have been lied to and hung out to dry because of liberals' sneaky tactics. Let’s say a politician proposes a bill to fix our roads and bridges—that's exactly what the bill should do. It shouldn’t include camouflaged pay raises, green new deal pipe dreams, and other insider fluff. I'm sick of folks being taken for a ride by their government due to legislative smoke and mirrors. That's why I've proposed changes to House legislative procedure to increase transparency. Here are the details of my proposal to make sure Americans have easy access to information about what is really happening in Congress:
* Require House bill titles to describe the bill’s content accurately—no more “Inflation Reduction Act” bills that actually _increase_ inflation
* Require the estimated cost of each bill to be made publicly available before it is brought to the House floor for a vote
* Require the House to vote on each bill individually
* Prohibit procedural bills from including unrelated legislation
* Prohibit bills from being brought to the House floor for a vote without going through the appropriate committee first
* Prohibit bills from undergoing substantial last-minute changes before being brought to the House floor for a vote

These rules would go a long way toward holding Congress accountable, keeping people informed, and keeping the dang woke wish lists where they belong—out of our government!

The infamous story of ["Cocaine Bear"](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0b0629069f6f41f0a43e4a0a86850ff3&_e=ETK4_2GWoV0N1XH3cMpUo0Iu8ZuGpc6Iy0DcfeOedImSn4NzCka97ckbyZLzPSMJu5vYcDEHA20ZvvQ6tww1m3PeejEQCgmgWYscgoDUh6zN1qhj25Jm6_F2eUnhg-3bys4ELY0OoikGEDLkeuuZJF35GNGJS316a8smqeMEJXq2rbPKru-TWqaUWxZYRICPCHLCTEDLZsxC0sFJtws5sqWRGJtTZzgVetGTia1kbqjLYGTD_eKGyPW9dXhFe3M_xCsLc5UpzNmYzX9UNoJknyu5_h22l4Sem92fEzxwXAoecTMuaq5G1KJUVyqAte5vqZOZ7oeukGL23euh-eMGaA%3D%3D)—the true tale of an unfortunate fella falling out of the sky and getting his cocaine stash thieved by a black bear in Knoxville is coming to theaters soon. clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | | | No More Woke Wish Lists 🚮 | | It’s that wonderful time of year...when children are creating their Christmas wish lists, getting ready for Santa’s arrival in just a few weeks. While our kids have to be good little boys and girls to get their presents, the swamp creatures in D.C. have a different way of getting what they want. Where am I going with this analogy? I'll cut to the chase. Under our Democrat-led government, Americans have been lied to and hung out to dry because of liberals' sneaky tactics. Let’s say a politician proposes a bill to fix our roads and bridges—that's exactly what the bill should do. It shouldn’t include camouflaged pay raises, green new deal pipe dreams, and other insider fluff. I'm sick of folks being taken for a ride by their government due to legislative smoke and mirrors. That's why I've proposed changes to House legislative procedure to increase transparency. Here are the details of my proposal to make sure Americans have easy access to information about what is really happening in Congress: Require House bill titles to describe the bill’s content accurately—no more “Inflation Reduction Act” bills that actually increase inflation Require the estimated cost of each bill to be made publicly available before it is brought to the House floor for a vote Require the House to vote on each bill individually Prohibit procedural bills from including unrelated legislation Prohibit bills from being brought to the House floor for a vote without going through the appropriate committee first Prohibit bills from undergoing substantial last-minute changes before being brought to the House floor for a vote These rules would go a long way toward holding Congress accountable, keeping people informed, and keeping the dang woke wish lists where they belong—out of our government! | | | | | Knoxville On The Big Screen 🐻 | | The infamous story of —the true tale of an unfortunate fella falling out of the sky and getting his cocaine stash thieved by a black bear in Knoxville is coming to theaters soon. While creators took liberties with the premise of a bear consuming a ton of cocaine, Knoxville did receive an honorable mention for this crazy tale! Where is the real Cocaine Bear now? can be found in a store in Lexington, KY. | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → Purrfect shot 🐱📸 () → Good boys in blue 😌😭 () → GOAT friend 🥰😁 () | | | | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: John Kennedy
subject: The last uncalled Senate race of 2022
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I know a good candidate when I see one; they’re hard to come by. | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8de917597c7c4dbba6372bf3c20b9843&_e=JuRzKiusTRED7rqKMmBFS5zzQYG_l6mbLjaWhbk97XDojd-AvF7NUjflfoCPq_ign2BFMOri14KRzT01xGuqx_rtz0HUlVTy02kNN_0Xnxxarx-8rpt12lBBhw7Mh4tm5d7Ye8ouKT7VWyHoxVXTKeSk8LsyC0o70fw0bLE7hhUGvnLHJgLmPpyAmseXMamY21KAizCSMe5FB74zak2vcCUd6FZA8jccfw-T4Py0LofOQtvMoqUr_Qmh7lahIKVDR3MmYbmCKXA4kOr5u963ER3I1175gnlaB7mndxR7L161aHAQyxOL_Ogo2V3EA4-U4tmaagtDBslEPnvcS7zewd7DxX-4bnZhBKeq8ZZ9U6eoIYTQyALXn9jCdn27YszdDp9ShnZtPuWy6helw96CtOT4Sa5Top7eDGTtkJFii5nWaH3uBVwFBpQPb0pij9EPOkwHqSDNgUV4-IRVX2BdUQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Most folks get into politics for all the wrong reasons. Some candidates run because of their egos or desire for fame. Others want to cash in with a lucrative book deal. Some even run because they want a stepping-stone to a higher office. It's sad, really.

**Herschel Walker is different. He's not a politician.**

Herschel doesn't need fortune or fame. He already has both.

Herschel knows America is going in the wrong direction...and he simply wants to help.

**Herschel Walker is running because Raphael Warnock is a wolf in sheep's clothing and must be defeated.**

clean_body: If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. | Fellow American, Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today. Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Sen. Warnock
subject: I've got nowhere else to turn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend: With four days until the runoff election, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to keep Georgia blue. **But first, I'd like to explain why I'm running – and why I need your urgent support to win.**
I grew up in public housing in Savannah, Georgia, and I had 11 brothers and sisters. We were short on money but long on love and faith. From there, I became the first in our family to graduate from a four-year college, I earned a Ph.D., and 15 years ago, I was called to Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s pulpit to serve as the senior pastor of Ebenezer Baptist Church.
As a pastor, I always thought my impact doesn't stop at the church door – that's where it starts. I've been a lifelong advocate for affordable health care, fair wages, and voting rights. Now, I'm running for reelection to continue bringing these critical fights to Washington.
Listen, friend: The opportunities that made my journey possible, from Kayton Homes to Dr. King's pulpit, are growing further and further out of reach for far too many across this country. We have a chance to change that, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That's why I have to ask:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to join me in this fight to keep Georgia blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55468887/381791251/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5237-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDdkNGJkMC1hNTcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5tl4luypkrxzpWrGHL3RJVVLd41VkVfgzu2gwzUUP_o=)
Mitch McConnell and the GOP have already spent $52 million to flood Georgia with dishonest attack ads – on TOP of the more than $58 million my opponent has raised from GOP donors.
**With all signs pointing to an incredibly close runoff****, I've got nowhere else to turn – and I need you with me to win, friend:****[Give $5 or more right now to power our grassroots movement forward, win this runoff, and keep Georgia blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55468888/381791252/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5237-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDdkNGJkMC1hNTcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5tl4luypkrxzpWrGHL3RJVVLd41VkVfgzu2gwzUUP_o=)**
Thank you for your support – I'm so grateful.

– Raphael Warnock
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I’m grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we’re in a runoff election against Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win.

Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That’s why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

If you’re with me, _[**please donate now to defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55468889/381791253/-1468610671?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5237-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDdkNGJkMC1hNTcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5tl4luypkrxzpWrGHL3RJVVLd41VkVfgzu2gwzUUP_o=)_. If you’d like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, **text “GEORGIA” to 52005**.

Thank you!

– Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55468890/381791254/-1468610671?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5237-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDdkNGJkMC1hNTcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5tl4luypkrxzpWrGHL3RJVVLd41VkVfgzu2gwzUUP_o=) **Text GEORGIA to 52005 •[Visit our Team Warnock Store](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55468891/381791255/-1115795912?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDdkNGJkMC1hNTcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5tl4luypkrxzpWrGHL3RJVVLd41VkVfgzu2gwzUUP_o=&emci=5928707c-1370-ed11-819c-00224825858d&emdi=547d4bd0-a572-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1586379)**

body:
With time running out before this critical election, I’m counting on you to step up. | |
---
Derek -- I'm fired up. Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority. But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling millions of dollars into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads to help elect Herschel Walker. **I'm worried that if we don't fight back, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls.** **That's why we need the resources to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win.** But with time running out before this critical election, I’m counting on you to step up. **I'm personally asking: Will you split $10 or more right now between my campaign and the DNC to help reach more voters, keep Georgia blue, and elect Democrats nationwide?**

clean_body: With time running out before this critical election, I’m counting on you to step up. | | Derek -- I'm fired up. Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority. But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling millions of dollars into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads to help elect Herschel Walker. I'm worried that if we don't fight back, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls. That's why we need the resources to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win. But with time running out before this critical election, I’m counting on you to step up. I'm personally asking: Will you split $10 or more right now between my campaign and the DNC to help reach more voters, keep Georgia blue, and elect Democrats nationwide? I'm deeply appreciative of you, Derek -- today and every day. Let's go win this thing! Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. Fellow American,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia will - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: 2022 December e-newsletter
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# 2022 December e-newsletter
News and information for District 5 in San Mateo County.
---
|
---
|
---
|
#### **Fourth annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive **
---
| After a two-year hiatus due to COVID, I’m delighted to invite you to join me and some of my best friends as we host the Fourth Annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive, 2 p.m. to 5 p.m., Saturday, December 10 at Classic Bowling Center, 900 King Drive in Daly City. Donate a new unwrapped toy and bowl for free. The event is cosponsored by my friend Keith Okada, who goes by Keith O, a world-class DJ and bowler who has been a fixture at Classic Bowling for 20 years now.
---
This is such a fun day to relax and have fun and to get your competitive juices flowing playing some ten-pin. Most importantly, though, it is a way to bring some joy to children in need during the holidays. Thank you to our partner Classic Bowling Center which has become a community gathering place for Daly City residents and hosts generations of family members. Hope to see you there!

To RSVP, contact Mike on my staff: [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org)
---
| **
Happy holidays from my family to yours** As the holidays draw closer and we approach 2023, I am so thankful to serve as your San Mateo County Supervisor. I am also thankful for my beautiful wife Ana and son Piero who both keep me grounded.

Piero was born during my first year in office and watching him grow up every day is the joy of our lives. I am also grateful to my staff for helping me to address the needs of my constituents in San Mateo County and for creating policy that will improve the lives of all county residents. As I finish my sixth year in office, I am honored to be a member of a Board of Supervisors that has made historic investments in reducing homelessness, creating affordable housing, removing guns from our streets, protecting women’s reproductive rights and protecting our environment. As the year comes to an end, I’d like to thank you all for taking the time to read our monthly newsletters and for your support. Happy Holidays, Merry Christmas and Happy New Year from my family to yours!
---
---
| **MTC’s Clipper Baypass Program a huge success ** As a member of the Metropolitan Transportation Commission, I am proud of the agency’s launching of the Clipper BayPass Program, which expanded eligibility to the program to study the impact of a single pass that will provide up to 50,000 Bay Area residents free access to nearly all bus, rail and ferry services in the nine-county region. Residents of 12 affordable housing communities managed by MidPen Housing in Alameda, San Mateo and Santa Clara counties were made eligible for the program in October of 2022. Select affordable housing communities managed by MidPen Housing in San Mateo County received free transit passes to use on any transit system in the Bay Area. The free passes assist socio-economic disadvantaged communities and students. SamTrans — in conjunction with other transit agencies participating in the Clipper fare payment system — is a key part of the program.
---

Clipper BayPass is the first initiative to be implemented based on recommendations of the Regional Fare Coordination/Integration Study, an 18-month study led by MTC and BART that focused on creating a more customer-friendly transit fare system in the Bay Area. Kudos to SamTrans and MidPen Housing for taking part in this program which supports economic empowerment and well-being. MidPen’s residents often face transportation and access barriers, and the Clipper BayPass presents significant cost-savings especially as we emerge from the pandemic. The MTC provides funds to transit agencies to offset the revenue impacts of the Clipper BayPass pilot, which is expected to conclude at the end of 2024. This program has been a huge success and may be expanded further in future years.
---
| **SMC Alert updated** An improved SMC Alert system brings new features for those who live and work in San Mateo County, including maps, images and multiple images in case emergency strikes such as wildfire, tsunami or earthquake. To sign up go to visit www.SMCalert.info. If you have alreaady opted-in to the system, current users are encouraged to create a new account to access the new features but those who do not will continue to receive messages through their existing account. As a member of the county’s Emergency Services Council, I have advocated for the expansion of the program for years and encourage all county residents to sign up for the free service.

---
Those who are signed up can now get messages via text, email and voice that include maps, images and multiple languages. The new features of SMC Alert are meant to empower residents further by providing key information to help keep them safe and navigate away from incidents like major traffic delays and detours, floods and mountain lions. The added capabilities are due to a new vendor, RAVE, which replaces former provider Everbridge, according to the County Manager’s Office. SMC Alert is a free notification system used to immediately alert you of urgent or emergency situations. Senders include the county and its cities; the new alert system has an improved identification component to show recipients exactly which agency sent the message. The new system also lets you choose to receive messages in English, Spanish or Simplified Chinese.
---
| **
COVID and flu vaccines urged** With COVID-19, RSV and flu circulating in our area, the county’s Health System is urging residents take steps to prevent these respiratory infections by wearing a high-quality mask indoors, staying up to date on vaccinations, washing your hands, avoiding touching your face, covering coughs, and cleaning surfaces. COVID-19 vaccines and boosters are widely available from health care providers and pharmacies, such as CVS, Safeway and Walgreens. For County Health’s pop-up clinics, please see the online calendar or go to MyTurn to schedule appointments. Flu vaccines are also available from health care providers and from County Health. See flu vaccine locations and schedules on MyTurn here and County Health’s pop-up flu clinics. To learn more click here: [https://www.smchealth.org/flu](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=e7c3339a60&e=c0babbc643).

**Battling food insecurity **
Food insecurity is a problem some residents may still face as we continue to emerge from the pandemic. Here are some resources residents can access: **CalFresh:**
Is a program for people with low-income who meet federal income eligibility rules and want to add to their budget to put healthy and nutritious food on the table. Website: [https://www.cdss.ca.gov/food-nutrition/calfresh](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=e7fe4dd6e1&e=c0babbc643) Contact: (650) 802-6576, [antorres@smcgov.org](mailto:antorres@smcgov.org) **Daly City Partnership:**
DC Partnership is a local partnership that was formed to guide collaborative efforts and connect our community to services that promote well-being. Check out their website for times and locations. Website: [https://www.dcpartnership.org/covid19/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=d497954291&e=c0babbc643) **Second Harvest Food Bank:**
Second Harvest offers food at various locations throughout San Mateo County listed on its webpage. Website: [https://www.shfb.org/get-food/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=d66859c1b1&e=c0babbc643) Contacts: Call (800) 984-3663 or text GETFOOD to (408) 455-5181 **Interns wanted to join our team **

We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9. You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at mrichardson@smcgov.org

**Follow the Office on Social Media**
If you want to get more insight into our office please connect with us on social media. It’s also a great way to interact with the office and to get notifications on upcoming events. In friendship, David J. Canepa
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | 2022 December e-newsletter News and information for District 5 in San Mateo County. | | | Fourth annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive | After a two-year hiatus due to COVID, I’m delighted to invite you to join me and some of my best friends as we host the Fourth Annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive, 2 p.m. to 5 p.m., Saturday, December 10 at Classic Bowling Center, 900 King Drive in Daly City. Donate a new unwrapped toy and bowl for free. The event is cosponsored by my friend Keith Okada, who goes by Keith O, a world-class DJ and bowler who has been a fixture at Classic Bowling for 20 years now. This is such a fun day to relax and have fun and to get your competitive juices flowing playing some ten-pin. Most importantly, though, it is a way to bring some joy to children in need during the holidays. Thank you to our partner Classic Bowling Center which has become a community gathering place for Daly City residents and hosts generations of family members. Hope to see you there! To RSVP, contact Mike on my staff: mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org | Happy holidays from my family to yours As the holidays draw closer and we approach 2023, I am so thankful to serve as your San Mateo County Supervisor. I am also thankful for my beautiful wife Ana and son Piero who both keep me grounded. Piero was born during my first year in office and watching him grow up every day is the joy of our lives. I am also grateful to my staff for helping me to address the needs of my constituents in San Mateo County and for creating policy that will improve the lives of all county residents. As I finish my sixth year in office, I am honored to be a member of a Board of Supervisors that has made historic investments in reducing homelessness, creating affordable housing, removing guns from our streets, protecting women’s reproductive rights and protecting our environment. As the year comes to an end, I’d like to thank you all for taking the time to read our monthly newsletters and for your support. Happy Holidays, Merry Christmas and Happy New Year from my family to yours! | MTC’s Clipper Baypass Program a huge success As a member of the Metropolitan Transportation Commission, I am proud of the agency’s launching of the Clipper BayPass Program, which expanded eligibility to the program to study the impact of a single pass that will provide up to 50,000 Bay Area residents free access to nearly all bus, rail and ferry services in the nine-county region. Residents of 12 affordable housing communities managed by MidPen Housing in Alameda, San Mateo and Santa Clara counties were made eligible for the program in October of 2022. Select affordable housing communities managed by MidPen Housing in San Mateo County received free transit passes to use on any transit system in the Bay Area. The free passes assist socio-economic disadvantaged communities and students. SamTrans — in conjunction with other transit agencies participating in the Clipper fare payment system — is a key part of the program. Clipper BayPass is the first initiative to be implemented based on recommendations of the Regional Fare Coordination/Integration Study, an 18-month study led by MTC and BART that focused on creating a more customer-friendly transit fare system in the Bay Area. Kudos to SamTrans and MidPen Housing for taking part in this program which supports economic empowerment and well-being. MidPen’s residents often face transportation and access barriers, and the Clipper BayPass presents significant cost-savings especially as we emerge from the pandemic. The MTC provides funds to transit agencies to offset the revenue impacts of the Clipper BayPass pilot, which is expected to conclude at the end of 2024. This program has been a huge success and may be expanded further in future years. | SMC Alert updated An improved SMC Alert system brings new features for those who live and work in San Mateo County, including maps, images and multiple images in case emergency strikes such as wildfire, tsunami or earthquake. To sign up go to visit www.SMCalert.info. If you have alreaady opted-in to the system, current users are encouraged to create a new account to access the new features but those who do not will continue to receive messages through their existing account. As a member of the county’s Emergency Services Council, I have advocated for the expansion of the program for years and encourage all county residents to sign up for the free service. Those who are signed up can now get messages via text, email and voice that include maps, images and multiple languages. The new features of SMC Alert are meant to empower residents further by providing key information to help keep them safe and navigate away from incidents like major traffic delays and detours, floods and mountain lions. The added capabilities are due to a new vendor, RAVE, which replaces former provider Everbridge, according to the County Manager’s Office. SMC Alert is a free notification system used to immediately alert you of urgent or emergency situations. Senders include the county and its cities; the new alert system has an improved identification component to show recipients exactly which agency sent the message. The new system also lets you choose to receive messages in English, Spanish or Simplified Chinese. | COVID and flu vaccines urged With COVID-19, RSV and flu circulating in our area, the county’s Health System is urging residents take steps to prevent these respiratory infections by wearing a high-quality mask indoors, staying up to date on vaccinations, washing your hands, avoiding touching your face, covering coughs, and cleaning surfaces. COVID-19 vaccines and boosters are widely available from health care providers and pharmacies, such as CVS, Safeway and Walgreens. For County Health’s pop-up clinics, please see the online calendar or go to MyTurn to schedule appointments. Flu vaccines are also available from health care providers and from County Health. See flu vaccine locations and schedules on MyTurn here and County Health’s pop-up flu clinics. To learn more click here: . Battling food insecurity Food insecurity is a problem some residents may still face as we continue to emerge from the pandemic. Here are some resources residents can access: CalFresh: Is a program for people with low-income who meet federal income eligibility rules and want to add to their budget to put healthy and nutritious food on the table. Website: Contact: (650) 802-6576, mailto:antorres@smcgov.org Daly City Partnership: DC Partnership is a local partnership that was formed to guide collaborative efforts and connect our community to services that promote well-being. Check out their website for times and locations. Website: Second Harvest Food Bank: Second Harvest offers food at various locations throughout San Mateo County listed on its webpage. Website: Contacts: Call (800) 984-3663 or text GETFOOD to (408) 455-5181 Interns wanted to join our team We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: . You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at mrichardson@smcgov.org Follow the Office on Social Media If you want to get more insight into our office please connect with us on social media. It’s also a great way to interact with the office and to get notifications on upcoming events. In friendship, David J. Canepa | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved.

name: Senator Warnock
subject: Friend, I'll be blunt:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation toward our crucial midnight fundraising goal so we can keep this Senate seat blue. **But first, let me explain why your donation _right now_ is so important – and what could happen to our bold agenda without it.**
I’m humbled to represent Georgia in the Senate as its first-ever Black senator. Growing up in public housing, my family was short on money but long on love and faith. Through hard work and the support of my community, I became the first in my family to graduate from college – and then, the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm fighting in the Senate to make sure every child __ can achieve their American dream.
**But with the results from the general election showing me narrowly leading Trump's handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker, I need your urgent grassroots support to win this crucial runoff election on Dec. 6:[Will you give $5 or more now – before tonight's critical fundraising deadline – to defend this seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55469341/381798855/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5251-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWFmY2I5NC1iNjcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5C_mJHbHzI73IP6UDXnHWGAjrV86dVoqgvHI6AntBc=)**

I'll be blunt: Experts are saying this runoff election will be incredibly close. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment are coming after me with everything they’ve got.
**Trump held megadonor fundraisers for my opponent, and McConnell is mobilizing his super PACs to spend MILLIONS to crush me and turn Georgia red.**
**I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so the only way I can fight back and win this race is with the support of every member of this grassroots team.[I'm personally asking: Will you give $5 or more right now so we can stay on track to hit our critical fundraising goal, keep Georgia blue, and defend this Senate seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55469343/381798857/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5251-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWFmY2I5NC1iNjcyLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5C_mJHbHzI73IP6UDXnHWGAjrV86dVoqgvHI6AntBc=)**
Thank you. I deeply appreciate your support.
– Sen. Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://action.warnockforgeorgia.com/p/UBjz5MzSPkqVKiEwLzz2KA2?unsubscribedata=LgViZ34o%2F59d%2F0ADJnjDYMIm8FiCPfwfqXVvshpjUU3ZSDbIXcAnKc%2Fp0NuQIs5Uxp61t8%2B2azDgfPhZ%2FZ1ttrwJ0jIPitTcFAUn3k4awT%2Bto7BYny1l4ylz2HYU7HLzaeMyLD5SzWNEX%2F%2FvHMAYA5myDPecZIgvytDC5zOl7QuynRcZEETHl%2Fj05iFST59blfX4wctAhcJUvgfpPkT%2B%2FNUforcdRY8PAAXlW1vNqqYbtpgf9GXf0a%2FGtegYQcC8fk1icdJ8GBY47KNti3Q24QSlRPDdOgxlxw2f2NP%2FvO6XbWK6lXJbxj1LZE68YR%2BtGkESsvBqySf6mQh0QDlPxkIX%2FrsPH0vLbt5a%2B%2BeiFtzNbYxBcL521Sa7t%2BIVW%2Fo7hv3lWp80yNefOdh6uEkXTUkZwSqYYrODlR2yf7t2FlE%3D) For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Hunter Biden Gun Scandal!
body:
Biden Censors Americans?!

[INSIDE JW]

SECRET SERVICE REPEATEDLY CHANGES ITS STORY ON HUNTER BIDEN GUN
RECORDS

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28506&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1RbVU0S3lOYTlUOCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]

The United States Secret Service has repeatedly changed its position
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28507&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbi1ndW4tcmVjb3Jkcy0wMjg0MS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE]
on whether it is in possession of records related to the investigation
of Hunter Biden’s gun, which was reportedly disposed of in a
dumpster in Delaware.

The agency now says it has located more than 100 records, totaling
over 400 pages, but won’t complete its initial processing of them
until January 9, 2023.

We are investigating whether and how the Secret Service intervened for
Hunter Biden in an incident involving a gun he allegedly owned. In
September, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28275&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWludmVzdGlnYXRpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==]
for
records or communications about the reported purchase, possession, and
disposal of a firearm owned by Hunter Biden found in a Delaware
dumpster in October 2018 (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of
Homeland Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28122&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbi1ndW4tY29tcGxhaW50LTAyODQxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]
(No. 1:22-cv-02841)).

The Secret Service initially responded to our request on April 2,
2021, stating that it had located potentially responsive records and
would process them in accordance with FOIA. Then, on October 13, 2022,
the agency said the April 2021 response was sent in error and that it
did not have any records responsive to the FOIA request.

Then, on November 10, 2022
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28507&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWh1bnRlci1iaWRlbi1ndW4tcmVjb3Jkcy0wMjg0MS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE],
the agency informed the District Court that it has run supplemental
searches and has located over 100 records, totaling over 400 pages,
potentially responsive to our request.

Is it simply coincidence that the second message from the Secret
Service came after the November 8 midterm election?
The Secret Service also told the court that it would complete its
initial processing of all potentially responsive records by January 9,
2023, and send records out for any necessary consultations with other
Executive Branch entities by that date. All other non-exempt,
responsive records are to be produced to us by January 9.

The Secret Service’s changing story on records raises additional
questions about its role in the Hunter Biden gun incident. One thing
is clear: Our persistence means the public may get records that the
Secret Service suggested didn’t exist.

In October 2020, _The Blaze_ reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28123&F=T&]
that in October 2018, Hunter Biden’s handgun was taken by Hallie
Biden, the widow of then-presidential nominee Joe Biden’s son Beau.
In 2021,_ Politico _reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28124&F=T&

> Hallie took Hunter’s gun and threw it in a trash can behind a
> grocery store, only to return later to find it gone.
>
> Delaware police began investigating, concerned that the trash can
> was across from a high school and that the missing gun could be used
> in a crime, according to law enforcement officials and a copy of the
> police report obtained by POLITICO.
>
> But a curious thing happened at the time: Secret Service agents
> approached the owner of the store where Hunter bought the gun and
> asked to take the paperwork involving the sale, according to two
> people, one of whom has firsthand knowledge of the episode and the
> other was briefed by a Secret Service agent after the fact.

WHAT IS THE SECRET SERVICE HIDING ABOUT BIDEN RAID ON TRUMP’S HOME?
JUDICIAL WATCH SUES TO FIND OUT!

Judicial Watch just filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
against the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for all
communications between the Secret Service and FBI regarding the search
warrant that precipitated the raid on former President Donald
Trump’s Florida residence at Mar-a-Lago on August 8, 2022 (_Judicial
Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Homeland Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28498&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLW1hci1hLWxhZ28tc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtY29tcGxhaW50LTAzMjc1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]
(1:22-cv-03275)).

We sued to compel DHS to comply with an August 9, 2022, FOIA request
for:

> All records of communication between any official or employee of the
> U.S. Secret Service and any official or employee of the Federal
> Bureau of Investigation regarding the execution of a search warrant
> at the residence of President Trump on August 8, 2022.
The Secret Service had indicated in an August 23, 2022, letter that
it had completed its search for records responsive to the FOIA
request. In a September letter, however, the Secret Service retracted
that assertion.

Citing the BBC
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28499&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmJjLmNvbS9uZXdzL3dvcmxkLXVzLWNhbmFkYS02MjQ3MjkwOD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=],
as
well as ABC News
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28500&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hYmNuZXdzLmdvLmNvbS9Qb2xpdGljcy9rZXktZGV2ZWxvcG1lbnRzcmVsYXRlZC1mYmlzLW1hci1sYWdvLXNlYXJjaHRpbWVsaW5lL3N0b3J5P2lkPTg4NDA1MDkxJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==],
we detail in our lawsuit that the FBI reportedly provided the Secret
Service with advance notice of the pending execution of the search
warrant:

> Specifically, the reporting indicates that an employee or employees
> of the FBI Miami Field Office notified President Trump’s Secret
> Service protective detail approximately 45 minutes before their
> arrival at Mar-a-Lago. Records of any such communication would be
> responsive to the request and fall within the specified time frame.
The Secret Service’s changing story on whether it has documents on
the Biden administration’s unprecedented raid on former President
Trump’s home should be resolved by a federal court.

We have been active in this area.

In October, we filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28299&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tcmFpZC1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]
against Homeland
Security for all communications of the Secret Service internally and
with the FBI regarding the raid on President Trump’s home and for
any video or audio recordings made during the raid.

Also, we announced
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28248&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tbmFyYS13aXRoaG9sZHMtcmVjb3Jkcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE]
that the
National Archives is withholding 99% of the requested records about
the raid in response to our FOIA lawsuit.

In August, we forced the release
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=27949&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJ1bXAtcmFpZC1hZmZpZGF2aXQtcmVsZWFzZWQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==]
of the
raid affidavit through a court request
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=27945&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY291cnQtZ3JhbnRzLWp3LXJlcXVlc3QtdHJ1bXAtYWZmaWRhdml0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]
to unseal the warrant materials used in the raid.
We also filed two lawsuits
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28215&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tcmFpZC1vbi10cnVtcC1ob21lLXJlY29yZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==]
against the Justice Department for records of the raid search warrant
application and approval, as well as communications about the warrant
between the FBI, the Executive Office of the President, and the Secret

The Biden raid on Trump’s home was government abuse and Judicial
Watch will shy away from demanding answers about this scandal.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES BIDEN AGENCY FOR CENSORSHIP RECORDS

The Biden administration has assumed the right to censor ideas it
doesn’t like – in collusion with Big Tech social media companies.

Judicial Watch filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for all records
of communications between the Cybersecurity and Information Security
Agency (CISA), a division of DHS, and the Election Integrity
Partnership (EIP), which was created to flag online election content
for censorship and suppression_ _(_Judicial Watch Inc. vs. U.S.
Department of Homeland Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28508&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWVsZWN0aW9uLWludGVncml0eS1wYXJ0bmVyc2hpcC1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDM1NjAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==]
(No. 1:22-cv-03560 )).

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
DHS failed to respond to our October 5, 2022, FOIA request for:

* All records of communication between the CISA and the EIP. This
includes all "tickets" or notifications to the Partnership regarding
election-related disinformation on any social media platform.
* All records regarding the July 9, 2020, meeting between DHS
officials and representatives of the EIP.
* All records of communication between the CISA and the University
of Washington's Center for an Informed Public and/or Stanford
University's Internet Observatory regarding any of the following:

* The Election Integrity Partnership
* The 2020 U.S. election
* Online misinformation and disinformation
* Any social media platform

The Election Integrity Partnership

U.S. FUNDS WORKSHOPS IN INDIA TO PROMOTE TRANSGENDER EXTREMISM

What can the Biden administration possible do next with your tax
dollars? How about sending your money to “Pride/Rainbow groups” in
India to support the rights of transgender people? Our _Corruption
Chronicles _blog has the details
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28519&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdXMtZnVuZHMtd29ya3Nob3BzLWluLWluZGlhL106P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==

> Though years ago India passed a sweeping law giving transgender
> people rights—and prohibiting discrimination in education,
> employment, and healthcare—the Biden administration is spending
> American taxpayer dollars to counter stigma and prejudice against
> the transgender community in the south Asian nation with the
> world’s largest democracy. Uncle Sam will pay for workshops that
> will help employees and leadership at Indian companies create
> awareness about transgender persons and their rights. This includes
> setting up “Pride/Rainbow groups” within the corporations and
> inspiring them to cultivate a more inclusive work environment as
> well as develop active transgender employee recruitment plans.
>
> “These workshops will aim to help corporations and businesses to
> better understand the needs of the TG community and encourage them
> to adopt policies and carry out activities that foster a work
> environment that is safe, nurturing, accepting, and inclusive for
> members of the TG community,” according to the U.S. government
> grant announcement
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28520&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ3JhbnRzLmdvdi93ZWIvZ3JhbnRzL3ZpZXctb3Bwb3J0dW5pdHkuaHRtbD9vcHBJZD0zNDQ1ODgmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE].
> The document adds that “a longer-term outcome is that these
> corporations and businesses increase their hiring of members of the
> TG community and help their employees and the general public be more
> accepting.” The ultimate goal, according to the administration, is
> to “sensitize” the Indian corporations towards the rights of the
> LGTQI+ community and the transgender community specifically. This
> will cost U.S. taxpayers $50,000 and the money will flow through the
> State Department under public diplomacy programs.
>
> The U.S. estimates that there are more than five million transgender
> persons in India and roughly 3,000 of them live in Hyderabad, a
> capital city in country’s southern region. Companies there and in
> Chennai, on the eastern side in the Bay of Bengal, are the
> initiative’s targets. “For centuries, TG persons have played
> important roles in the Indian society,” according to the grant
> document. “However, that did not translate into equal treatment as
> citizens in modern India.” The U.S. does acknowledge India’s
> effort to improve transgender rights, but says it is not enough.
> “While recent laws have, to a small extent, provided more rights
> to the community, they continue to face social exclusion and
> discrimination because of their gender identity and orientation,”
> the State Department writes. “Unlike other members of the LGBTQI+
> community, TG persons can often be identified by their appearance,
> making them easy targets for social and economic discrimination and
> exclusion.” The agency cites a 2017 study that shows 92% of
> India’s transgender population is unable to participate in formal
> economic activity, mostly fueled by social stigma and prejudice.
>
> The referenced study was completed two years before India passed the
> Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Bill
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61269&L=28521&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL29yaW5hbS5uZXQvY29udGVudC93cC1jb250ZW50L3VwbG9hZHMvMjAxOS8wNy90cmFuc2dlbmRlci1wZXJzb24tYmlsbC0yMDE5LnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=],
> however. The law prohibits discrimination against transgender
> persons in all areas, including healthcare, education, employment,
> housing, and services. It also punishes those who abuse transgender
> people with jail terms of up to two years. Language in the measure
> makes it clear that the legislation specifically bans the type of
> treatment the U.S.-funded workshops plan to target. “No
> establishment shall discriminate against any transgender person in
> any matter relating to employment including, but not limited to,
> recruitment, promotion and other related issues,” the law, which
> was passed on July 11, 2019, states. Embedded in the bill is a
> “statement of objects and reasons” explaining that the
> transgender community is one of the most marginalized in the country
> because “they do not fit into the general categories of male or
> female.” As a result, the transgender rights bill explains, they
> face problems ranging from social exclusion to discrimination, lack
> of education facilities, unemployment, and lack of medical
> facilities. Transgender groups have also reported instances in which
> they were hired and “had to quit after some months due to the
> attitude of coworkers,” the 2019 law states.

clean_body: Biden Censors Americans?! [INSIDE JW] SECRET SERVICE REPEATEDLY CHANGES ITS STORY ON HUNTER BIDEN GUN RECORDS [=] The United States Secret Service has repeatedly changed its position [] on whether it is in possession of records related to the investigation of Hunter Biden’s gun, which was reportedly disposed of in a dumpster in Delaware. The agency now says it has located more than 100 records, totaling over 400 pages, but won’t complete its initial processing of them until January 9, 2023. We are investigating whether and how the Secret Service intervened for Hunter Biden in an incident involving a gun he allegedly owned. In September, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [==] for records or communications about the reported purchase, possession, and disposal of a firearm owned by Hunter Biden found in a Delaware dumpster in October 2018 (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [=] (No. 1:22-cv-02841)). The Secret Service initially responded to our request on April 2, 2021, stating that it had located potentially responsive records and would process them in accordance with FOIA. Then, on October 13, 2022, the agency said the April 2021 response was sent in error and that it did not have any records responsive to the FOIA request. Then, on November 10, 2022 [], the agency informed the District Court that it has run supplemental searches and has located over 100 records, totaling over 400 pages, potentially responsive to our request. Is it simply coincidence that the second message from the Secret Service came after the November 8 midterm election? The Secret Service also told the court that it would complete its initial processing of all potentially responsive records by January 9, 2023, and send records out for any necessary consultations with other Executive Branch entities by that date. All other non-exempt, responsive records are to be produced to us by January 9. The Secret Service’s changing story on records raises additional questions about its role in the Hunter Biden gun incident. One thing is clear: Our persistence means the public may get records that the Secret Service suggested didn’t exist. In October 2020, The Blaze reported [] that in October 2018, Hunter Biden’s handgun was taken by Hallie Biden, the widow of then-presidential nominee Joe Biden’s son Beau. In 2021, Politico reported [= Hallie took Hunter’s gun and threw it in a trash can behind a grocery store, only to return later to find it gone. Delaware police began investigating, concerned that the trash can was across from a high school and that the missing gun could be used in a crime, according to law enforcement officials and a copy of the police report obtained by POLITICO. But a curious thing happened at the time: Secret Service agents approached the owner of the store where Hunter bought the gun and asked to take the paperwork involving the sale, according to two people, one of whom has firsthand knowledge of the episode and the other was briefed by a Secret Service agent after the fact. Our investigation of Hunter Biden includes: In October 2022, we filed a FOIA lawsuit [==] against the Department of Justice for all records in the possession of FBI Supervisory Intelligence Analyst Brian Auten regarding an August 6, 2020, briefing provided to members of the U.S. Senate. Ron Johnson (R-WI) and Chuck Grassley (R-IA) raised concerns that the briefing was intended to undermine the senators’ investigation of Hunter Biden. In December 2020, we received records [==] from the State Department tying Hunter Biden’s Burisma Holdings’ lobbying operation to an influence-peddling operation involving the Clinton campaign during the 2016 election. Also uncovered were State Department records [] showing that former U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie “Masha” Yovanovitch had specifically warned in 2017 about corruption allegations against Burisma Holdings. In October 2020, we revealed State Department records [] that included a briefing checklist of a February 22, 2019, meeting in Kyiv between then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch and Sally Painter, co-founder and chief operating officer of Blue Star Strategies, a Democratic lobbying firm which was hired by Burisma Holdings to combat corruption allegations [==)]. The briefing checklist notes that Painter also planned to meet [==] with Foreign Commercial Service (FCS) Officer Martin Claessens “regarding the Burisma Group energy company.” (Painter was implicated in the Clinton-era fundraising scandal [] we exposed. It involved the alleged sale of seats on Commerce Department trade missions to Democratic National Committee donors.) In September 2020, State Department records [=] revealed a January 17, 2017, email from George Kent, the Obama administration’s deputy assistant secretary of state in charge of Ukraine policy, which was copied to then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch, highlighting Russia-linked media “trolling” Joe Biden over “his son’s business.” An email [] was sent four days prior to the inauguration of President Donald Trump to a redacted recipient and CCd to Yovanovitch with the subject line “medvedchuk-linked vesti trolls Biden.” Kent writes: “Burisma – gift that keeps on giving. (With medvedchuk affiliated Vesti pushing the troll like storyline on visit day)” In June 2020, U.S. Secret Service records [==] showed that, for the first five and a half years of the Obama administration, Hunter Biden traveled extensively while receiving a Secret Service protective detail. During the time period of the records provided, Hunter Biden took 411 separate domestic and international flights, including to 29 different foreign countries. He visited China five times. We are also suing [==] the DHS for Secret Service records on Hunter Biden’s travel and security costs, and suing [] the State Department for messages sent through the SMART [==] (State Messaging and Archive Retrieval Toolkit) system that mention Hunter Biden. As the Hunter Biden scandal issues are often directly about Joe Biden scandal issues, Judicial Watch will continue its leadership role in investigating and exposing this important aspect of government corruption. WHAT IS THE SECRET SERVICE HIDING ABOUT BIDEN RAID ON TRUMP’S HOME? JUDICIAL WATCH SUES TO FIND OUT! Judicial Watch just filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for all communications between the Secret Service and FBI regarding the search warrant that precipitated the raid on former President Donald Trump’s Florida residence at Mar-a-Lago on August 8, 2022 (Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Homeland Security [=] (1:22-cv-03275)). We sued to compel DHS to comply with an August 9, 2022, FOIA request for: All records of communication between any official or employee of the U.S. Secret Service and any official or employee of the Federal Bureau of Investigation regarding the execution of a search warrant at the residence of President Trump on August 8, 2022. The Secret Service had indicated in an August 23, 2022, letter that it had completed its search for records responsive to the FOIA request. In a September letter, however, the Secret Service retracted that assertion. Citing the BBC [=], as well as ABC News [==], we detail in our lawsuit that the FBI reportedly provided the Secret Service with advance notice of the pending execution of the search warrant: Specifically, the reporting indicates that an employee or employees of the FBI Miami Field Office notified President Trump’s Secret Service protective detail approximately 45 minutes before their arrival at Mar-a-Lago. Records of any such communication would be responsive to the request and fall within the specified time frame. The Secret Service’s changing story on whether it has documents on the Biden administration’s unprecedented raid on former President Trump’s home should be resolved by a federal court. We have been active in this area. In October, we filed a FOIA lawsuit [=] against Homeland Security for all communications of the Secret Service internally and with the FBI regarding the raid on President Trump’s home and for any video or audio recordings made during the raid. Also, we announced [] that the National Archives is withholding 99% of the requested records about the raid in response to our FOIA lawsuit. In August, we forced the release [==] of the raid affidavit through a court request [=] to unseal the warrant materials used in the raid. We also filed two lawsuits [==] against the Justice Department for records of the raid search warrant application and approval, as well as communications about the warrant between the FBI, the Executive Office of the President, and the Secret Service. The Biden raid on Trump’s home was government abuse and Judicial Watch will shy away from demanding answers about this scandal. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES BIDEN AGENCY FOR CENSORSHIP RECORDS The Biden administration has assumed the right to censor ideas it doesn’t like – in collusion with Big Tech social media companies. Judicial Watch filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for all records of communications between the Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency (CISA), a division of DHS, and the Election Integrity Partnership (EIP), which was created to flag online election content for censorship and suppression (Judicial Watch Inc. vs. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [==] (No. 1:22-cv-03560 )). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after DHS failed to respond to our October 5, 2022, FOIA request for: All records of communication between the CISA and the EIP. This includes all "tickets" or notifications to the Partnership regarding election-related disinformation on any social media platform. All records regarding the July 9, 2020, meeting between DHS officials and representatives of the EIP. All records of communication between the CISA and the University of Washington's Center for an Informed Public and/or Stanford University's Internet Observatory regarding any of the following: The Election Integrity Partnership The 2020 U.S. election Online misinformation and disinformation * Any social media platform The Election Integrity Partnership [] was created [] in July 2020, just before the presidential election. According [] to Just the News: The consortium is comprised of four member organizations: Stanford Internet Observatory (SIO), the University of Washington's Center for an Informed Public, the Atlantic Council's Digital Forensic Research Lab, and social media analytics firm Graphika. It set up a concierge-like service in 2020 that allowed federal agencies like Homeland's Cybersecurity Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) and State's Global Engagement Center to file "tickets" requesting that online story links and social media posts be censored or flagged by Big Tech. Three liberal groups — the Democratic National Committee, Common Cause and the NAACP — were also empowered like the federal agencies to file tickets seeking censorship of content. A Homeland-funded collaboration, the Elections Infrastructure Information Sharing and Analysis Center, also had access. The Election Integrity Partnership also was reportedly [] active during the 2022 midterm elections. Among the news outlets “flagged” by EIP were websites for Just the News, New York Post, Fox News, Washington Examiner, The Washington Times, The Epoch Times and Breitbart. Why is the Biden administration hiding records about federal demands of Big Tech to censor and suppress Americans participating in the debates about elections? In September 2022, we sued [] the Secretary of State of the State of California for having YouTube censor a Judicial Watch election integrity video. In May 2022, YouTube censored our video about Biden corruption and election integrity issues in the 2020 election. The video [==], titled “Impeach? Biden Corruption Threatens National Security,” was falsely determined to be “election misinformation” and removed by YouTube, and Judicial Watch’s YouTube account was suspended for a week. The video featured an interview with me. We continue to post its video [==] content on its Rumble channel (==). In April 2021, we published [=] documents revealing how California state officials pressured social media companies (Twitter, Facebook, Google (YouTube)) to censor posts about the 2020 election. In May 2021, we revealed [==] documents showing that Iowa state officials pressured social media companies Twitter and Facebook to censor posts about the 2020 election. In July 2021, we uncovered [==] records from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), which revealed that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the COVID narrative and “misinformation” and that over $3.5 million in free advertising given to the CDC by social media companies. Free speech and the First Amendment are under assault by the Biden administration, its leftist allies, and compliant Big Tech companies, And your Judicial Watch will do all it can to sue to stop and expose this dangerous assault on our civil rights. SOROS NONPROFIT GETS $12 MIL FROM U.S. TO ‘EMPOWER’ LATIN AMERICA WORKERS It is not at all surprising that the Biden administration is in bed with a leftwing group associated with billionaire George Soros. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reveals [] the flow of taxpayer money to this outfit: The Biden administration is giving a nonprofit partially funded by leftwing billionaire George Soros’s Open Society Foundations (OSF) $12 million [= strengthen labor rights and empower workers in three Latin American countries. The U.S. taxpayer dollars will go to the Solidarity Center [==], a Washington D.C.-based group closely allied with OSF as well as the country’s largest union conglomerate, the American Federation of Labor and Congress of Industrial Organizations (AFL-CIO). The Solidarity Center’s mission is to help workers across the globe fight discrimination, exploitation and systems that entrench poverty. It claims to accomplish this by empowering workers to raise their voice for dignity on the job, justice in their communities and greater equality in the global economy. The group will use the $12 million to “strengthen democratic, independent workers’ organizations in Brazil, Colombia and Peru,” according to the Department of Labor (DOL) announcement issued this week. The project will bolster unions and advocate for the full and free exercise of collective bargaining rights and freedom of association, the agency writes, adding that the focus will be on underserved communities and advancing gender and racial equity. Specifically, the American taxpayer dollars will support activities that improve respect for the rights of Brazil’s Afro-Brazilian, migrant, women and LGBTQI+ workers in the digital platform economy and the manufacturing sector. In Colombia, the focus will be on increasing the capacity of women, migrants, and indigenous people to organize and advocate for workers’ rights. In Peru, the goal is to improve access to mechanisms for labor rights compliance in the mining and agriculture sectors, particularly for indigenous and migrant workers. The Solidarity Center, which claims to be the largest U.S.-based international worker rights organization, also operates in Africa, Asia, Europe, and the Middle East. Most of its funding comes from Uncle Sam, but private groups like OSF also contribute generously. In 2020, the Solidarity Center received nearly $39 million in federal awards, according to its latest annual report [=]. In 2019, the center got over $36 million from the U.S. government. Additionally, the group gets millions annually in “other revenues” that are not broken down. However, records [=] obtained by Judicial Watch show that the OSF has given a lot of money to the Solidarity Center in the last few years. In 2020, the latest available reporting period, OSF gave the Solidarity Center $980,000. In 2019 the center received $785,000 from OSF and in 2018 it got $400,000 from the Soros nonprofit that has dedicated billions of dollars to leftist causes around the world. Soros’s global foundation explains that the grants are for economic equity and justice, access to justice for migrant workers in the U.S., to improve labor rights in Mexico and Central America, and the empowerment of vulnerable workers in the domestic and agricultural sectors in the Middle East. The U.S. government has long funded Soros groups as well as those with close ties to them like the Solidarity Center. Judicial Watch has reported on it for years and obtained records that show the disturbing reality of American taxpayers financing Soros’s leftwing plots abroad. This includes uncovering documents [=] showing State Department funding of Soros nonprofits in Albania to attack traditional, pro-American groups and policies; U.S. government funding of Soros’s radical globalist agenda [==] in Guatemala, Colombia, Romania and Macedonia. The cash usually flows through the State Department and U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID). Details of the financial and staffing nexus between OSF and the U.S. government are available in a Judicial Watch investigative report [=]. Domestically Soros groups have pushed a radical agenda that includes promoting an open border with Mexico, fomenting racial disharmony by funding anti-capitalist black separationist organizations, financing the Black Lives Matter movement and other groups involved in the Ferguson Missouri riots, weakening the integrity of the nation’s electoral systems, opposing U.S. counterterrorism efforts and eroding 2nd Amendment protections. U.S. FUNDS WORKSHOPS IN INDIA TO PROMOTE TRANSGENDER EXTREMISM What can the Biden administration possible do next with your tax dollars? How about sending your money to “Pride/Rainbow groups” in India to support the rights of transgender people? Our Corruption Chronicles blog has the details [== Though years ago India passed a sweeping law giving transgender people rights—and prohibiting discrimination in education, employment, and healthcare—the Biden administration is spending American taxpayer dollars to counter stigma and prejudice against the transgender community in the south Asian nation with the world’s largest democracy. Uncle Sam will pay for workshops that will help employees and leadership at Indian companies create awareness about transgender persons and their rights. This includes setting up “Pride/Rainbow groups” within the corporations and inspiring them to cultivate a more inclusive work environment as well as develop active transgender employee recruitment plans. “These workshops will aim to help corporations and businesses to better understand the needs of the TG community and encourage them to adopt policies and carry out activities that foster a work environment that is safe, nurturing, accepting, and inclusive for members of the TG community,” according to the U.S. government grant announcement []. The document adds that “a longer-term outcome is that these corporations and businesses increase their hiring of members of the TG community and help their employees and the general public be more accepting.” The ultimate goal, according to the administration, is to “sensitize” the Indian corporations towards the rights of the LGTQI+ community and the transgender community specifically. This will cost U.S. taxpayers $50,000 and the money will flow through the State Department under public diplomacy programs. The U.S. estimates that there are more than five million transgender persons in India and roughly 3,000 of them live in Hyderabad, a capital city in country’s southern region. Companies there and in Chennai, on the eastern side in the Bay of Bengal, are the initiative’s targets. “For centuries, TG persons have played important roles in the Indian society,” according to the grant document. “However, that did not translate into equal treatment as citizens in modern India.” The U.S. does acknowledge India’s effort to improve transgender rights, but says it is not enough. “While recent laws have, to a small extent, provided more rights to the community, they continue to face social exclusion and discrimination because of their gender identity and orientation,” the State Department writes. “Unlike other members of the LGBTQI+ community, TG persons can often be identified by their appearance, making them easy targets for social and economic discrimination and exclusion.” The agency cites a 2017 study that shows 92% of India’s transgender population is unable to participate in formal economic activity, mostly fueled by social stigma and prejudice. The referenced study was completed two years before India passed the Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Bill [=], however. The law prohibits discrimination against transgender persons in all areas, including healthcare, education, employment, housing, and services. It also punishes those who abuse transgender people with jail terms of up to two years. Language in the measure makes it clear that the legislation specifically bans the type of treatment the U.S.-funded workshops plan to target. “No establishment shall discriminate against any transgender person in any matter relating to employment including, but not limited to, recruitment, promotion and other related issues,” the law, which was passed on July 11, 2019, states. Embedded in the bill is a “statement of objects and reasons” explaining that the transgender community is one of the most marginalized in the country because “they do not fit into the general categories of male or female.” As a result, the transgender rights bill explains, they face problems ranging from social exclusion to discrimination, lack of education facilities, unemployment, and lack of medical facilities. Transgender groups have also reported instances in which they were hired and “had to quit after some months due to the attitude of coworkers,” the 2019 law states. Until next week...
