# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**#1 Most Requested Item of 2022 – Finally
Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!**[**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-X00rKy_sgjzMS4eQ)[**> > Video: This mini solar generator powers devices and weighs less than a housecat**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ Recent events have taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN.** A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids.It's sad, but facts are facts. **Crisis mode has become the new normal.** And you see the need to protect yourself and your family.So let me be clear:One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out.Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout.All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question.That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS.**You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can...Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device...That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run.But if you want one, you better hurry...Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market.And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long.You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._9LjuYEQ)_"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere – very light!"__Craig W.
Police Officer
_Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more!You'll also be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets...**And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot.So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.[**You also get $243.90 worth of FREE Gifts today!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-aUdAY6zvBR4KnSBpAMEHQ)
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you:[**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._ddJm3LgSq1DSQ)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-REfw)**You'll Never Run Out of Juice** _"You can charge your phone 28 times and still have some juice left over. It has no shortage of power. It's very reliable and very good. It's the perfect addition to all of your other 4Patriots products." – Dan W._[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-Th4WjXZDLzUt5lJRQ)
---
P.O. name: Brent Bozell
subject: Free Speech is only worth . . . $80 Million?!
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013798:JtZNt2G5N:m:1:3331703221:3660C1ACE782FCF7FF4CEC551F5B7E92:r)
Peter,

What do some of the world's most powerful Big Tech oligarchs and nearly 30 rabidly pro-censorship organizations have in common?

They all share a **disdain for free speech** , and **they received a total of $80,233,084 from liberal billionaire George Soros** to fortify their election influence operations before Election Day Nov. 8.

My name is Brent Bozell, President and Founder of the Media Research Center (MRC). Our mission is to expose the leftwing propaganda in the media and hold them accountable for their actions.

That's why I want to connect with 300 new supporters to END this push for censorship.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

Now, MRC is exposing Big Tech censorship against conservatives. Our efforts helped lead to massive layoffs of these radical leftwing teams at the big tech companies.

[_**Can you join the grassroots movement to stop liberal billionaire Soros from stealing our 1st Amendment rights? Click here to send $25, $35, $50, or any amount of support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013798:JtZNt2G5N:m:1:3331703221:3660C1ACE782FCF7FF4CEC551F5B7E92:r)

Right before the midterm elections, Soros made a multiple-front push for increased censorship.
* The Soros-funded Leadership Conference on Civil and Human Rights (LCCHR) fired off an Oct. 13 open letter calling on Big Tech to take _**" immediate steps to curb the spread of voting disinformation in the midterms and future elections and to help prevent the undermining of our democracy." **_

* Another Soros-funded group, Global Witness, released an **_" investigation"_** piece whining that Facebook and TikTok weren't censoring enough before the November midterm elections.

* The Washington Post's pro-censorship zealots gave a platform to the Change The Terms Coalition, a group that warned of _**" violence"**_ if the Big Tech giants didn't censor so-called _**" disinformation"**_ leading up to the 2022 midterms.

Soros' reach is also global. That's why MRC's mission is so important right now - it takes a nationwide network of patriots to STOP this insane billionaire.

[_**Can you**_ _**click here**_ _**to join the fight today? **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013798:JtZNt2G5N:m:1:3331703221:3660C1ACE782FCF7FF4CEC551F5B7E92:r)

For Soros's latest censorship push in October, Soros targeted three tech heavyweights: Meta, Twitter and TikTok.

He gave over $32 MILLION to over 28 of the groups who signed on to be part of the Change The Terms Coalition between 2016 and 2020.

That coalition ran a "#FixTheFeed" Campaign, which called on _**" Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter and YouTube to stop amplifying the worst content on their platforms. **__**Hate. Disinformation. Calls for violence. Propaganda. " **_

Even the leftwing media is having trouble denying Soros' outsized influence in American politics.

But the MRC won't stop until our First Amendment rights are safe.

So can I count on you to join the fight, Peter? **Click below to donate. **
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013799:JtZNt2G5N:m:1:3331703221:3660C1ACE782FCF7FF4CEC551F5B7E92:r)

[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013801:JtZNt2G5N:m:1:3331703221:3660C1ACE782FCF7FF4CEC551F5B7E92:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013802:JtZNt2G5N:m:1:3331703221:3660C1ACE782FCF7FF4CEC551F5B7E92:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013803:JtZNt2G5N:m:1:3331703221:3660C1ACE782FCF7FF4CEC551F5B7E92:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013804:JtZNt2G5N:m:1:3331703221:3660C1ACE782FCF7FF4CEC551F5B7E92:r)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell

Peter, I won't sugarcoat it...

This Georgia runoff election is going to be an all-out _DAWG FIGHT_ , and **[Herschel Walker needs us every step of the way.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013315:6MoTt2GNL:m:1:3317145305:39467EA37B70DF75B3768AE083EFEF26:r)**

Early voting has already begun for the December 6 runoff election, with the fate of the nation hanging in the balance. **[So much is at stake, and Herschel needs to know that you are on his team and ready to FIGHT for America.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013316:6MoTt2GNL:m:1:3317145305:39467EA37B70DF75B3768AE083EFEF26:r)**

[** FIGHT FOR GEORGIA -> FIGHT FOR AMERICA **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013315:6MoTt2GNL:m:1:3317145305:39467EA37B70DF75B3768AE083EFEF26:r)
Peter, grassroots supporters like YOU are the backbone of the conservative movement. What you do right now will determine the future of our nation.

Will you sit back and allow the Democrats to push Biden's disastrous agenda and destroy the America we love? **[Or will you stand up and FIGHT to win Georgia, flip this Senate seat, and get America BACK on track?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013316:6MoTt2GNL:m:1:3317145305:39467EA37B70DF75B3768AE083EFEF26:r)**

It's going to take a LOT of resources to make sure Herschel can meet with as many Georgia voters as possible, **[which is why we're calling on YOU to step up and bolster his efforts. A small contribution from each person reading this email will add up quickly.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013316:6MoTt2GNL:m:1:3317145305:39467EA37B70DF75B3768AE083EFEF26:r)**

Whatever you give RIGHT NOW will help Team Herschel knock on more doors, make more phone calls, distribute more signs, and put new ads on the air. Every single dollar will be critical in helping Herschel win this race.

**[We're counting on you right now, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013316:6MoTt2GNL:m:1:3317145305:39467EA37B70DF75B3768AE083EFEF26:r)**

My very best,

Nikki Haley

subject: Yup, the military’s gone Woke!

body:
Just take a look at what they've turned our military into!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013347:Jg3uX2GuN:m:1:3253819041:386EE81076C0A05F1D8D1CBFB24B6EB6:r "Headline") Peter: Biden's Department of Defense just got caught lying and we have the proof. The DoD has been spending taxpayer dollars promoting Critical Race Theory and Gender Identity to our soldiers! Never mind the ongoing threats from China and Russia... the Pentagon's been more worried about telling white soldiers how evil and oppressive they are! This must stop immediately! We need real warriors, not WOKE warriors! **[Help me keep our Armed Forces focused on military readiness instead of CRT. Donate today and stop Biden's woke social experiment!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013347:Jg3uX2GuN:m:1:3253819041:386EE81076C0A05F1D8D1CBFB24B6EB6:r "Help me keep our Armed Forces focused on military readiness instead
of CRT. Donate $25, $50, or $100 today and stop Biden’s woke social experiment!")** Let me be blunt, Biden and the Left have declared WAR against our military and it's a disgrace! They don't want a battle-ready military; they want Woke warriors to promote their socialist propaganda! Just take a look at what they've turned our military into!
* A Biden Military leader tweeting that they're tired of "White folx."
* Tax dollars spent on transgender reassignment surgery.
* Cadets at our service academies are taught CRT.
* Even the Special Forces are required to come up with a Diversity and Inclusion Strategic Plan!

After spending over 40 years in the United States Marine Corps (Oorah), watching brave American men and women risk their lives for our great nation, I refuse to let Biden turn our military into an international laughingstock! **[Will you join me in the fight to keep our military ready to defend our nation? Chip in TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013347:Jg3uX2GuN:m:1:3253819041:386EE81076C0A05F1D8D1CBFB24B6EB6:r "Will you join me in the fight to keep our military ready to defend
our nation? Chip in $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013347:Jg3uX2GuN:m:1:3253819041:386EE81076C0A05F1D8D1CBFB24B6EB6:r "Headline")I'm not fighting this battle for me. I'm fighting it for the next generation of Americans. The oath I took as a Marine is something I take very seriously, and even though I'm no longer in uniform, those principles guide my every decision. That's why I'm 100% committed to stopping these Woke warriors from destroying our U.S. military. **[Chip in to fight against Biden, and every other Leftist hell-bent on destroying our military readiness.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013347:Jg3uX2GuN:m:1:3253819041:386EE81076C0A05F1D8D1CBFB24B6EB6:r "Chip in a $50 donation to fight against Biden, and every other
Leftist hell-bent on destroying our military readiness.")** The brave men and women in uniform deserve better. We're constantly facing serious threats from those who seek to do us harm, but our enemies will have no reason to fear us if our military prioritizes CRT over military readiness. It's time to fight back. It's time to equip our military with the right equipment and training, not funding for transgender surgeries and Woke politics! **[If you agree, then join the Bergman Brigade TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013347:Jg3uX2GuN:m:1:3253819041:386EE81076C0A05F1D8D1CBFB24B6EB6:r "If you agree, then join the Bergman Brigade TODAY!")** God Bless America,

Rep. Jack Bergman (MI-1)
Lt. General, U.S.M.C. (ret.) P.S. I don't care if our Service Members are white, black, or green. We should only care if they're willing to fight to defend our country. **[Donate so we can remove the Woke politics from our military ranks and leave it for the leftist politicians!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013347:Jg3uX2GuN:m:1:3253819041:386EE81076C0A05F1D8D1CBFB24B6EB6:r "Donate $50, $100, or any amount you can afford so we can remove
the Woke politics from our military ranks and leave it for the leftist politicians!")**
---
| **Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
---

name: Jim DeMint
subject: Not Another Think Tank
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The most important thing for conservatives to remember about elections is that they are a means, not an end. In Washington, both parties act like the whole point of politics is just having power. But the point of politics is using it.
For two years, the Left has abused its power to wreck our economy, our energy industry, our schools, and our public health agencies.
It's not enough now to just stop the Left from doing wrong. We have to do right.
That is what the Conservative Partnership Institute has been doing all along. We are not another PAC focused on one election or a think tank pushing one issue. We are focused on every conservative idea every day of the year.
CPI is the hub of the conservative movement's wheel, the American Embassy inside the Swamp. We are the leading incubator of new conservative organizations, trainer of conservative staff, convener of conservative representatives and senators, and support for conservative
communicators in Washington.
The Left has the media, the universities, corporate board rooms, and cultural elites. The Right has us.
Please join us in the fight to save America by making a tax-deductible contribution to CPI before the end of the year.
As Congress now looks toward 2023, conservatives are looking to CPI. We will be there to provide the guidance, the support, and the services the new Congress will need to rescue America from Joe Biden and the woke, socialist Left. Now the real work begins. Starting next
year, conservatives must launch the investigations, impeachments, and reforms we need to take our country back.
CPI will help conservatives in the House and Senate with the analysis, the message, the data, the strategy, and the spine to take on the Left and the DC Establishment.
Please help us give conservatives the best tools possible by making a tax-free donation to CPI today.
With your support, we will not only make 2023 the end of woke Left tyranny but a new beginning for American freedom.

Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Jim DeMintCPI Chairman

 

END OF THE YEAR
COUNTDOWN

body:

While the Radical Left continues to use race to divide and tear us apart, we know there's a better way forward that can unite our country and bring us together.

This debate is so critical to America’s future, and that is why every Conservative should read his new book.

name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Item To Hoard
body:
As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbcvan4vlrs53tuv4uch8rl3crsogus121ld4jeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c3h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ujhm1orgsdp76c9hcdqjcptgeqqjbdpl6mqr1dr1e4obcsb36eob9cj36lobcdpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0sjgcoq61ddk6upb6phmc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)
# **#1 Item to Hoard**
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zg17p5tk0s4l3e40hiu7ena5e3n8cqb3agssogog_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c3h2bs) According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkquo2qh8fmb3ed4f8l5prfkh0jpo4nmu4402cm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c3h2bs). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdglbde1q8rpc1mabdjaohj1hk525mssoed3jl2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c3h2bs) **These best-selling kits are back in stock...** and you'll get loaded up with [**FREE GIFTS**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zsfmbmdg5n5sbjsnqhmjvr8co00h0kdbesle77lo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c3h2bs) when you get yours today. It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal: [**You get $318 worth
of FREE gifts!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zrnukegsobne28iaskv99smvoca9i86ut5i55jq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c3h2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe 's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4i2nffbinv27vng0mu72lmvr0r31t7gbj683pg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c3h2bs)** Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. [**You 'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan - with no interest!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkctcrl62ns4dgs36pgcgp1luhrj9q6eh637u0go_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c3h2bs) On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zo0koe6kbgj8f7au76qrbjhq7b76kf64k6312qtg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c3h2bs) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. Second, if you open your 4Patriots food **anytime in the next 25 years** and find that despite following storage instructions your food has spoiled, you can return it and they will replace it with something of equal or greater value. That's how confident they are that this food will remain delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5ooaq5u8p1i7137qb6mq7ulllkirhdkd56cviqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c3h2bs)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9ebpc8u9rasqcqcanjlgd6d02uuf109s2sg88rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c3h2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you 'll feel right away**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhvhtjp9c4highmrvdbipk3q6ftqb4a0llbvmt0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c3h2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it 's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zul22dng0m3ircehpj7blgti3duj48m3fo91os5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c3h2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
**[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8uggbnr4aj0bk8ufce0vesup5undej9rkru0dgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c3h2bs)**

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zv683625njkjlme9a41usuff8uesi9ftvhimkkao_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c3h2bs).

Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Help teach more kids true American history
body:
You’ve probably noticed that children today aren’t getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were g
|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zt4fo7ivtge68ev69gqg0nnh2gc28dgrqdq32b0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj1cth2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

You've probably noticed that children today aren't getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were growing up.

We used to be taught to love our nation, cherish our history, and respect our fellow Americans. But all of that has changed.

In today's classroom, children are taught that America is fundamentally racist, that our history is one of oppression, and that we should focus on our differences instead of what unites us.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zh7vf8gjbog0k6412qbh06bvhoe6j4gmk3ksg998_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj1cth2bs)
__To make matters worse: the right of parents to choose how and where their kids receive their education remains out of reach for most American families.

And this is exactly why we created our Little Patriots program--to give parents, grandparents, teachers, and caregivers a free online resource they can use to teach children unbiased civics lessons, history, and American values, anywhere and anytime--[completely free of charge.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhn8v9njc5eh9stkrico6nc90ima42bfvqofm49g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj1cth2bs)

**And now we plan to do even more.**

To meet the growing demand for educational resources that teach children to love their country and its history, we're taking Little Patriots on the road to bring these educational resources to schools, churches, and community organizations!

But to help us fund this coast-to-coast effort, I need your help today.

We depend on the generous support of patriots like you to help us fund this program and share it with children and families across our great nation.

If you believe that American children deserve to receive the best education possible, [can I personally ask you to help me accomplish my goal of getting this first-of-its-kind curriculum to anyone who needs it?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze3o626buop2kvst70qs32d42srqusikn034ur0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj1cth2bs)

If you'd like to help me get Little Patriots to more American children, please click the link below to make your generous tax-deductible gift today:

[**https://secure.americancornerstone.org/little-patriots-tour-donate**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znc88gnv90hkn82vnpk7ubt51i8kgln9o3sq3nug_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj1cth2bs)

Thank you so much for supporting these efforts--[together we can help kids across the U.S. get the education they deserve.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9c1nhu9qfajntf1d21s0ak4h7rr6v3otc0cmj80_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj1cth2bs)

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdqhcj58r7dm6i19mtks4hhrbaple0ivigcnieog_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv6vv85mu0sttcv06n51c2v2qlqpvnb1k29b0gvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c5h2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2gttq2gma9aitf15tgc8623mej3am2huk5h3je8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c5h2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlom26609f2eeriii9lf9lqpld7tfbm9tqmmbs00_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c5h2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1aull9ohb5h0is14ft2u2s1b1gulq3h2k1a12g0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1hmaoj6c5h2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

###
---
| | [ CHECK OUT TIMELESS with Julie Hartman ](http://click1.srnemail.com/pcjvmlrrmgybggkrbyyshbdgwmbclwwgqlskwqyjhcmdmd_jqnmmttjtrjnwbmqssqrtss.html)
### _Saturday, December 3, 2022_
Check-out the first episode of Timeless with Julie Hartman, now available on the Salem Podcast Network. Subscribe today at ... Salem Podcast Network: https://salempodcastnetwork.com/podcasts/timeless-with-julie-hartman Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/timeless-with-julie-hartman/id1656808169 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/13IZPkFF5JfER4Eep55V8K YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@juliehartman Rumble: https://rumble.com/c/c-2172640 As an open-minded, 22-year-old graduate of Harvard, Julie became a conservative after discovering Dennis Prager's radio show. After reaching out to Dennis to express her appreciation for his work, a friendship was born that became a mentorship. Dennis then invited her as a guest on his radio show. The following summer, Julie appeared as a weekly on-air contributor to his nationally syndicated radio program. At the age of 21, Julie guest-hosted three-hour broadcasts for both The Dennis Prager Show and The Mike Gallagher Show, becoming the youngest person to solo substitute host on a national program. On "Timeless", Julie explores her views on life, politics, and current events. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/upqcnfzznjgsjjkzsggdhsmjvnspfvvjqfdkvqgwhpnmnc_jqnmmttjtrjnwbmqssqrtss.html)
---|---
| [ Football talk gets serious: our conversation with Coach Chan Gailey ](http://click1.srnemail.com/rgjlgvhhgskpssbhpkkqcpwsygptvyysrvqbyrknctgwvj_jqnmmttjtrjnwbmqssqrtss.html)
### _Friday, December 2, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I sit down with Chan Gailey to talk championships and playoffs. Get ready for the playoffs with great insights from Coach! [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/etqqbhvvbctfccwvfttkrfpcjbfzhjjcshkwjstyrzbphr_jqnmmttjtrjnwbmqssqrtss.html)
| [ The Warning of the Iron Curtain ](http://click1.srnemail.com/zbdfslggscbkccqgkbbtrkdcvskwlvvcmltqvmbprwsdlm_jqnmmttjtrjnwbmqssqrtss.html)
### _Wednesday, November 30, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I take an in depth look at the famous Iron Curtain speech by Winston Churchill. In a world that is dealing with war and tyranny this is a timely look back at these warnings to give us a picture of what we could be doing. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/krdpvsbbvzrjzzqbjrrgljfzwvjdswwzhsgqwhrmldvfsm_jqnmmttjtrjnwbmqssqrtss.html)

name: American Update
subject: Odd liquid = disaster for Tesla
body:
| Dear Reader, See the cup of clear liquid below ↓ ↓ ↓ ? Former Goldman Sachs executive Nomi Prins recently discovered... Five of the world’s richest men are betting **[the liquid inside this cup](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42519%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M2%2fEwBoHuhjxaVWD6cKgCg&sysid=1)** could wreck Elon Musk’s plans for Tesla’s future... and make one tiny company rich in the process. How rich? At stake is control of an emerging trend _Forbes_ reports will be worth $130 trillion. But get this... Right now, this tiny company trades for around $4. The opportunity is off the charts. Which is why one expert on _CNBC_ said, “You can follow the money... all the investors are smelling it.” So what’s so special about this clear liquid? And why are 5 billionaires -- Bill Gates, Jack Ma, Richard Branson, Michael Bloomberg, and Jeff Bezos -- all betting on a tiny $4 company behind it? Nomi answers that question in a quick 30-second demonstration. **[Click below to watch it...](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42510%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IhhM4%2bX7SLWJYeXcRErHhA&sysid=1)** [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42511%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7PyUooyI%2bUGAQl%2bankfbcQ&sysid=1) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Rogue Economics_
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7597%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZPWg6CDQ6ofDBerE%2bIME2A&sysid=1)
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77351%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kuHWp1blntVQ0zErKCx0gQ&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77352%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z%2fU2FlC6KKtl9vTXW1Y%2fqg&sysid=1) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77353%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=La%2fzWXLnt1Jz5noOXNs9QA&sysid=1)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77354%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fHxMgEwHg2WJkz3nPPtuQQ&sysid=1)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77365%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B2RlRAPAVA38mBoRsyat%2fQ&sysid=1)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | | | | | | Hi Patriot, I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election. Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots. Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union. Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit): Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy No Mass or Sunday worship service Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time Outrageously, there’s more. Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them. Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency). There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying. And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA. They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment! This can’t go on. I won’t allow it. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people. Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous. I can’t do it without you, Patriot. Thank you for doing whatever you can now. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship! Free the January 6 Protestors! ** Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy! At least one January 6 protestor has already died. And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit. 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation...
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjbgq2s41u4fbv55o221qamh8m3uth5bteehlcd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm0or4cjh2bs) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z654au708moamcbvopicojf7n45phijl0oetf97o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm0or4cjh2bs) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she's found is startling. ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9e5tbdju5di1ld3fh44emqsqvbup92tbb72vj38_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm0or4cjh2bs) She says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I've found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' the economy. Most Americans will be shocked when they see what happens next."** I had to know more, so I scheduled an interview for Nomi to go deeper into the details of this 'transformation.' She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it's too late. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ will play out – and what it means for your money.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhct8590ice3stl71bjitl68ickha6ul6mroko08_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm0or4cjh2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Distortion Report_
---

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Endorsement Alert
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
John Myers Former Goochland GOP Chair
---
| | | | | |
---
| Endorsement Alert! Former Goochland GOP Chair
John D. Myers
Endorses John McGuire
For State Senator for Virginia's 10th District

---
| | |
---|---
|
John,

I am proud to endorse your candidacy for the Virginia State Senate. I have followed your work in the House of Delegates and I feel that you are ready for a " promotion." This is based on your performance, which I feel is the main consideration when supporting someone for elected office. As a fellow U.S. Navy Veteran, I am certain that you will uphold our pledge of Honor, Courage and Commitment. Continue to put our citizens first, and you will do well.

John D. Myers,
Former GOP Chair
Goochland County, Virginia

Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
| I have enjoyed representing Goochland County in District 56 for the last five years, and it is a huge honor to receive the endorsement of fellow Navy veteran and former Goochland GOP Chair John Myers. John Myers served in the Navy as a member of the "[Fighting Seabees](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ryt2le1QtqqAIAqSuTRWJu1qO3VRKvFc2ok6D9pmmoeJIsgGtLG6jf7cEn4tZJqOSrQ2X5btJwQlvTfH4iiCJXgchhw-e4M2Df4gS12YvC2jqaOD_pxhq6YD1qbip3-Fz-tKq_0OvJMsW7YfybdBifrug9ZMCDHD&c=bmecen5sCXkiGdzWunFnABTsLU2eF23brOXmW0o3tutYO9uGsTB24w==&ch=-YT6OoVIxSoi-1qMZQrrF4u3wWvQH6JtO1JH6PIIf7nvwI_9H8VzXw==)" and he understands the importance of teamwork and the need for dependable leadership in the General Assembly. I am fired up, full of energy, and ready to continue fighting for you in State Senate District 10. This election, TBD, will most likely be in the Spring of 2023.
---
| | |
---|---
|
Senate District 10 Counties:

Hanover
Powhatan
Louisa
Fluvanna
Goochland
Buckingham
Appomattox
Amelia
Prince Edward
Cumberland
| Our country is hanging by a string. To win, it is vital that fellow Republicans put petty differences aside and unite. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause.
I would like to meet you and your friends. Please sign up now to be a delegate for the SD 10 convention, TBD, and please share with friends via email here: john@mcguireforvirginia.com Take care, please spread the word, and I look forward to seeing you around the district!

I have followed your work in the House of Delegates and I feel that you are ready for a " promotion." This is based on your performance, which I feel is the main consideration when supporting someone for elected office. As a fellow U.S. Navy Veteran, I am certain that you will uphold our pledge of Honor, Courage and Commitment. Continue to put our citizens first, and you will do well. John D. Myers, Former GOP Chair Goochland County, Virginia Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | I have enjoyed representing Goochland County in District 56 for the last five years, and it is a huge honor to receive the endorsement of fellow Navy veteran and former Goochland GOP Chair John Myers. John Myers served in the Navy as a member of the "==" and he understands the importance of teamwork and the need for dependable leadership in the General Assembly. I am fired up, full of energy, and ready to continue fighting for you in State Senate District 10. This election, TBD, will most likely be in the Spring of 2023. | | | ---|--- | Senate District 10 Counties: Hanover Powhatan Louisa Fluvanna Goochland Buckingham Appomattox Amelia Prince Edward Cumberland | Our country is hanging by a string. To win, it is vital that fellow Republicans put petty differences aside and unite. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. name: Brent Bozell
subject: Free Speech is only worth . . . $80 Million?!
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013405:Jxl0_2GsN:m:1:3253819041:D0633F54CF038AEBAA51746178702C06:r)
Peter,

What do some of the world's most powerful Big Tech oligarchs and nearly 30 rabidly pro-censorship organizations have in common?

They all share a **disdain for free speech** , and **they received a total of $80,233,084 from liberal billionaire George Soros** to fortify their election influence operations before Election Day Nov. 8.

My name is Brent Bozell, President and Founder of the Media Research Center (MRC). Our mission is to expose the leftwing propaganda in the media and hold them accountable for their actions.

That's why I want to connect with 300 new supporters to END this push for censorship.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

Now, MRC is exposing Big Tech censorship against conservatives. Our efforts helped lead to massive layoffs of these radical leftwing teams at the big tech companies.

[_**Can you join the grassroots movement to stop liberal billionaire Soros from stealing our 1st Amendment rights? Click here to send any amount of support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013405:Jxl0_2GsN:m:1:3253819041:D0633F54CF038AEBAA51746178702C06:r)

Right before the midterm elections, Soros made a multiple-front push for increased censorship.
* The Soros-funded Leadership Conference on Civil and Human Rights (LCCHR) fired off an Oct. 13 open letter calling on Big Tech to take _**" immediate steps to curb the spread of voting disinformation in the midterms and future elections and to help prevent the undermining of our democracy." **_

* Another Soros-funded group, Global Witness, released an **_" investigation"_** piece whining that Facebook and TikTok weren't censoring enough before the November midterm elections.

* The Washington Post's pro-censorship zealots gave a platform to the Change The Terms Coalition, a group that warned of _**" violence"**_ if the Big Tech giants didn't censor so-called _**" disinformation"**_ leading up to the 2022 midterms.

Soros' reach is also global. That's why MRC's mission is so important right now - it takes a nationwide network of patriots to STOP this insane billionaire.

[_**Can you**_ _**click here**_ _**to join the fight today? **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013405:Jxl0_2GsN:m:1:3253819041:D0633F54CF038AEBAA51746178702C06:r)

For Soros's latest censorship push in October, Soros targeted three tech heavyweights: Meta, Twitter and TikTok.

He gave over $32 MILLION to over 28 of the groups who signed on to be part of the Change The Terms Coalition between 2016 and 2020.

That coalition ran a "#FixTheFeed" Campaign, which called on _**" Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter and YouTube to stop amplifying the worst content on their platforms. **__**Hate. Disinformation. Calls for violence. Propaganda. " **_

Even the leftwing media is having trouble denying Soros' outsized influence in American politics.

But the MRC won't stop until our First Amendment rights are safe.

So can I count on you to join the fight, Peter? **Click below to donate. **
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013406:Jxl0_2GsN:m:1:3253819041:D0633F54CF038AEBAA51746178702C06:r)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Odd liquid = disaster for Tesla
body:
See the cup of clear liquid below ↓ ↓ ↓ ? Former Goldman Sachs executive Nomi Prins recently discovered...
| Dear Reader, See the cup of clear liquid below ↓ ↓ ↓ ? Former Goldman Sachs executive Nomi Prins recently discovered... Five of the world’s richest men are betting **[the liquid inside this cup](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq9s3c2p5ti4v163up275268sau6n9m7s9ch6698_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm4ob4c3h2bs)** could wreck Elon Musk’s plans for Tesla’s future... and make one tiny company rich in the process. How rich? At stake is control of an emerging trend _Forbes_ reports will be worth $130 trillion. But get this... Right now, this tiny company trades for around $4. The opportunity is off the charts. Which is why one expert on _CNBC_ said, "You can follow the money... all the investors are smelling it." So what’s so special about this clear liquid? And why are 5 billionaires -- Bill Gates, Jack Ma, Richard Branson, Michael Bloomberg, and Jeff Bezos -- all betting on a tiny $4 company behind it? Nomi answers that question in a quick 30-second demonstration. **[Click below to watch it...](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z01dklmgr79pl4fs7kppie9jcnjqe0quli4upg9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm4ob4c3h2bs)** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2hnlm9ukgash7e2j40fdf5c9qeb56rcfj9umcqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm4ob4c3h2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Rogue Economics_

name: American Briefing
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjg1mqk7tjd0d39ac88re2giqj4kv09sr5bi5us0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm4ob4c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcqr01paa0k17r9c0flh2i01dat3oc51ekks10jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm4ob4c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi14lqgloa18uiqe6tf24pu7m3ud4gpi8ejgnk7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm4ob4c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcqq51qk2negbecpsc2n7cv04sfqg214l9ebm1u8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm4ob4c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Sean Themea
subject: Campus bureaucrats are muzzling students
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013880:Jqk-x2GzN:m:1:3331703221:A3AE0221152EBA89D0A74DEAB2BF768D:r)

Peter,

Here's the truth: radical left wing bureaucrats are controlling colleges and universities.

They don't care about education, only turning these areas of learning into indoctrination camps.

That's why they are so afraid of free speech -- because it lets pro-liberty students fight indoctrination.

But I have great news! **We recently won our 100th free speech victory!**

My name is Sean Themea, the Chief of Staff at Young Americans for Liberty Foundation (YAL). I'm beyond proud of our dedicated student activists fighting against authoritarianism and wokeism on their campuses.

While we've made great strides in the fight for liberty on campus, 100 free speech victories is only the beginning.

**That 's why we're targeting a new batch of campuses this January. It is our next step toward DOUBLING our goal and reaching 200 free speech victories. I want to count you in as one of our 100 new supporters to help us get there.**

[_**Peter, can you help support the Student Rights Campaign and our efforts to organize on campuses across the country by sending your first gift today? Click here to donate any amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013880:Jqk-x2GzN:m:1:3331703221:A3AE0221152EBA89D0A74DEAB2BF768D:r)

**We 've made over 1.5 MILLION students freer on campus through our fight for Free Speech!**

And these victories don't just benefit current students but every student in the future who will attend these colleges and universities.

Over the last decade, we've stopped:
* **Free speech zones** -- that limit students' free speech to small zones on campus.
* **Permission policies** -- where students have to beg campus administration for the right to speak on campus.
* **Pre-approval policies** -- where students have to submit materials to be approved by campus admin.

The Student Rights Campaign is how we fight against tyrannical policies on campuses that limit students' natural rights and show clear abuse of administrative power.

[_**Support the Student Rights Campaign today >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013880:Jqk-x2GzN:m:1:3331703221:A3AE0221152EBA89D0A74DEAB2BF768D:r)

Here's how Young Americans for Liberty Foundation WINS on campus:

1. YAL students host an activism event on campus, or sometimes it's as simple as our students simply wanting to exercise their First Amendment rights.
2. **_Campus administrators approach students and tell them they violate the school's speech policy while shutting them down._**
3. YAL students record the interaction, asking the bureaucrats what rule they are violating, why that rule exists, and what happens if they do not comply.
4. YAL partners with organizations like Foundation for Individual Rights in Education (FIRE) and Alliance Defending Freedom (ADF) to bring a lawsuit against the institution.
5. **The school is cornered and either agrees to change the policy or is forced to through litigation.**

And we fight for more than just free speech -- our policy fights range from privacy violations in times of Covid tyranny to restoring the right to non-lethal self-defense on campus.

[_**Help us prepare for the next ten campuses we 're targeting in January with a gift of any amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013880:Jqk-x2GzN:m:1:3331703221:A3AE0221152EBA89D0A74DEAB2BF768D:r)

There's a cultural shift happening. The new generation wants liberty and free speech.

**That 's why YAL is the nation's largest, most active, and most effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campuses and in American politics. **

Please join this cultural shift and help me meet my goal of connecting with 100 new supporters. **Click below to send your gift today.**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013881:Jqk-x2GzN:m:1:3331703221:A3AE0221152EBA89D0A74DEAB2BF768D:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013882:Jqk-x2GzN:m:1:3331703221:A3AE0221152EBA89D0A74DEAB2BF768D:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013883:Jqk-x2GzN:m:1:3331703221:A3AE0221152EBA89D0A74DEAB2BF768D:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013884:Jqk-x2GzN:m:1:3331703221:A3AE0221152EBA89D0A74DEAB2BF768D:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013885:Jqk-x2GzN:m:1:3331703221:A3AE0221152EBA89D0A74DEAB2BF768D:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013886:Jqk-x2GzN:m:1:3331703221:A3AE0221152EBA89D0A74DEAB2BF768D:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013887:Jqk-x2GzN:m:1:3331703221:A3AE0221152EBA89D0A74DEAB2BF768D:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013888:Jqk-x2GzN:m:1:3331703221:A3AE0221152EBA89D0A74DEAB2BF768D:r)

For Liberty,

Sean Themea
Chief of Staff
Young Americans for Liberty Foundation

name: Barack Obama
subject: This fight isn’t over.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Voters in four states cast ballots with unconstitutional maps.
|
---

Voters sent a clear message during this midterm election by supporting candidates and ballot initiatives that will strengthen our democracy.

As the election unfolded, we saw voters in places like Colorado, Pennsylvania, North Carolina, Minnesota and Michigan vote with fairer maps than we’ve seen in decades. **This is the progress we’ve been working toward.**

But it wasn’t all good news. Voters in four states -- Alabama, Georgia, Louisiana, and Ohio -- voted with unconstitutional maps where politicians chose their voters instead of the other way around. That’s why this fight isn’t over.

**[If you care about building a strong and representative democracy, can I count on you to make a donation to All On The Line?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55473489/381809202/1568034884?refcode=20221203_AOTL_P_BHO_3_ActivesxOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NTUxNjkyLTBlNzMtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1ne75LASztPBpPywQ0qUN8j6eByID9_jy6SbZ0bNUBc=)**

Republicans tilted the scales in their favor by gerrymandering maps in 2011. **This time around, fair map advocates held far-right Republicans accountable when they tried to manipulate the redistricting process or pass gerrymandered maps.**

We can’t wait until the next census to pay attention to redistricting again. Republicans are already trying to make it harder for voters to pass ballot initiatives -- because they saw what happened in Michigan when voters reformed the redistricting process. And they know it can happen again.

To everyone who attended hearings, advocated for their communities, and cast a ballot this fall -- thank you for being guardians of our democracy.

Let’s start building the next chapter.

Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. name: Reverend Raphael Warnock
subject: It's an honor to have President Obama by my side in this pivotal moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
**Friend,****this week, President Obama came to Georgia****to help rally support for my campaign.** It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55474497/381813309/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2279-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzdkNGRjOC0xMjczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yq9mmwR4UCoxoaQqqSjtZ7DGgnEytwbh7ZojO0si1Hk=)
If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: **In 3 days, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue.**
But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than **$58 MILLION** to help Walker take the lead in these final days.
They won’t hold back, and neither can we. That’s why I urgently need your support to help hit our critical fundraising goal before midnight tonight.
**Friend, I’m asking:[Will you please split $5 – or whatever you can afford – between me and Jacky Rosen so we can win in Georgia and expand our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55474498/381813310/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2279-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzdkNGRjOC0xMjczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yq9mmwR4UCoxoaQqqSjtZ7DGgnEytwbh7ZojO0si1Hk=)**
Thank you so much for all you do, friend.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=PpXTI58zC7wOyAW6kleNb8P0sjdmWgy4VNaGaU6xSof4VLcTTIV%2Bqb4zVN6eOFmdzYM9rv3Iu45autZ0CBUzZ2oyzfcn7Ak%2BaEg8dC3LW0MTF3BXQMDK9OJcMKJ2n8mRLR1saO8erjIdkyVIbzSH1oB6eHBXJXk47Xfhqj9XUvaJhfn67EWyJLFHOF0crvPkpR3K8WEao9uv9eRxcr3SeE9uHHbcbcnRmblzsII1mXOee6pGDwhFU7O6QaWblIifavLC%2BOTHhWJPukwexKZhg1Q6MpselUipBKS%2F8%2F6Ut2cSB%2B2HOw9mFQ%2FI1osf8T3FhmqmAYmcCvpNuG%2FAzksEgQpW4U1vsB02bloQARJ4A%2Fu9ZEGDayjrx8Xj0FpQ0zAbTqxw4DfOSPkw%2Blue1ePHhrJGwlPf5OsoI8%2B%2Bjyuvf2E%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Just in time for Christmas
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas!
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmmfk69bnlpbt9rntqp1srdg2o6ls0dvoqk0s1fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm6o32cph2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvnrr1q0rou449g4b58bpoas4g22ra7jlqn0gtug_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm6o32cph2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0nlapj6105nbgsl5g8igcghlbj49p95v6bg9pa8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm6o32cph2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ubj0pr6og49es6o51huq04b91iu3qt3021lmpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm6o32cph2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn6ir2v75b3tdkhk5k7lb23amsdrmfdknn8iiv4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm6o32cph2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeo3rb90bq2ssgvcolqk0ocrtet7q07oejl04lcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm6o32cph2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z48t1194en55g7a296929ph9k4opk7g1nof9m1vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm6o32cph2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmos963et42p4v99kfun1198kvkpbqqe5n6m49k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm6o32cph2bs)
---
| | [Get my book ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmt5ohoi7c5b53avnto3eqn022v0qgo835doj27o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1jm6o32cph2bs)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
