Thank you, GOP Headquarters ** | Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st Street SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A new conservative movement
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas! [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6442%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2b5gwuTWgUprhhJCGP5XDGw&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95879%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yFAIxjSW1vmQrsQCNRwGpA&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95879%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yFAIxjSW1vmQrsQCNRwGpA&sysid=1)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95870%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f09KGpNbWK7I07meygGhjA&sysid=1)
---
[Get my book](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95871%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f3O%2fNKF4je%2bzjxi1h%2fjnjQ&sysid=1)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95872%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=opT4VibF1Pqqc4%2fAH%2bO1eQ&sysid=1) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95873%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q1L%2fK3EZYsE8WjFEXFfZvQ&sysid=1)
---
[Get my book](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95871%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f3O%2fNKF4je%2bzjxi1h%2fjnjQ&sysid=1)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95874%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gpzkukj2gppl2jdy4JmtMA&sysid=1)
---
| | [Get my book ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95885%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3Q3jBhS3WC2w99e%2bRXpdTA&sysid=1)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0112%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=m4LMk0tsjNOZNxLw6oz35w&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42513%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mg26lCysVDv%2bWM0vD5E0PA&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42514%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c9Qa%2f21ktyHCLVYKa47XNg&sysid=1)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42525%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iKjs204SXSBLvspKZhRv3A&sysid=1) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42526%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZbG%2bGEY%2bRQFqpUULYeMo7A&sysid=1)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42527%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a5jw3xCWZ4u69fXE1KhvzQ&sysid=1)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Peter, this is Ambassador Nikki Haley. Herschel Walker is the pride of Georgia and the last Republican candidate standing in 2022. If we want to keep Georgia red, we need to put everything we have into getting out the vote for Herschel.

Chuck Schumer is rallying liberal support from every corner of the country for Herschel's liberal opponent. Conservatives need to rally that same support and then some if we're going to have a shot.

Are you ready to take back the momentum? Well, it all comes down to Herschel. And he desperately needs your support to overcome what is shaping up to the fiercest battle of the 2022 cycle. I'm putting all my chips in for Herschel. Will you?

body:
---
| | | | | | |

|
Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I introduced the CBP Crisis Hardship and Incentive Pay Act to compensate Border Patrol agents for all of the hard work they put in on the front lines every single day--and as a start to fixing the CBP morale and retention problem. I also called out the Biden Administration for their gutless reaction to the Chinese Communist Party's brutal crackdown on the protestors fighting back against extreme COVID lockdowns.
As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your campaign brief:
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| MORALE AT OUR SOUTHERN BORDER
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p0UTUbebL3a7BpNmYfUO0m1dmaQjUzcclHVCaieiEoJFzpgALO0G-89wTHdpRQm6yCRwoqoEkMb84zN8xAGt3F2Hw_BGU2mdX-ADSGSfo0Yp5ZGFko0IdROs1xqFfbooPV0ALGBeTpWsxlRzjNRHvGjeNDPWr_yrsQKeVHv5Vnh2lvjEK3uWNihhBIThtLjwDAfV9Pw3wOo=&c=vEEH1sZM65lbCT-6oZEor207FhtDy_LHa387WscEE1v0mh7cOfWhKw==&ch=y4853J7lMw4jaSjPH-I8zsI8DRF5TMWSEWWLMXT1b9Qsu1i5yjZ7eQ==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p0UTUbebL3a7BpNmYfUO0m1dmaQjUzcclHVCaieiEoJFzpgALO0G-89wTHdpRQm6yCRwoqoEkMb84zN8xAGt3F2Hw_BGU2mdX-ADSGSfo0Yp5ZGFko0IdROs1xqFfbooPV0ALGBeTpWsxlRzjNRHvGjeNDPWr_yrsQKeVHv5Vnh2lvjEK3uWNihhBIThtLjwDAfV9Pw3wOo=&c=vEEH1sZM65lbCT-6oZEor207FhtDy_LHa387WscEE1v0mh7cOfWhKw==&ch=y4853J7lMw4jaSjPH-I8zsI8DRF5TMWSEWWLMXT1b9Qsu1i5yjZ7eQ==)
---
| |
---
| Our CBP law enforcement officers have borne the brunt of the Biden-Harris-Mayorkas border crisis. Everyday they face off against cartel terrorists, deal with thousands of migrant crossings, and serve an administration that is ambivalent about the crisis of their own making. Consequently, we have a serious morale and retention problem among our CBP officers. I have [a new bill](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p0UTUbebL3a7BpNmYfUO0m1dmaQjUzcclHVCaieiEoJFzpgALO0G-89wTHdpRQm682uxTg_A4f2RbRLkF6DdiBrHimJ68pbVIG8l_AHEiW1vPSh3cT1kwBwHPpKFxLmA1lkqqNghckaATlWtzmNtAYTvTtNztaj1NHlq9Wpq048_BQa1d17BRme9TzDTSeHmjRG7xi8zak89YClCAvTaY5R0bK5XK02AUYCmAFKIvI6pbMX6aW0Y8epA2Xcm1qabkC-4ag4p7hXBelLbeI2Uzam7cILJvhn6zSeFfTPvnz3-fPCzR0XOTbe3o4MoK3_SWzMU6gfAXAEuVsOATvnNFQ==&c=vEEH1sZM65lbCT-6oZEor207FhtDy_LHa387WscEE1v0mh7cOfWhKw==&ch=y4853J7lMw4jaSjPH-I8zsI8DRF5TMWSEWWLMXT1b9Qsu1i5yjZ7eQ==) to address that.
The CBP Crisis Hardship and Incentive Pay Act would introduce a special pay incentive for CBP officers, with a maximum of $250 per pay period. They would also qualify for hazard payments for days they are hospitalized for injuries sustained due to the threat of armed cartels for up to three months after the fact.
Soldiers on deployment receive incentive pay for the dangers and hardships they face. But, by the grace of God, they always come back home after a certain period. CBP officers don't get to leave and come back; they are there day in and day out, year after year. This bill doesn't solve the border crisis, but it goes a long way to help us retain the men and women who risk their lives everyday for America's sovereignty and security.

| Freedom is a natural state. Humans yearn for freedom--as we're seeing across the globe in China, Iran, and Cuba--among others. They don't need much from the US. Just moral support, and recognition for their righteous cause of freedom. But Biden stays silent, of course.
Yesterday, WH official John Kirby was asked about the President's reaction to the [protestors in China](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p0UTUbebL3a7BpNmYfUO0m1dmaQjUzcclHVCaieiEoJFzpgALO0G-89wTHdpRQm6LjARxQWX_ehl1Oy64Vn4Ea_Z8rhEwpNrxSCI43wQtG7xqqj27BhedG54fuZiW0mOiCdTPpm8vyT7o41VG74p_OUYUoyRe2uru2Kf03yJ1LtDK4iykFZugzf6vG231VPWNm9TEeV2hv8=&c=vEEH1sZM65lbCT-6oZEor207FhtDy_LHa387WscEE1v0mh7cOfWhKw==&ch=y4853J7lMw4jaSjPH-I8zsI8DRF5TMWSEWWLMXT1b9Qsu1i5yjZ7eQ==) chanting "freedom!" His response? We're "not going to speak for protestors."
Interesting. They had no problem endorsing BLM protests, right?
It doesn't stop there. [Iranian citizens are standing up](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p0UTUbebL3a7BpNmYfUO0m1dmaQjUzcclHVCaieiEoJFzpgALO0G-89wTHdpRQm6QgjZ9RC6qOn_ehyUNMJ34a4TEd9DeaWLpm25CXmdxydcNslQUqyNP0b6vc9gP6DB3Bi8fRWeL4q3c5VZZXzt9ksRHS_FSRBSZyPVqvw_Qq9rkTT6uSQghA0Gn4MnV1J-&c=vEEH1sZM65lbCT-6oZEor207FhtDy_LHa387WscEE1v0mh7cOfWhKw==&ch=y4853J7lMw4jaSjPH-I8zsI8DRF5TMWSEWWLMXT1b9Qsu1i5yjZ7eQ==) to the regime, too. Women are removing and burning their hijabs. Iran's soccer team refused to sing their national anthem at the World Cup. [In Cuba](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p0UTUbebL3a7BpNmYfUO0m1dmaQjUzcclHVCaieiEoJFzpgALO0G-89wTHdpRQm6vB3zSMQohzbM7PWy4fD0agS_fBtVPDSKkFVLLGR2Ywmpa70krfxkLfPnmZHnpR0UIV3pnMrFb8LCLaeLK7-s_N2NxvjbdLaCrJp6CirGezhy3fQ_Nh-nrWGqjqAD4cR5-VUnHLz-abJ3j59MhsoE_DSpWMfhmzkw7nrz9wH5yhO56u5P8WYe2g==&c=vEEH1sZM65lbCT-6oZEor207FhtDy_LHa387WscEE1v0mh7cOfWhKw==&ch=y4853J7lMw4jaSjPH-I8zsI8DRF5TMWSEWWLMXT1b9Qsu1i5yjZ7eQ==), citizens took to the streets to protest the lack of food, electricity and basic medicines. They're also demanding the release of political prisoners--those jailed for criticizing the regime.
In all of these scenarios, the Biden Administration is nowhere to be found in giving a full-hearted message of support on behalf of the freest nation in the history of mankind. Is it ignorance? A lack of caring? Gutlessness? Maybe a mix of all three.
America is a beacon of light for freedom fighters around the world. We should be standing hand-in-hand with those protesting oppressive regimes. This isn't rocket science. Let's once again be that shining city on a hill that Reagan talked about.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a576cb9917942289bce5446d8e3b9a1&_e=2VqtUQdN1TUcR4Q5fYzWd9gnfUUM5OOnGbGbhcHy-pCf8meEXfjHDmT32VE70KVeJEx9dgAs8v-A0o8OUX7qSNSIytumXMETv9j4KUaH2iKKJzGJ3f1yDRzJwlBwMeYDNrO8KODwRqs3byW1z8uIg3QZhpKLY_7U_j2e3nx2VcML9d7ox10CfFXsGZLH9rkwKPw6NbMoQb4mJM11KPiQMl3cktlkLDglFmLjgG_7Cl7acUtoAV1M4V6c5g3n809huwsdWsw-3Geg90svx3zB8gdIdMsC8CRtjHza3e5OBP437JxFnlQwkLF7HjcvKs1euHaJ_IFmZUPOMwaOHUmnOZtB7B4Z3YEW87_Ke1MBE_G_QZ59z3_LPlflhpRBrZ7YwqU2slg09-N4lor0TzCop6_EsBI3sT18vEBsXjySgJc%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a576cb9917942289bce5446d8e3b9a1&_e=2VqtUQdN1TUcR4Q5fYzWd9gnfUUM5OOnGbGbhcHy-pCf8meEXfjHDmT32VE70KVeJEx9dgAs8v-A0o8OUX7qSNSIytumXMETv9j4KUaH2iKKJzGJ3f1yDRzJwlBwMeYDNrO8KODwRqs3byW1z8uIg3QZhpKLY_7U_j2e3nx2VcML9d7ox10CfFXsGZLH9rkwKPw6NbMoQb4mJM11KPiQMl3cktlkLDglFmLjgG_7Cl7acUtoAV1M4V6c5g3n809hB5_7M_BnAVg8fE7o0K4jWLC7zuqaRo0v0u3kc1WYhfAOIhuJjbCxUY_8dT7xlZ4Np2ySOlHUiAabPoh3p836q1h2OMtuz6EBGvLoBYAPTc1weAj12cqT5q7rrcjmOBsv7qDltfMIF36252DvuRDHxeVfTpL7e8zxj3L7SKbu-Bo%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a576cb9917942289bce5446d8e3b9a1&_e=2VqtUQdN1TUcR4Q5fYzWd9gnfUUM5OOnGbGbhcHy-pCf8meEXfjHDmT32VE70KVeJEx9dgAs8v-A0o8OUX7qSNSIytumXMETv9j4KUaH2iKKJzGJ3f1yDRzJwlBwMeYDNrO8KODwRqs3byW1z8uIg3QZhpKLY_7U_j2e3nx2VcML9d7ox10CfFXsGZLH9rkwKPw6NbMoQb4mJM11KPiQMl3cktlkLDglFmLjgG_7Cl7acUtoAV1M4V6c5g3n809hRmA3kRtahA1YBsANXn01B6GsyHByYpYfr7N1ab3uCB30ulk0_wLDMhYaivWbfGnACYYImNCM_-H4i2PMfSqz9XNIkJXeHq1ufogKEKy3DK0v6ebGR34_TrxpkIxrwHKG8twEV4Aj-Y0tdBJwrsakss3Wp1lanP_lBsy_3RLOfZc%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Odd liquid = disaster for Tesla
body:
| Dear Reader, See the cup of clear liquid below ↓ ↓ ↓ ? Former Goldman Sachs executive Nomi Prins recently discovered... Five of the world's richest men are betting **[the liquid inside this cup](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d263dee3289f4cc39efc82dcf373e474&_e=yE4nz21_rVsEGrpQloMOZ8PZaoWDfDFKSugD52M_aFOPyx-50Eu3HQ3lSTQtwT8EObTEesN7oa3hoSlpPaZf8WayZBhKZH16qYioMcKmQnamkyGfioWSV-4d3xRJx9NvyVuFufJwGPuCaT8-_MYRQCQfbDN9y9bxl6Lq7gsKP0Gkp8Px4wLHkx67i6q0w5CZmwwvSHfMhzTrq6r0Oje37lZYvwzvrrZ-hHbbITvJdPPaGlF5eGhWGfibPohPTMDt)** could wreck Elon Musk's plans for Tesla's future... and make one tiny company rich in the process. How rich? At stake is control of an emerging trend _Forbes_ reports will be worth $130 trillion. But get this... Right now, this tiny company trades for around $4. The opportunity is off the charts. Which is why one expert on _CNBC_ said, "You can follow the money... all the investors are smelling it." So what's so special about this clear liquid? And why are 5 billionaires -- Bill Gates, Jack Ma, Richard Branson, Michael Bloomberg, and Jeff Bezos -- all betting on a tiny $4 company behind it? Nomi answers that question in a quick 30-second demonstration. **[Click below to watch it...](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d263dee3289f4cc39efc82dcf373e474&_e=yE4nz21_rVsEGrpQloMOZ8PZaoWDfDFKSugD52M_aFOPyx-50Eu3HQ3lSTQtwT8EObTEesN7oa3hoSlpPaZf8WayZBhKZH16qYioMcKmQnZDTvRKJ83GXjUQY52z1_OrjDGCEFA5nz_bPjfdcu1cJHF1Jgkg0kbufur47HawzaKHo2Uu2Jins5rs-lyLweu9hTHKZqqqOPCKexSR2BicENpYdQA459VYZ9ZeGgtMgGlVBYyJn1OGDK2hXH8mVeWF)** [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d263dee3289f4cc39efc82dcf373e474&_e=yE4nz21_rVsEGrpQloMOZ8PZaoWDfDFKSugD52M_aFOPyx-50Eu3HQ3lSTQtwT8EObTEesN7oa3hoSlpPaZf8WayZBhKZH16qYioMcKmQnZjvw0UbDq5RE8gIw8jB-eM3rPq8-08qVR1Q95ItXjPmEGmJvUlohQlVR_BLNxLVmNMnP2sH2j2CcKMHUDujJq214gJ62hKK3A9py54jovn0-HW8BpmlG3TdrlQ0b934PmbkE53BpW9jz4VBwVOVGn_) Regards, Maria Bonaventura

body:

| |

| | |
This isn't the time to give up.

**After holding the Senate, the Democrats believe they have a mandate to continue pursuing their radical agenda.**

That means they will try to eliminate the filibuster and pack our courts with far-left judges. _Now isn't the time for complacency._

If we are going to stop the Democrats from degrading our institutions, **we _MUST_ keep up the fight!**

**That starts with reaching this critical End-of-Month Goal.**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5c1a18d7529545198209a361f9c3d68c&_e=mXNb4q4ArL9QWFXZATMqreutk7H863hoXoh5GYsJ08d4O40ZIwPd40rRj1b5LpjwWnL08qG23eZhWRK9phHsbvXa4GslOT7sTT_HutxkW3kyvQEQC9r99sQQvxIjZan0jKgyo8b2GvCslPaqZEmLg0-xijvbPD4l_jgNymWjMCo5T-crz3VfwkGsN-cNHYO1DFKrV-epWQ0fp3-GDQqbmM_rSGk7JbFPLre0baWocn5C-Rhzj-sHDwRkXHsxIR1N) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5c1a18d7529545198209a361f9c3d68c&_e=mXNb4q4ArL9QWFXZATMqreutk7H863hoXoh5GYsJ08d4O40ZIwPd40rRj1b5LpjwWnL08qG23eZhWRK9phHsbvXa4GslOT7sTT_HutxkW3k5ZYSFGI0NkeOAf1HcKnSiG8Rp0ws0DgsfhLckwgwEMLWwHXHKDjaNTVZs91_zWgKEgar_bbrsfYnvQ3N8DOc83dTrW1r5rWK9gLKLWFwIR1kRaRqY7Kt4PBubZRdtZUkbOmM1xFNetSs8wVgDsE2n) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she's found is startling. ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5c1a18d7529545198209a361f9c3d68c&_e=mXNb4q4ArL9QWFXZATMqreutk7H863hoXoh5GYsJ08d4O40ZIwPd40rRj1b5LpjwWnL08qG23eZhWRK9phHsbvXa4GslOT7sTT_HutxkW3lPqZEJkp1FgcMKPjWQQv7TYuH5dJdzAjnuNGABTqOy2YhkFoeiVaCXTUwjAx8xDSziC00fK-RBSnnem-c9reryi5gbbZ2SvdwK6v_DXt9yTTgulPj3hDFam-66Y0qOu-WVjAv11mYnpTM7EBJqeFR8) She says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I've found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' the economy. Most Americans will be shocked when they see what happens next."** I had to know more, so I scheduled an interview for Nomi to go deeper into the details of this 'transformation.' She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it's too late. [Go here to see how this 'transformation' will play out - and what it means for your money. ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5c1a18d7529545198209a361f9c3d68c&_e=mXNb4q4ArL9QWFXZATMqreutk7H863hoXoh5GYsJ08d4O40ZIwPd40rRj1b5LpjwWnL08qG23eZhWRK9phHsbvXa4GslOT7sTT_HutxkW3kmluBRTdYf2yXatf5P_WqddPouakynKcMITPLsP61NSs4-DsFHwDLEoxGrzRUHrCMCeZ9zVafgZaYzlh9__be5eZ4BlfSrxqeSTA3ec74q8wRBnI55fHFi3o1iGU2dkWTD2YMJZXrxRqVMsTuCtRwb) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Distortion Report_

Our critical Georgia runoff election is on Tuesday.

Peter, our critical Georgia runoff election is on Tuesday.
With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking: ****[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Letitia James to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55484381/381852387/-819377630?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk932-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDAxYTMzYS0yNDczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OIyuTz9-FvduTFA52EVl1cNcDtaf0SfTe3sZhGgJzu4=)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m on the road and need your help
body:
You’ve probably noticed that children today aren’t getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were g
|
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr5seco2i2nue1do64b658iua75nprn373k60550_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1gecoj6clh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

You've probably noticed that children today aren't getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were growing up.

We used to be taught to love our nation, cherish our history, and respect our fellow Americans. But all of that has changed.

In today's classroom, children are taught that America is fundamentally racist, that our history is one of oppression, and that we should focus on our differences instead of what unites us.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zug9btgi6rectt5d84klr86r6704uqrj2vs19u0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1gecoj6clh2bs)
__To make matters worse: the right of parents to choose how and where their kids receive their education remains out of reach for most American families.

And this is exactly why we created our Little Patriots program--to give parents, grandparents, teachers, and caregivers a free online resource they can use to teach children unbiased civics lessons, history, and American values, anywhere and anytime--[completely free of charge.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcut06c0mttjfo1oijog0b73gakus2jeor58q2r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1gecoj6clh2bs)

**And now we plan to do even more.**

To meet the growing demand for educational resources that teach children to love their country and its history, we're taking Little Patriots on the road to bring these educational resources to schools, churches, and community organizations!

But to help us fund this coast-to-coast effort, I need your help today.

We depend on the generous support of patriots like you to help us fund this program and share it with children and families across our great nation.

If you believe that American children deserve to receive the best education possible, [can I personally ask you to help me accomplish my goal of getting this first-of-its-kind curriculum to anyone who needs it?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zji4u3cle88uvb7anas4lm82t2ge6f5bjic0eb3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1gecoj6clh2bs)

If you'd like to help me get Little Patriots to more American children, please click the link below to make your generous tax-deductible gift today:

[**https://secure.americancornerstone.org/little-patriots-tour-donate**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1qpdr42t1rin7cuk7nratao52s4las23l2i3n68_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1gecoj6clh2bs)

Thank you so much for supporting these efforts--[together we can help kids across the U.S. get the education they deserve.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd7jsdro793tl158mpmb965a98649mkh7agg0c38_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1gecoj6clh2bs)

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zphrugoome8c2a5ucof6pqenle5pdmmj8depgd00_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1gecoj6cph2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjatrlcg39a1sb9unm3f1rr3hj487bsu4kiag680_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1gecoj6cph2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1shursqomjecavq5a3bu6qfdcced5kn95pp6j3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1gecoj6cph2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhvbdkkclchmslrqnjlmrs3oou92tcho5pri8uug_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1gecoj6cph2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfff1qqj8sp36q9h3m3qsgtkdcrn32fnbj52dg68_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1gecoj6cph2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0m8qkfvo9jtva10k10bro2m4ru516oajvrt280g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1gecoj6cph2bs)

Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots. Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union. Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit): Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy No Mass or Sunday worship service Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time Outrageously, there’s more. Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them. Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency). There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying. And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA. They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment! This can’t go on. I won’t allow it. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people. Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous. I can’t do it without you, Patriot. Thank you for doing whatever you can now. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship! Free the January 6 Protestors! ** Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy! At least one January 6 protestor has already died. And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit. clean_body: Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority. Peter – I'm fired up! Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority. But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls. That's why we set an ambitious $2 million end-of-month fundraising goal—so we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win. But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = I'm deeply appreciative of you, Peter – today and every day. Let's go win this thing! – Rev. Raphael Warnock Help Raphael Warnock and Bob Casey defend the Democratic Senate majority. Split a donation to their campaigns today. name: Marco Rubio
subject: We’re out of time, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I know I've reached out a lot these last few months. I know I've told you again and again how important the Georgia race is. And I know you know what's at stake if we lose. But now July, August, September, October and November are gone. The last End of Month deadline this long cycle has passed.
**Herschel Walker is 3 days away from Election Day and we are out of time.**
Herschel's been outraised every quarter, outspent every month and with Election Day so close my team and I have decided to launch an **[EMERGENCY ELECTION FUND WITH 2X MATCHING](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013943:J-KMq2GrN:m:1:3331703221:7D5E007C9D2E2A638B9E7958379A3BD0:r "EMERGENCY ELECTION FUND WITH 2X MATCHING")** and we're looking to raise $500K before December 6th to try and Save Georgia!

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013943:J-KMq2GrN:m:1:3331703221:7D5E007C9D2E2A638B9E7958379A3BD0:r "Timer to Midnight 12/2")
---

HELP HERSCHEL")
---
Your support will go directly towards restoring the American Dream and getting Herschel across the finish line in these final days. **I need the people who care about the American Dream to step up now because we are officially out of time and we need your help RIGHT NOW.**
---
| | | [RUSH IN A 2X MATCH DONATION >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013943:J-KMq2GrN:m:1:3331703221:7D5E007C9D2E2A638B9E7958379A3BD0:r "RUSH IN A
2X MATCH DONATION >>>")
---
**[Please know I wouldn't be doing this if the situation wasn't dire. I need you now more than ever. Please step up now so Herschel has the resources he needs to keep defending the American Dream.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013943:J-KMq2GrN:m:1:3331703221:7D5E007C9D2E2A638B9E7958379A3BD0:r "Please know I
wouldn’t be doing this if the situation wasn’t dire. I need you now more than ever. Please step up now so Herschel has the resources he
needs to keep defending the American Dream.")**

Thank you,
Marco
---
| | |

* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013944:J-KMq2GrN:m:1:3331703221:7D5E007C9D2E2A638B9E7958379A3BD0:r "https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/american-dream-footer/?recurring=true")

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013944:J-KMq2GrN:m:1:3331703221:7D5E007C9D2E2A638B9E7958379A3BD0:r "Join my fight to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013944:J-KMq2GrN:m:1:3331703221:7D5E007C9D2E2A638B9E7958379A3BD0:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN
DREAM")
---

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013945:J-KMq2GrN:m:1:3331703221:7D5E007C9D2E2A638B9E7958379A3BD0:r "Stop the Dems Footer")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013945:J-KMq2GrN:m:1:3331703221:7D5E007C9D2E2A638B9E7958379A3BD0:r "If you’re

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: If 600 more Democratic voters had made it to the polls in Lauren Boebert’s district, she’d be retiring from her career as a national embarrassment to a quieter life of embarrassing only herself. It’s bad enough to lose a House seat in Colorado on a margin like that. It would be worse to lose Sen. Raphael Warnock’s seat in Georgia by just a few hundred votes and wonder if we could have done more.
body:
3 days to go
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9869aabe-f5e9-4a73-be82-3d4d8a54d736/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_$5. $10. $25. These are the kinds of donations that could make the difference between a Senator Raphael Warnock and a Senator Herschel Walker._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb098638-f249-446d-a4d9-36f62cec5b84/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_This November, national embarrassment, Lauren Boebert, held onto her seat in the House of Representatives by a mere 554 votes. If 600 more Democratic voters had made it to the polls in her district, she could have retired to being only a personal embarrassment._** **_Our great ally, Senator Catherine Cortez Masto, also held her seat, winning the entire state of Nevada by only 9,007 votes._** **_In 2020, the GOP won a U.S. House seat in Iowa by only 6 votes. Yes, you read that right._** **_Georgia, according to Democracy Docket, is the second most expensive state to vote in. It costs .98 cents for each person to vote. This is in a close swing state that President Biden won in 2020 by only 12,670 votes--out of just under 500,000 votes cast.__ _** **_It's simple. $5 gets us 5 votes to the polls in this razor-thin swing state. $10 can get 10 votes. And so on. This is it, our last election this cycle. It is so important to again reject Trump, McConnell, gain momentum and add a vote on each Senate committee so we get crucial bills on women's rights, climate, gay rights, gun safety and so much more onto the Senate floor._ **
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Get out the vote in Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d51d35d-f19c-4a26-aa96-e00cdbd45220/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_This decisive runoff election will take place in three days. Can we, the Blue Amp Action community, once again show our strength and be a difference maker?_** [**_Can you give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to get Georgia Democrats to the polls to strengthen The Peach State and America?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td4ef7de2-55cb-4c8b-83bc-c994d2864603/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
**We're. So. Close. Thank you all, once again, for your determination to protect democracy.**
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Re-elect Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a29aa72-cc91-42df-b226-c2955bf5e131/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfdf35a08-16f7-4f4e-a94e-6ff2f6ae65a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. name: Kari Lake
subject: My message to the People of Arizona & the United States:
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013857:6qFc42GNn:m:1:3253819041:043184DD939CF30B825EE19B8660BB3D:r)
---

To the People of Arizona and of the United States:

Printer problems, tabulation errors, 3-hour lines or longer, and confusing instructions given by election officials made this Election Day the most chaotic in Arizona's history.

Half of the Voting Centers that opened for the first time on Election Day (where the overwhelming majority of voters were voting for Kari Lake) were not operational or had significant failures.

Would you get on a plane if HALF of the engines didn't work? Would our friends in the media be able to broadcast their nightly propaganda if HALF of their studio equipment was not working? The 2022 General Election in Arizona was botched and broken beyond repair.

This isn't about Republicans or Democrats. This is about our sacred right to Vote, a right that many voters were, sadly, deprived of on November 8th. Tens of thousands have reached out, pleading with me to fight for them. Rest assured, I will. If we give up now, we will no longer have a Country.

Attorneys are working diligently to gather information, whistleblowers ARE coming forward, and the curtain is being lifted. Whether done accidentally or intentionally, it is clear that this Election was a debacle that destroyed any trust in our elections. Arizonans who chose to make their voice heard on Election Day shouldn't be disenfranchised or punished for choosing to vote in person. Yet they were.

I want you to know, Arizona, I will continue fighting until we restore confidence and faith in our elections.

| [**STAND WITH KARI LAKE** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013858:6qFc42GNn:m:1:3253819041:043184DD939CF30B825EE19B8660BB3D:r)
---

Thank You,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013857:6qFc42GNn:m:1:3253819041:043184DD939CF30B825EE19B8660BB3D:r)

Kari Lake
Candidate for Arizona Governor

* * *
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013857:6qFc42GNn:m:1:3253819041:043184DD939CF30B825EE19B8660BB3D:r)

name: Leader Kevin McCarthy
subject: Re: Nancy Pelosi’s last days in power👉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
It's absolutely critical that we...

| |
---
| | |
---

Peter,

This is GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy.

Nancy Pelosi is finally being forced out of power, thanks to you. I, more than anyone, want to sit back, dust my hands off, and admire what we've accomplished. Ever since the 2020 election, I've been working around the clock non-stop to fire Pelosi once and for all. That day is _almost_ here.

Pelosi will hand over the Speaker's gavel in January, but until then, she still has a grip on Congress. Our newly-elected recruits aren't sworn in yet, and Pelosi knows she has nothing to lose, now that we've defeated her in the election. That makes her and her leftist followers bolder than they've ever been.

---
| | [BOLSTER GOP DEFENSES](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014823:JNoz42GNh:m:1:3331421248:CE16DF1960697C6E550B160E658EF625:r)
---
| | [RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014823:JNoz42GNh:m:1:3331421248:CE16DF1960697C6E550B160E658EF625:r)
---

We have reason to believe the Democrats are going to try and push through the most radical bills they can before we officially take over the House January 3rd. That means we need all hands on deck to run through the finish line and block their last ditch effort, once and for all.

Peter, our war chests are EMPTY after a bruising election season - we're defenseless. Please, would you consider sparing a few bucks to ensure that we can hold off the Democrats' final charge against our freedoms? We're still nearly $11,000 short of our goal, but I've been assured that if everyone reading this chips in, we should be able to make due for this pivotal deadline.

---
| | [BOLSTER GOP DEFENSES](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014823:JNoz42GNh:m:1:3331421248:CE16DF1960697C6E550B160E658EF625:r)

Thank you,
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Trumptrainnews is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5erm4qpdpe0s69sbndpmaj0hn6el4p94d67mchg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ge6o72cph2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znae5d135urg3fj3l6ph3lfpevrh20bqqn300rn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ge6o72cph2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhm9l78nvc0o2qvhs706nau293p1956h068h5no0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ge6o72cph2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeh69nocjnc1jo0111r1ssgehfe81e6ua27rnmco_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ge6o72cph2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

subject: I was just on stage with President Obama

body:
Friend, President Obama and I recently stepped off the rally stage here in Georgia. It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: In 3 days, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue.
But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead in these final days.
They won’t hold back, and neither can we. That’s why I urgently need your support to help hit our critical Rally Day goal before midnight tonight.
Friend, I’m asking: Will you please split $20 – or whatever you can between me and Serve America – so we can win in Georgia and expand our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
Thank you so much for all you do, friend.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=88308297371b4696b888ee77b6256f2d&_e=jLDVUSinKvVPmZoPh1jQzYhNN2ItfVrglumyUid8P0BDHdEJL6X3Wj6MJ6mVcrWwNFBUbPs1GMH5QsO777wnMJ8IO4fyl4v76J0ETiQC6dOpGk4GeIHlIglrHbWuecrIylAa8ycm8Bsh2m6NKI760L7qnF3wk069NGgNORYCAK_1bHVAps3IlEN1zofe4j9HvwMaduajZ0n9tavOZwL9pecEpsRl_ZyoywhikNhPvMkMmxQSyuB-OB4B9bxKxa0rTCY6vRIuk6HWja3cwOB7WAUIvPXieGqGo8qk2rYCim4HFZPY-st9m0jrTFSb6peM) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3595a9418344996b6345f0a989371c8&_e=ans2SAT6NGHtVceir2x1y-Rc1aaqSzWrugc3rRx87GO-vxK9Zxc837PgCwEtMauvw5il2G4lZnqkE3nrIXENxSbc57skhbURJZb-YA4iE3ekI59qD0IEN8t_1EOJ_pcOu6vMN3e4QrIAcmNAHI2m3-r7aPUf7bWxsyG2GO-CPFor0rxynxYN1kF9myHqR2LGYtVz_Cz-uv3hYME6PblAhcd5gI-3KRDuP89XydAXEuhOyLzShYCMAfYNgZzNKrOzaYoL5jRkD4i_LsAR1UOep-KVdUjBV3a0ZEPqlyYoR8A%3D). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are

name: Your America
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6430%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=kg7Xs435OMOTVewmAWxUHg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95814%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2YvKB7xdgsnpzMVW6Itw2w&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95825%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OJDpgcw2j%2b4Ai6YI5xoypQ&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95826%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dKof7dAxlEUaJQTnKMwyAQ&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6430%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=kg7Xs435OMOTVewmAWxUHg&sysid=1)_

---
Peter,

**I'll be blunt: when I look at Georgia, I am worried.**

I'm worried because Raphael Warnock is on the verge of getting re-elected if we don't have Herschel Walker's back on December 6.

**We cannot afford to let the Left win another seat in the U.S. Senate.**

Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time. From crippling inflationary policies to woke ideology in the classroom and inept foreign policy abroad, their plan is taking us down the wrong path.

If we don't turn things around soon, the United States of America will no longer be the Shining City on a Hill.

We cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. If we all wait for somebody else to step up, Herschel will lose due to a lack of resources - _plain and simple._

If you want to help flip the FINAL Senate race of the year from BLUE to RED, then stop what you're doing and make an immediate contribution RIGHT NOW. 100% of your contribution will go directly to Herschel Walker's Senate campaign to help him WIN on December 6.

_**In times like these, there is no substitute for victory.**_ This is your opportunity to help Herschel be the conservative fighter we need in Washington.

_**Are you with me?**_
_We need to send a powerful message to the radical Left, so I want this email to hit Herschel's MASSIVE fundraising goal by midnight._ **[Will you help us hit that goal by chipping in right now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014067:626L52GON:m:1:3331703221:02C0DDEC1E7574D1E073D6047B7AE0F1:r)**

Herschel is counting on you to help him flip the final Senate seat of 2022 and help Republicans hold onto 50 seats in the United States Senate.

name: Eric
subject: A sincere thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Dec2022-FR-December?refcode=E17393-20221201-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Dec2022-FR-December?refcode=E17393-20221201-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
Hey team,

I wanted to quickly reach out and offer you a sincere thank you for your ongoing support this month.

November was a tough one: we narrowly lost the House majority, we’ve been targeted with ridiculous attacks from Kevin McCarthy, and we have gotten a brutal glimpse of the dangerous extremism and antics MAGA Republicans will be leading the House with. But despite the bumps in the road, you’ve stuck by my side through it all, helped us work towards our goals, and continue to fight back against the GOP’s un-American agenda. And for that, I am incredibly grateful.

We’ve got a long road ahead of us. This new Congress won’t be easy. But thanks to the help of everyday Americans like you, we were able to put up the best midterm performance for the president’s party in decades, and if we keep up the heat, I have faith we can continue to fight off the GOP’s extremism together.

Thanks again for everything, team.

— Eric

While the Radical Left continues to use race to divide and tear us apart, we know there's a better way forward that can unite our country and bring us together.

This debate is so critical to America's future, and that is why every Conservative should read his new book.

name: Latinos for Herschel
subject: Peter, this is a National Emergency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Latinos for America First**
body:
So much is at stake--it's a national emergency!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014866:Jsq552GdN:m:1:3331421248:6C78189EF1881DF78BABC271E6E0D791:r "Headline") Peter: We've been in Georgia since last Monday helping Herschel win his runoff. But I wanted to send you a quick note. This year's election marked a milestone for Latino voters, especially those who chose to vote Republican. For many, it was their first time registered as a GOP voter, and like you, I'm disappointed it wasn't enough to deliver the Red Wave as hoped. But we have a choice to make - **sulk ... or do something about it.** Well, our organization is doing something about it! Herschel saw a huge turnout of support from the Latino voters in Georgia and we need to make sure they vote for the GOP candidate on December 6th! **[Help us turn out the Latino voters for Herschel with your donation today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014866:Jsq552GdN:m:1:3331421248:6C78189EF1881DF78BABC271E6E0D791:r "Help us turn out the Latino voters for Herschel with your $25, $50,
or $100 donation today!")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014866:Jsq552GdN:m:1:3331421248:6C78189EF1881DF78BABC271E6E0D791:r "Sign")Latinos for America First is all-in for the Georgia runoff!
* We're putting volunteers on the ground to walk Latino neighborhoods. In fact, we've already knocked over 1,000 doors!
* We're buying digital ads that target Georgia's Latino voters and are looking to place ads on the local Hispanic stations as well.
* Most importantly, we're ramping up our Get-Out-The-Vote program to make sure these Latino voters show up to vote for Herschel on December 6th!

**All of this takes money ... and money that we don't have.** $76,276.87 to be exact if we're going to have any chance to fully fund our run-off program **We saw how our efforts in the Latino communities made an impact for GOP candidates across the country. Even President Trump remarked in his 2024 campaign announcement of the huge gains the GOP made in the Latino community during this election.** These efforts take money and if we're going to turn out the Latino voters for Herschel on December 6th, we need to have your support NOW. **[Will you help us today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014866:Jsq552GdN:m:1:3331421248:6C78189EF1881DF78BABC271E6E0D791:r "Will you help us today?")** | | [CHIP IN $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014867:Jsq552GdN:m:1:3331421248:6C78189EF1881DF78BABC271E6E0D791:r "CHIP IN $50")
---
| [CHIP IN $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014868:Jsq552GdN:m:1:3331421248:6C78189EF1881DF78BABC271E6E0D791:r "CHIP IN $100")
---
| [CHIP IN $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014869:Jsq552GdN:m:1:3331421248:6C78189EF1881DF78BABC271E6E0D791:r "CHIP IN $250")
---
So much is at stake--it's a national emergency. We can't let the Democrats gain the majority in the Senate and continue to push for abortion-on-demand, same-sex marriage, defunding the police, or continuing their socialist economic policies that caused inflation and high interest rates.
Help us push Herschel to victory by making sure the Latino voters show up and vote Red. **[Donate today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014866:Jsq552GdN:m:1:3331421248:6C78189EF1881DF78BABC271E6E0D791:r "Donate today!")**
For America,
Bianca Gracia
Founder
Latinos for America First PAC

name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0120%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=vNDpE%2fEWBsucut795Q5Z%2fA&sysid=1)
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42520%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FegavpqWee3ezErumnkZLQ&sysid=1). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42521%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EOAsbOhp73%2f2d%2bd6ATtEvg&sysid=1) **These best-selling kits are back in stock...** and you'll get loaded up with [**FREE GIFTS**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42522%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FmJOkywOS4ZpI1%2fGQRM9tA&sysid=1) when you get yours today. It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal: [**You get $273 worth
of FREE gifts!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42523%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dmNYrhjtH7TcA6EToPQodw&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most.
