name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zng5hggijk5vifco74lfoaim742oaj1eohjrtv80_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2chstolus0s2knnnrnh7p2ljttalvfmvoo674tg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeen6tnbdpr4fmjn2c66uu75fkird3d72qttabm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zchblkgkfqb6ghqq6unjm7mojdlk7qgje3tugvt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0do0philrbajo3q5ifor905rlecrm6bllt8hu9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv0vfi4kmqnm4323r7vr4bs0kkiuh7b3ltsocsb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z426ero4mppmouphiq16buthhlil9lb91norkrl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqn0rq19pijnolpd9dlnaota04h6lspks7sh6cn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjt41gfg1t4dh1ia7kfrqo7ilp564tqafhud1kjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ch0lo8534jkfss0a3dmq7m3gh34dodahp4o05g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc3qi01ige8mlj4m2l9cscko2fkdqfgh6de6fig0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhl6t760ggbl5ebnf1laebt2hqbkr4poma6d5a90_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpldlqifq9nr6id6ptbkm3l4rkkeobth16bon470_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpmfsa4asio0tombdv9crvokputtutker11e6uog_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi9h5nj4khjoshs0b9levgmns6jdile3mqqls88g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4g6ep83dhalrshs871iikudlphqjal6o0u2t8o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb7pu4sci2uolm7p497celdha4p42bj6273qeujg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl4lli9ukb5k3189rdg189nn2k253kk5hbvaplk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2clh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

clean_body: But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I’ll share my story ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I’ve dealt with racism... I’ve even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I’m not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive.
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjos2bicicm3hijf0oggq348ecdaqvmfhdcb035o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg8tss0391m880l8gavvdnk19ep8kilt9pliosmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2chh2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8hphvi45ie63p7stub54njut26uccd81vqodki0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2chh2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zspvs2lti6vqc8u9trkstl5a7tattp7iagtvq350_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2chh2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk4hr7m8l5s0ac332168j00iufnag48a16ggumc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ie0ob2chh2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

body:
Even just an hour of your time could make a difference.
| | | [ ](https://go.dscc.org/go/11368?t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221203-Christie-GAVolAsk-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221203-Christie-GAVolAsk-Pros-sl1&akid=9105%2E9716520%2E4nBtrS)
---
Hi team -- Christie here, Executive Director of the DSCC.

**We _urgently_ need to turn out voters for Georgia’s Senate runoff -- and what we do now will decide whether we expand our majority or stay deadlocked at 50-50.**

**[That’s why I’m _personally_ reaching out to you. Will you dedicate just an hour of your time to call Georgia voters so we can make sure Raphael Warnock wins? Click here to sign up >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11368?t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221203-Christie-GAVolAsk-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221203-Christie-GAVolAsk-Pros-sl1&akid=9105%2E9716520%2E4nBtrS)**

This final push could swing the election to Sen. Raphael Warnock and keep Trump favorite Herschel Walker out of the Senate.

But the clock is ticking. We need folks like you on the phones _NOW_.

**A single call could end up making all the difference, so don’t delay: Please sign up to volunteer this instant -- I’ve made a customized link just for you, so click here ↓**

**[www.dscc.org/GAPhoneBank/#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/11368?t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221203-Christie-GAVolAsk-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221203-Christie-GAVolAsk-Pros-sl1&akid=9105%2E9716520%2E4nBtrS)**

Thanks for helping out. Together, I know we’ll win.

– Christie, DSCC Executive Director

Hey Peter, this is Nikki Haley. Republicans have taken back the House and nearly took control of the Senate. But there's still one race left in 2022: Herschel Walker's runoff election in Georgia. It's 4th, and goal from the one-yard-line, and Herschel Walker has the ball. We need you up there blocking for him to get him into the end zone.

The Georgia runoff is less than one week away, and the Left is already lining up its best players to defend against our conservative rush. \- Chuck Schumer
\- Bernie Sanders
\- AOC
\- President Biden They have all already put the full weight of their political machine behind Raphael Warnock, asking their wealthy donors from LA to New York for support. And their top supporters have heeded the call.

We're already behind, and we have just days to make up ground and get out the vote. The Left is already counting on a victory.

Can we count on you to stop them?

name: Kadida Kenner
subject: Our second team deployed to Georgia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
Getting out the vote for Senator Warnock!

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55490479/381873921/-933665080?refcode=EM_FR_221203Arrival2_N_KK_90DO_3_NG_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlYzhiZDFjLTNhNzMtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z-PbFe4LnCn1H3DzszcHngb4Y8XA3_nt838DrP_vkAk=)
| Fellow activist, today, our second team of organizers deployed to Savannah, Georgia for the final push of getting out the vote!

Reverend Raphael Warnock is a model senator — the former pastor at the Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.’s Ebenezer Baptist Church in Atlanta, a dedicated public servant, and someone who is a voice for the voiceless.

We’re proud to join our friends on the ground at the New Georgia Project, working to make sure he heads back to Washington on behalf of Georgians — and secure the 51st vote in the U.S. Senate.

**[But, fellow activist, I hope you’ll join us in supporting both of them in our final push to the election, because the margins are still razor thin. Will you chip in $10 right now to help us get out the vote and send Senator Warnock back to Washington?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55490480/381873922/-933665080?refcode=EM_FR_221203Arrival2_N_KK_90DO_3_NG_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlYzhiZDFjLTNhNzMtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z-PbFe4LnCn1H3DzszcHngb4Y8XA3_nt838DrP_vkAk=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55490481/381873923/-933665080?refcode=EM_FR_221203Arrival2_N_KK_90DO_3_NG_A_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlYzhiZDFjLTNhNzMtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z-PbFe4LnCn1H3DzszcHngb4Y8XA3_nt838DrP_vkAk=) In solidarity,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Why does Mississippi’s media talk our state down? – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132696?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**I am often surprised at the way Mississippi’s progressive media loves talking down our state.**

Take the recent example of the Jackson water crisis. That was a straight-forward story of incompetent city officials failing to provide the city with clean water. What the left-wing media preferred to do instead was turn it into a narrative about inequality and racism.

**National and international media outlets were quick to misrepresent what was really happening in our state, and ignore the actual causes of Jackson’s water crisis.** Rather than try to set the record straight armed with their local knowledge, it was disappointing to see many local media outlets rush to join in – with a few notable exceptions.

**Much of Mississippi’s progressive media seems to delight in portraying our state in a negative light. **Perhaps those that fund Mississippi’s anti-Mississippi media don’t understand the damage this does to our state? Perhaps they don’t care, provided they are able to bolster their progressive credentials?

A recent arrival from England, I love Mississippi. **I take every opportunity to explain to outsiders why Mississippi is such a wonderful place.**

The other day, for example, I was asked to write the lead comment article for the [Sunday T](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1aa346a7f1&e=5703353baa)[elegraph](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b62523694e&e=5703353baa), one of Britain’s largest circulation newspapers. **Here are some of the positive things I had to say about Mississippi: **

* Leaders in our state have “responded to the downturn by implementing the largest tax cut in the state’s history. The state income tax was cut from an average of 7 percent to a flat 4 percent.” This is helping grow the state. **Mississippi’s population, which had been falling for as long as anyone can remember, is now starting to rise.**

* Our state leaders have also responded “with a far-reaching red tape reduction strategy, giving people with professional qualifications issued in other US states a near automatic right to practice in Mississippi.” This, too, helps explain why our state is on the up.

* As for the idea that Mississippi is poor and backward, I told my British audience that “in the next 12 months, the per capita income of Mississippi ($45,881 in 2021) is expected to overtake that of the United Kingdom ($47,202 in 2021). A generation ago, Britain was roughly twice as wealthy per person as Mississippi.”

**If Mississippi keeps going with tax cuts and red tape reduction, we will not remain the poorest state in America for long, either.**

* Mississippi is emulating the successful approach taken by other “southern states, such as Tennessee, Texas and Florida”.

* **Thanks to the reforms that leaders are implementing at the state level, the American south has become the fastest-growing part of the US.** Indeed, it is well on its way to becoming the demographic, economic and, one day soon, perhaps the political center of gravity in America.

**Here at the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we are upbeat about our state.** We know that the tax cutting and deregulation reforms that we helped instigate are producing improvements.

I cannot imagine why left-wing media outlets stay silent about how free market solutions are improving our state.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1cb8e78176&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

|

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e9feeba4ec804f2f81ac0ded5dd6c9a8&_e=o9k5xvwqIvqJneXsQdwrU2A6kFt7uU6qVGR3HcSmYA0j4F13LEfgpSxfwGmbpM7Z5kMliHKtveD4MmMQFxlddXi3LSdfUsDP0HB1ctsd3Cf0ZL9exVyqjLGdFcsAodR0W34xj4wiryAKygzhstkWK0VZLT91XhOzUcew896J86cx9gOce7DZVp51IntJusi5ltxO03T_jykmzQakcCl5ja9cqMQpm8M9yvgORwtqpfeNMCmryn1bn7znyKMbQ6SqCbBB2SqWhQEdb31c4EJz8w4P1lgVQHxOEG8vnTxd5WWKMyYsCtHYlURk1Uys9rVnVG_xc-yOQPCWilO94dNE2hZAiyiLKcOUxnftLkECdD56BsuaHLHpNAJiGwWV8vuv-CAxPPcUVeET2kTLp4u_ZQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.

name: Jim DeMint
subject: Hub of the Wheel
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: The most important thing for conservatives to remember about elections is that they are a means, not an end. In Washington, both parties act like the whole point of politics is just having power. But the point of politics is _using it_.
For two years, the Left has abused its power to wreck our economy, our energy industry, our schools, and our public health agencies.
**[It 's not enough now to just stop the Left from doing wrong. We have to do right.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10be6a07395245619e001d9cc478f37b&_e=0l9r5mQ356OZO-H00ZVcx0TUNLPXogb9Nhzlo1XJ2jGksCCtCvDw69fI2tIXvi1G9mmKu8bEuls6nNv9AYzt6Ts5YRr5SQ3eJmKgen3iTT3wNR_hFTYE1lY7xhWwX3ec2F0HK9Adt3j_pP5ZVRs4FC1SuTZCyiZSJOKAKPNGMJ12Chdku7v3LtSTLfCBUKsirMHevc_KwwHRo-LLmlVMnpM9xf9xQnTrY6Q7qEiRIvRp8ENGfRqUSX72JNmVhpz0mNvy-0v41_NQIxuzC8s_Cm8h0JRcDLgewU5JSzfJmsPx-0nTjTWEhCJokQz29SW3)**
That is what the Conservative Partnership Institute has been doing all along. We are not another PAC focused on one election or a think tank pushing one issue. We are focused on every conservative idea _every day_ of the year.
CPI is the hub of the conservative movement's wheel, the American Embassy inside the Swamp. We are the leading incubator of new conservative organizations, trainer of conservative staff, convener of conservative representatives and senators, and support for conservative communicators in Washington.
The Left has the media, the universities, corporate board rooms, and cultural elites. The Right has us.
**[Please join us in the fight to save America by making a tax-deductible contribution to CPI before the end of the year.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10be6a07395245619e001d9cc478f37b&_e=0l9r5mQ356OZO-H00ZVcx0TUNLPXogb9Nhzlo1XJ2jGksCCtCvDw69fI2tIXvi1G9mmKu8bEuls6nNv9AYzt6Ts5YRr5SQ3eJmKgen3iTT3wNR_hFTYE1lY7xhWwX3ec2F0HK9Adt3j_pP5ZVRs4FHVZGfOMpBrjDekZl6dSGzTzfHg3wMROc5KCJiPpdXztcXBeNCsptZxF2O-YPz63y42G-pHYK8KRW3KVnA4LTt_eEDMBFQFh1x9ehReY3wvPJ_mkh3A8PeWKtxriE3yRcaFBr0IzszIEsSilqOAhVlCByzTLQptj5fh2qjxl1J5B)**
As Congress now looks toward 2023, conservatives are looking to CPI. We will be there to provide the guidance, the support, and the services the new Congress will need to rescue America from Joe Biden and the woke, socialist Left.

**Now the real work begins. Starting next year, conservatives must launch the investigations, impeachments, and reforms we need to take our country back.**
CPI will help conservatives in the House and Senate with the analysis, the message, the data, the strategy, and the spine to take on the Left and the DC Establishment.
**[Please help us give conservatives the best tools possible by making a tax-free donation to CPI today.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10be6a07395245619e001d9cc478f37b&_e=0l9r5mQ356OZO-H00ZVcx0TUNLPXogb9Nhzlo1XJ2jGksCCtCvDw69fI2tIXvi1G9mmKu8bEuls6nNv9AYzt6Ts5YRr5SQ3eJmKgen3iTT3wNR_hFTYE1lY7xhWwX3ec2F0HK9Adt3j_pP5ZVRs4FEciiuqUeltfFJT0Qc9Zhro8_VJOP6eLtJ4Z7yGpBOvIUPkeJ6De5nty2rWz8Tl-oMQxfbbXGoDkPAuH2ruKG8Twd4yyHIpg9jnd-OlOim_qy6iraiC4XKYjbIvqKweOAL_ueJLz-WaPlZ35EvNItJs6rQs6cn6JhQzSt88ztt_l)**
With your support, we will not only make 2023 the end of woke Left tyranny but a new beginning for American freedom. Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely,
---
---
Jim DeMint
CPI Chairman
---
|

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I can't let you miss our new puppy TV ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
---
You know me, friend – I love puppies. So I wasn't about to let the runoff election go by without launching another TV ad featuring our #1 canine volunteer, and I wanted to follow up to make sure you saw it.
With only three days left in this fight, we need to keep our TV ad on the air to reach voters all across Georgia and get them to the polls. **That's why I'm asking one last time, friend:**
**[Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help keep our ad on the air, win in Georgia, and expand our narrow Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55475412/381817002/-1936314725?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5242-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGZiMzk3Ni0xMzczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wv9BD4MlIWj1C2JtEcyMz9tAYeIfnIjYia2ENPoFxnM=)**
Thank you,

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Rev. Warnock**
Date: Fri, Dec 2, 2022
Subject: open for puppies
| | |
---
Friend, this is exciting: We're just four days away from our runoff election on Dec. 6 – and we launched a brand-new TV ad to make sure the people of Georgia know who I am and what I'm fighting for in the Senate.
You'd think that Herschel Walker would _also_ want to explain what he stands for. But instead, he repeats the same lies – trying to distract from the fact that he's not ready to represent Georgia. But I know if I stay focused on the issues that matter to Georgia families, we'll make voters' choice at the ballot box clear – and we'll win this race. So that's what I intend to do.
**And for the record, I _love_ puppies. (You'll have to watch the ad to understand that part!)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55475413/381817003/-1936314725?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5242-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGZiMzk3Ni0xMzczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wv9BD4MlIWj1C2JtEcyMz9tAYeIfnIjYia2ENPoFxnM=)
But here's the reality: As we fight to secure this 51st seat in the Senate for Democrats, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are flooding our race with attack ads – _on top of the $58 million_ that Republican donors are pouring into Walker's campaign to turn Georgia red.
**The ONLY way we can fight back against the GOP, keep our critical TV ad on the air, and defend this seat is if grassroots folks like you pitch in right now.**
[**Please, friend, will****you give $5 or more now to keep our ad on the air, power us to victory in this runoff election, and expand our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55475414/381817004/-1936314725?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5242-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGZiMzk3Ni0xMzczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wv9BD4MlIWj1C2JtEcyMz9tAYeIfnIjYia2ENPoFxnM=)

clean_body: You know me, friend – I love puppies. So I wasn't about to let the runoff election go by without launching another TV ad featuring our #1 canine volunteer, and I wanted to follow up to make sure you saw it. With only three days left in this fight, we need to keep our TV ad on the air to reach voters all across Georgia and get them to the polls. That's why I'm asking one last time, friend: = Thank you, – Rev. Raphael Warnock \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Rev. Warnock Date: Fri, Dec 2, 2022 Subject: open for puppies | | | Friend, this is exciting: We're just four days away from our runoff election on Dec. 6 – and we launched a brand-new TV ad to make sure the people of Georgia know who I am and what I'm fighting for in the Senate. You'd think that Herschel Walker would also want to explain what he stands for. But instead, he repeats the same lies – trying to distract from the fact that he's not ready to represent Georgia. But I know if I stay focused on the issues that matter to Georgia families, we'll make voters' choice at the ballot box clear – and we'll win this race. So that's what I intend to do. And for the record, I love puppies. (You'll have to watch the ad to understand that part!) = But here's the reality: As we fight to secure this 51st seat in the Senate for Democrats, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are flooding our race with attack ads – on top of the $58 million that Republican donors are pouring into Walker's campaign to turn Georgia red. The ONLY way we can fight back against the GOP, keep our critical TV ad on the air, and defend this seat is if grassroots folks like you pitch in right now. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks, friend – now let's win this. – Rev. body:
#

**, President Obama was just here with me in Georgia.** It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment.
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.25ZQ_V&refcode=em221203-1-7&t=1&akid=4820%2E6688874%2E_ISIgH)
If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: **In 3 days, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue.**
But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead in these final days.
They won’t hold back, and neither can we. That’s why I urgently need your support to help hit our critical Rally Day goal before midnight tonight.
**, I’m asking:[Will you please split $6 – or whatever you can between me and Mark Kelly – so we can win in Georgia and expand our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.25ZQ_V&refcode=em221203-1-7&t=2&akid=4820%2E6688874%2E_ISIgH)

body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/NzYcPYqamCCIE8O8grGEsWiW4Fa9yRcv6Q_k9uasnRA=/tT1kIOeW48y-4sNGUS51_CWmMv82Lp9rVdv1mVSVrp4=?refcode=E19686-20221202-McCarthyMTG-header-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25) | Peter, I know a lot of people are worried about Donald Trump now that he's announced his 2024 campaign for President. **But we cannot lose sight of what 's happening NOW in 2022: Majorie Taylor Greene's takeover of the Republican party. ** Here's why... Kevin McCarthy needs to shore up 218 votes in order to secure the Speaker's gavel - and he can't do that without the votes of Marjorie Taylor Greene and other far-right extremists in Congress. So in order to get their support, he has to do their bidding. He's already promised to restore Marjorie Taylor Greene's committee assignments. What else is he promising her behind the scenes? Peter, it's clear that the increasingly dangerous right wing is only getting stronger in the House. The fight over our democracy isn't waiting until 2024... it's playing out right now in the halls of Congress. I am going to continue fighting back and I'm hoping there are enough Republicans with the guts to stand up to these MAGA extremists. **[If not, we have to beat them once again and that fight starts right now. So please, chip in as much as you can to help me continue fighting for our democracy.](https://act.myngp.com/el/NzYcPYqamCCIE8O8grGEsWiW4Fa9yRcv6Q_k9uasnRA=/tT1kIOeW48y-4sNGUS51_CWmMv82Lp9rVdv1mVSVrp4=?refcode=E19686-20221202-McCarthyMTG-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ****[$9](https://act.myngp.com/el/NzYcPYqamCCIE8O8grGEsWiW4Fa9yRcv6Q_k9uasnRA=/tT1kIOeW48y-4sNGUS51_CWmMv82Lp9rVdv1mVSVrp4=?express_lane=true&refcode=E19686-20221202-McCarthyMTG-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=9)****

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m on the road and need your help
body:
You’ve probably noticed that children today aren’t getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were growing up. |
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d878c178f36740e7b78601f50d2e4733&_e=l9dytPP5GlV7wuwfjPEILQqqMvg1O2FgChiDSJKvRVJgZKs-v2Z6mz4udUlqR8fCeLuRO7j8vsvV4-sjKQ6PEL_3OXUf9jiBzeu_GKxo-OvsezIuqjHTi8CMj-Wg4I2Q7Ontnhkhi7jt9XYAAXQ0JmLyBDnwF7RfIuC8OoQhpsPPI3jdnopHs7ntBwoMi8559Cb1ubhk7bhZdX17xcarlHFttj5gsXtzUIxweIVewpEwyBzdlEoPFX-WzpTq5hk1CxFPE7zyuaPa1n2IvKbe_MZo1Rk82E89aLdL5rFOWpjeFVDMdTJ33_lwf0XlzoTQlhpwnStQYXLOZio5CoptW23cd8D5ee1Egt8Cyf3VO8Cy6FFkfoL8xdgAJaiXck0D)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

You've probably noticed that children today aren't getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were growing up.

We used to be taught to love our nation, cherish our history, and respect our fellow Americans. But all of that has changed.

In today's classroom, children are taught that America is fundamentally racist, that our history is one of oppression, and that we should focus on our differences instead of what unites us.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d878c178f36740e7b78601f50d2e4733&_e=l9dytPP5GlV7wuwfjPEILQqqMvg1O2FgChiDSJKvRVJgZKs-v2Z6mz4udUlqR8fCeLuRO7j8vsvV4-sjKQ6PEL_3OXUf9jiBzeu_GKxo-OvsezIuqjHTi8CMj-Wg4I2Q7Ontnhkhi7jt9XYAAXQ0JmLyBDnwF7RfIuC8OoQhpsPPI3jdnopHs7ntBwoMi8559Cb1ubhk7bhZdX17xcarlHFttj5gsXtzUIxweIVewpF7vxB4cYG54H_lFNfla3P0AjTT3iffYGYJyGhVPl2tfu9TlsMA9aScnnkhz-cj1fO90DoZDOxorZ4g9hSejeHoVVWgaGlcT65D0zK-BdcmsiciZYetAESAnHUYQLz0raCdvrsTtUWIj0MormJF-AGD)
__To make matters worse: the right of parents to choose how and where their kids receive their education remains out of reach for most American families.

And this is exactly why we created our Little Patriots program--to give parents, grandparents, teachers, and caregivers a free online resource they can use to teach children unbiased civics lessons, history, and American values, anywhere and anytime--[completely free of charge.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d878c178f36740e7b78601f50d2e4733&_e=l9dytPP5GlV7wuwfjPEILQqqMvg1O2FgChiDSJKvRVJgZKs-v2Z6mz4udUlqR8fCeLuRO7j8vsvV4-sjKQ6PEG9uFkdtp2yACzBqEfLh2KtXiL5_vfgDnrSYuxKXXLH1T4AO-wkBiobKiQDrSK_XtJdDV34JC_t2Qzks_z9dSLaMpwrjf_QipoqDpD6Y7jYWny2JJXy1h-_UXJTkON7n5xDSkh6RL2nZkaOOvdNiwcYku2U7W0-9_OfhDokgAYJl6xBXs5accR01mJNABs99WWQmTPF8uGctcsVKQY_rUg_cwRL0WKHTi5887-wsylOUO5pMmZT-dKqAmvAjqj2FtXMH8Vh_47tWtrlMdQQU1zvxciEOGxdzrktRiATZEVSC)

**And now we plan to do even more.**

To meet the growing demand for educational resources that teach children to love their country and its history, we're taking Little Patriots on the road to bring these educational resources to schools, churches, and community organizations!

But to help us fund this coast-to-coast effort, I need your help today.

We depend on the generous support of patriots like you to help us fund this program and share it with children and families across our great nation.

If you believe that American children deserve to receive the best education possible, [can I personally ask you to help me accomplish my goal of getting this first-of-its-kind curriculum to anyone who needs it?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d878c178f36740e7b78601f50d2e4733&_e=l9dytPP5GlV7wuwfjPEILQqqMvg1O2FgChiDSJKvRVJgZKs-v2Z6mz4udUlqR8fCeLuRO7j8vsvV4-sjKQ6PEG9uFkdtp2yACzBqEfLh2KtXiL5_vfgDnrSYuxKXXLH1T4AO-wkBiobKiQDrSK_XtJdDV34JC_t2Qzks_z9dSLaMpwrjf_QipoqDpD6Y7jYWny2JJXy1h-_UXJTkON7n5xDSkh6RL2nZkaOOvdNiwcbeGdJgZwgBSuXVfLUUVwsnOj2g89YBn129chJWhLbmch9tKVQH7TXETKhgwRh6NEVvzxe1W4XklQPuLhJMI1ZI5778XZIZMPf8IiJF0z6yWdgUBaNbc_OSuMS84JXCnbDYrEbFHbPbr3_bWrtOoFeh)

If you'd like to help me get Little Patriots to more American children, please click the link below to make your generous tax-deductible gift today:

[**https://secure.americancornerstone.org/little-patriots-tour-donate**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d878c178f36740e7b78601f50d2e4733&_e=l9dytPP5GlV7wuwfjPEILQqqMvg1O2FgChiDSJKvRVJgZKs-v2Z6mz4udUlqR8fCeLuRO7j8vsvV4-sjKQ6PEG9uFkdtp2yACzBqEfLh2KtXiL5_vfgDnrSYuxKXXLH1T4AO-wkBiobKiQDrSK_XtJdDV34JC_t2Qzks_z9dSLaMpwrjf_QipoqDpD6Y7jYWny2JJXy1h-_UXJTkON7n5xDSkh6RL2nZkaOOvdNiwcb5coFWULGE9pAQDvg_3YYxGkgwyaPRY9LxurV1tPwFg23piLILzNBGA43mN3CP8ALPaOiKjARkPzOA0VAL0WhxWUnv5_WFtVlOV-cz3s9rC1FidG0tbYl-Vf8NFReY54e2j0fMNnPWVvGaseX-XlJH)

clean_body: You’ve probably noticed that children today aren’t getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were growing up. | | | | | Fellow Patriot, You've probably noticed that children today aren't getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were growing up. We used to be taught to love our nation, cherish our history, and respect our fellow Americans. But all of that has changed. In today's classroom, children are taught that America is fundamentally racist, that our history is one of oppression, and that we should focus on our differences instead of what unites us. To make matters worse: the right of parents to choose how and where their kids receive their education remains out of reach for most American families. And this is exactly why we created our Little Patriots program--to give parents, grandparents, teachers, and caregivers a free online resource they can use to teach children unbiased civics lessons, history, and American values, anywhere and anytime-- And now we plan to do even more. To meet the growing demand for educational resources that teach children to love their country and its history, we're taking Little Patriots on the road to bring these educational resources to schools, churches, and community organizations! But to help us fund this coast-to-coast effort, I need your help today. We depend on the generous support of patriots like you to help us fund this program and share it with children and families across our great nation. If you believe that American children deserve to receive the best education possible, If you'd like to help me get Little Patriots to more American children, please click the link below to make your generous tax-deductible gift today: Thank you so much for supporting these efforts-- Sincerely, Dr. Ben Carson Founder and Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Revealed: FBI illegally arrests U.S. Marine combat veteran
body:
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. | | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013911:J3Yg02GNG:m:1:3253819041:06B5EA9CDA6F3C42F0482BF49DC325C5:r)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013911:J3Yg02GNG:m:1:3253819041:06B5EA9CDA6F3C42F0482BF49DC325C5:r) Hi Peter,

**[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013911:J3Yg02GNG:m:1:3253819041:06B5EA9CDA6F3C42F0482BF49DC325C5:r)**

(Because you're a valued supporter of Freedom Watch, I had to rush you this urgent update about my client, Jesus Rivera. Please bear with me if you've seen some of this information before... it will be shocking to new supporters.)

On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn't protest (when I first heard his story, I thought he did).

Jesus didn't attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud.
**
Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn't receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden's Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What's more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.
**
Let me tell you, I've locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly.

She's a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She's the absolute worst judge I've appeared before in 45 years.

And now she's throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves.

**Peter, I've filed a critically important class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera ' and on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who is getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
I'm suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus' home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray.

The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can't be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.
**
That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents ' AND WIN!
**
And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Peter, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013911:J3Yg02GNG:m:1:3253819041:06B5EA9CDA6F3C42F0482BF49DC325C5:r)
I'm using two powerful class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

[**Please give what you can right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013911:J3Yg02GNG:m:1:3253819041:06B5EA9CDA6F3C42F0482BF49DC325C5:r)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Peter, you can read more about my urgent class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera and all January 6 peaceful protesters by just[clicking on this link](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013911:J3Yg02GNG:m:1:3253819041:06B5EA9CDA6F3C42F0482BF49DC325C5:r) and selecting the view button. After, simply scroll down to read the legal document.

[**Then think of U.S. Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera and each of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters I'm fighting for... and dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013911:J3Yg02GNG:m:1:3253819041:06B5EA9CDA6F3C42F0482BF49DC325C5:r)

name: Team Fetterman
subject: We get it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We need to make sure we reach as many voters across Georgia in these next few days.
#
Derek,
To keep it short and sweet: We can’t slow down. There are only THREE MORE days until the runoff election.
And we get it, you’re probably tired of receiving so many emails and texts about this runoff. But after a long two years, and a tumultuous midterm election with an extraordinary amount of GOP and super PAC money spent against Rev. Warnock, we can’t lay off the gas now. Not when we’re so close to the finish line, and not when so much is on the line.
We need to make sure that the Democratic Party of Georgia is able to reach — and turn out — as many voters across Georgia in these next few days as possible.
We need the grassroots team that pushed us to victory in 2020, that flipped the Senate blue in 2021, and that has kept Georgia competitive in 2022 to step up one more time. **[Will you rush a donation split between the Democratic Party of Georgia and John Fetterman so they can reach every voter to help Rev. Warnock over the finish line?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221203-1?refcode=em20221203-8155&refcode2=8155_434096_HFBx0h&akid=8155%2E434096%2EHFBx0h)**
**[Donate $5 Now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221203-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221203-8155&refcode2=8155_434096_HFBx0h&akid=8155%2E434096%2EHFBx0h)**
Everything done between now and December 6th will be critical in sending Rev. Warnock back to the Senate — and growing our Democratic majority.
Thank you for taking action today.
— Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20221203-8155-footer&t=1&refcode2=8155_434096_HFBx0h&akid=8155%2E434096%2EHFBx0h)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8155%2E434096%2EHFBx0h)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8155%2E434096%2EHFBx0h)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo4kaqok3no4p62paks5au84rr6onol55ed81068_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ieeor6cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr3ad9kcjgb3cbh6tg61oj7mcrm1pj16pqb6d3je4p38ctgmlieaslhe2qj6dtgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj665rj6o30etjmcc9imdj3fc5lclp2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm7a6gvcjs4ipajt9copcvrsbl1r5l6tn3hitrtg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ieeor6cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztpehbid6k1c8cmpqmveff90aonvmbiou6r6a7jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ieeor6cph2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8ci0gvf109rqlorut01aiv2hks7go1u4mj0m1u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ieeor6cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2z4q3iomgf604m9r7u6mjabghitbbolkk9mg8u6rg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zikssckf42s98dl5sp2jqummk8od5hoolje3rufg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c1g69pr3cpj649fg)

name: Team AOC
subject: A necessary break
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We put fundraising for our campaign on the back burner over the last few weeks because we understood the importance of meeting the moment and helping provide relief to our communities in whatever ways we could.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221203-3672-header&t=1&akid=3672%2E2526796%2EOf7lF4)
For the past few weeks, we’ve taken a necessary break from our planned campaign operations.
🏳️⚧️ First, after the tragic shooting in Colorado Springs, we mobilized our movement to support two LGBTQ+ focused organizations and together we raised nearly $8,000.
🗽 Then, we raised nearly $19,000 on Giving Tuesday to support asylum seekers arriving in New York with nothing but the clothes on their backs.
🍑 Lastly, we raised $67,000 last month to help re-elect Sen. Raphael Warnock in the lead up to the Georgia runoff in just four days.
**We did this because it’s important to Alexandria that our campaign can meet these moments and provide support in whatever ways we can. And we couldn’t do it without you.**
In order to make space for this work, we put fundraising for our campaign on the back burner. So now, we need your help to close the gap and start December strong so we’re on track to hit our Q4 targets before the FEC deadline at the end of the month.
**We’ve done the math, and if we can get just two contributions from your area — we’ll be on track to meet our targets.**
[As we approach the final FEC deadline of the year, can we count on you to be one of the two people we need from your area to close our fundraising gap and start the month strong?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221203-3672-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3672%2E2526796%2EOf7lF4)
**[Contribute $6](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221203-3672-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3672%2E2526796%2EOf7lF4)**
Every contribution allows our team to not only coordinate more solidarity efforts like these, but also to fight for legislation to prevent future mass shootings, protect asylum seekers, and more.
Your contribution of any amount will make a huge impact on the work we’ll be able to take on in the coming year, and will help ensure Alexandria can continue to lead during these moments — [please make a contribution right now to help us close our fundraising gap and keep Alexandria fighting for the better future our communities deserve. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221203-3672-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3672%2E2526796%2EOf7lF4)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-202212?refcode=em20221203-3672-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=23&refcode2=3672_2526796_Of7lF4&akid=3672%2E2526796%2EOf7lF4)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221203-3672-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=24&akid=3672%2E2526796%2EOf7lF4)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=3672%2E2526796%2EOf7lF4) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=3672%2E2526796%2EOf7lF4) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=3672%2E2526796%2EOf7lF4)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Get the truth about these 40 political myths
body:
There’s this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true. It’s a narrative that you’ll often see

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zku8i60rq71t111hd7m39hitvb04ins456n8l4kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ieeor6chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, There's this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

It's a narrative that you'll often see pushed by a dysfunctional media or toxic culture. And as long as the idea is considered "correct" by the "right" people like TV talking heads, celebrities, or the masses on social media, the general public believes it.

That's why the Libertas Institute published this eBook in our Tuttle Twins series: **[_The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths._](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z28mh19mnjhqn4rrl373hcac7833e3s9lb4vq39g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ieeor6chh2bs)**
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlr1tv0lmrdlc64d95f4kp6dsh2v4pmpo1fg9ecg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ieeor6chh2bs)
---
| | And today, we want to send a copy to your inbox for FREE.

Inside this important eBook, you'll get a clear analysis of some of the biggest political and economic myths infecting our world today like:
* Overpopulation is destroying the world
* Global climate change can be reversed by law
* Capitalism creates winners and losers
* Socialism helps the poor

You can get your free copy using this secure link:

**[https://act.libertasutah.org/tt-the-tuttle-rebuttals](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvisr26npel1lodugbi6itbmu1cr9rn444m7htuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c1ieeor6chh2bs)**

I'd also love for you to share this book with at least 5 people you know--especially any children in your family. My hope is that they will enjoy the same benefits you do when you read this book. And then, we can crush these myths once and for all.

It’s a narrative that you’ll often see | | | | | Dear Friend, There's this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true. It's a narrative that you'll often see pushed by a dysfunctional media or toxic culture. And as long as the idea is considered "correct" by the "right" people like TV talking heads, celebrities, or the masses on social media, the general public believes it. That's why the Libertas Institute published this eBook in our Tuttle Twins series: | | | And today, we want to send a copy to your inbox for FREE. Inside this important eBook, you'll get a clear analysis of some of the biggest political and economic myths infecting our world today like: Overpopulation is destroying the world Global climate change can be reversed by law Capitalism creates winners and losers Socialism helps the poor You can get your free copy using this secure link: I'd also love for you to share this book with at least 5 people you know--especially any children in your family. Fellow American,

Most folks get into politics for all the wrong reasons. Some candidates run because of their egos or desire for fame. Others want to cash in with a lucrative book deal. Some even run because they want a stepping-stone to a higher office. It's sad, really.

**Herschel Walker is different. He's not a politician.**

Herschel doesn't need fortune or fame. He already has both.

Herschel knows America is going in the wrong direction...and he simply wants to help.

**Herschel Walker is running because Raphael Warnock is a wolf in sheep's clothing and must be defeated.**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c566332012854d54bb1d38e62201f54f&_e=CnetwkHmcBy58YPtXkUeA6PvJHCumH1_Ag_TRFeu5KugptG8GUKW9HHYjcF5-3E8EMkAXScDGIXoy4doHmAzsDuE1ey_1xuACoIkBp2vWI86VnIBdmTDBJ7graadhUPmytbH42J-T85YA7u_ceJSL6i3qXQ0UTlYxVpA6jqSqxiOklEdD4KmSj1xWq57zBBiZGZt6R3M4Z47vvwkQm4zyx8d2gqngF4lSYle7yG2am6QBuq2XncXXNo-WFoyja-uYKsTyhkOYIOzIR4YZ6KI_l3-Ub8hRcdELiiw1Hk6X8fvCQg4ygBqsWIYMOXlNnWqryU8tBDSu8zZ4IsboeaPaVyVfqsK7ReAja-muhamHxJtluf_deRztoJB5fokGvhwaBFDJ1CXVhFylsiqUElXlXMkjydp7bk7aiiIWptd7YR6zOSOhGsnZJ_dqGDNuCo7apIqnoaS9WJc6mjVSi_B8w%3D%3D)

Even after spending nearly $120 million in the general election, Raphael Warnock still couldn't get a majority of voters to support him. Now he's in a runoff election with Herschel Walker, and we're in the final days of this race. We need to win this final Senate race of 2022, **[so I'm asking you to donate to Herschel Walker's campaign today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c566332012854d54bb1d38e62201f54f&_e=CnetwkHmcBy58YPtXkUeA6PvJHCumH1_Ag_TRFeu5KugptG8GUKW9HHYjcF5-3E8EMkAXScDGIXoy4doHmAzsDuE1ey_1xuACoIkBp2vWI86VnIBdmTDBJ7graadhUPmytbH42J-T85YA7u_ceJSL6i3qXQ0UTlYxVpA6jqSqxiOklEdD4KmSj1xWq57zBBiZGZt6R3M4Z47vvwkQm4zyx8d2gqngF4lSYle7yG2am6QBuq2XncXXNo-WFoyja-uYKsTyhkOYIOzIR4YZ6KI_l3-Ub8hRcdELiiw1Hk6X8fvCQg4ygBqsWIYMOXlNnWqKp0VeYSMx6K3cGOx3zwve6nvzkEVFuosgKR0mJoZWaghRgUQEj8yS8AGw_Nv-NqmNqtRPg3DS-HJR1wfyKIHLIiEcVZiEflLTJld57t6ssKFn2t4oZT6MGs4GbSM4yLshVIWe_9tQBT6IglZmDablg%3D%3D)**

Herschel's campaign is being massively outraised by Senator Warnock and his liberal allies. There's no sugar coating it - it's been brutal to watch Herschel get outspent 2 to 1 on television. But the race is TIED, so we have a genuine shot at winning on Tuesday.

[**We just BLEW past our first major deadline since the midterm elections, and we fell short of our critical fundraising goal. We now run a serious risk of losing out on saving our country for good.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014402:6uTfR2GNn:m:1:3317145305:E6AD6B5A84C0D4D27EF171F53D493F0E:r)

When we told you Washington DC's Far Left mayor was hatching a plot to make DC the 51st state and hand Democrats two new senators... **too few stepped up.**
When top Republicans warned illegal immigrants could be voting in our elections soon... **too few stepped up.**
[**If our top grassroots Patriots ignore critical fundraising deadlines like this one, we could be in serious danger of losing to the Democrats.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014402:6uTfR2GNn:m:1:3317145305:E6AD6B5A84C0D4D27EF171F53D493F0E:r)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: please, don’t scroll away
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg5skUhLrAuBK7UxEiV6KXl-LgntVQ9ZpKUCcrY2yTnTmrnFzpj1o5DjHFltwV55HuMG9TIT1UbEMNjlRG-8tw9p6f3u_bDFprnTmPSpHKy2YKeFB_SgcvuiHiN4TO9WgNvIrEZCoHXileMQgg2KGR6M/3ro/p5RZ0Jw_SLSc7bJTiNryxQ/h0/maiqGFEx-Mx-Zmq8aXWc3exFjsN_lOFAI39JoEYaZXE) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE0Vd8nKqW85ZXV9rlZ14r6UtUEfpxpRFiPOSJMuOc_izw712zDLrtY4gsLC5Yo4UddzhzBj8ygKxKZl_fPBnkoTQCTIrUk7romcoUyFZZQR5-ypA7_tS8PfpoeRK1uDwJXJbgbhvwt5eOPsAzKk9ugyzMq4LaASLTiIZGUJtWa6ubgx7IkcKpXRZ2sMXUYmdYDaj4G5WGvVMxXNp1qX-V2_ZhJPbaErgo_R9qr8KT_kpvt0M8ZnDOrLFqfKJgiWPaFW4PSTCPl7gepCtFK9wFKhPm36hgKfESpeVZU1EdC2aX3Xxn4OPrNu4X-x9nQL-DHFuvF16lhqePSilQs6HZXkaVi4y1dpCn79nS1u9wJZNtrQysgBxh-yVtfaye91lzFdeJvhMFfntTvYxntaiBwCby3Qm2P60ZeNtoxoTN_ALjJfZ3cUaiEvZW5WzAQA-e3VrxKC36uw1wMvXxKn-JmJ/3ro/p5RZ0Jw_SLSc7bJTiNryxQ/h1/MG1N-Niiun4GPsuy7gZYQbBAVNZugMI07h2IbDElZ3s) I’ll keep this short:

With less than a day to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me.

That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.

**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again.** The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this.

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. I’ll keep this short: With less than a day to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me. That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads. I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again. The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this. In a race this neck and neck , every single grassroots contribution could mean the difference between winning and losing. | | | | | | | Thank you for all that you do. None of this would be possible without you. – Rev. Raphael Warnock | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=320432ac36ad47bc9186ddf8e1240183&_e=WB3c-HB6fVPGnm9fcP5rTHw_rCyW-hJjM4pAQy_8Z5Pzd4op9J48Tph6mTlV29Dr_m1VVTKklBzQ57fjlimAU1VbGeU75UC7LoBBaLgpc-vO-wMdNKzsrq9lZEsWqJyZkvmOuzJLL8bKSQDEj_-llBkFaKg3atYGk_qvkhY_L4zIBg75aeaOQETRYlcpOSGmW6gzMCShrRGEZrrDmtupGvWNNrzRi5xFOxNpXUGYv2AMjrJRa4lypF7aaZT1b68Fe1EpWzQMnaaAhnravStNokyENhCt8k9ninwUQ7LX4COKbORQOeKeJLp2ifPwjJ7GDWm2llkal4M_DWhIk7eNoqkMWncnok9F-oayelZ0YXJ0T-6-C_ktR8mQbFh8kwJHalTzO8sxn3_lLPHjPnW_vG3u-qWoYTj6D0i1CQChCss4S9c37ZluJvQXkApfArTBWs1QtQBvDwjRjydhfp8YBQ%3D%3D)**_

While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... ...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of How We Win to be so URGENT and so IMPORTANT that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible. How We Win is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will FIGHT for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. How We Win is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come. And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America... ... we're DOING IT! With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We're helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. | | For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Conservatives must lead
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=e03e25d765794105a0f7530794a63438&_e=JQkOaBtdeblIme-BIJKviubg62Q9TkJl9A-qtmUxAnup538G6CAGPzxWM9hrk-TXCpVGYPEIWJYqrPXpqGDctI0ccyNGyGNXiZEWZ9Q2HgBHrJMOpo24cH5Hl9t2COEkjHbJFVsfooE_aCkNT0CO6SpsWNat12pW1qVzQEdjiISRHZ5rEztIG1oP3fXmjo6cafkuO0mYSAwU_uwKyTDmhr7WI_Y8o_cEAbOipcgKMsWluKdMESNnQ58WkxLLA44Kvc1DNOt7VNx8IL5yF9vcuGu89tEZZ12dn2yrKgmCT2WsYMxQ6io-WrU8jqZV7Pbeec9IlXcDTEQ5z2mwSB6NhI7Mvx6iggQZR4cyWd0ehoWwGTD5OvYwDjUReefQGdzn)
