Friend,
---
Washington’s wasteful spending sprees are no secret. ** ** But it’s not enough to identify the problem. We have to do something about it. ** ** It’s time for Republicans to crack down on pork-barrel projects and special-interest giveaways. Not only are they a waste of taxpayer money, earmarks are used as bait to convince members to vote for bloated spending bills—like what could be a $3.3 trillion blowout in the upcoming weeks. And you know what out-of-control spending bills lead to? Out-of-control inflation and more money added to our soaring national debt. ** ****_How bad is the earmark problem? Take a look at some of the latest absurd earmark requests:_**
* A $1.1 million solar array in Kirkland, Washington—one of the least sunny places in the country.
* $1.5 million to promote eating outdoors in Pasadena, CA—one of the sunniest places in the country.
* $1.6 million for the Leahy Center for Lake Champlain in Vermont. The center is named after Sen. Patrick Leahy (D-VT), and he had the audacity to request the earmark.

Our country is looking to us for solutions, and Republicans should provide them. That starts with reining in wasteful spending like earmarks. ** **[**Let me know what you think about earmarks by submitting your thoughts here.**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=e03e25d765794105a0f7530794a63438&_e=JQkOaBtdeblIme-BIJKviubg62Q9TkJl9A-qtmUxAnup538G6CAGPzxWM9hrk-TXCpVGYPEIWJYqrPXpqGDctI0ccyNGyGNXiZEWZ9Q2HgBHrJMOpo24cH5Hl9t2COEkjHbJFVsfooE_aCkNT0CO6SpsWNat12pW1qVzQEdjiISRHZ5rEztIG1oP3fXmjo6cafkuO0mYSAwU_uwKyTDmhr7WI_Y8o_cEAbOipcgKMsVIHdEMNDhtA_Z1tiVvzK8blEupFLTs2DYsxfaRMhcwsKeMA8xZR8ke0Bv5EC0FeCHizHpwg2iPFe_LCshPEr0GdzDvm_lINcPeW2PJRWhVY91XlI3GeNXq2GgkxVLFu5z1f9_G9dMOrXZeGsmPkxKl) ** ** My very best,**

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Just $3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin
body:
Voting is underway in our critical runoff Senate race.
#
$3 – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today.
Your $3 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.
Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With only a few days left until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.
**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $3 could mean the difference between winning and losing this race.**
[**Please: Will you make a $3 contribution to my campaign today to fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-em-warnock.BcFO2M&refcode=em221203-1-t3&t=1&akid=4100%2E196590%2ERwoogc)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1272?c0=mandela-em-warnock.s7exWr&refcode=em221203-1-t3&t=20&akid=4100%2E196590%2ERwoogc)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=mandela-em-warnock.jHthYk&refcode=em221203-1-t3&t=21&akid=4100%2E196590%2ERwoogc)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=mandela-em-warnock.KagZuK&refcode=em221203-1-t3&t=22&akid=4100%2E196590%2ERwoogc)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=mandela-em-warnock.lt3jYp&refcode=em221203-1-t3&t=23&akid=4100%2E196590%2ERwoogc)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=mandela-em-warnock._AE7VY&refcode=em221203-1-t3&t=24&akid=4100%2E196590%2ERwoogc)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mandela-em-warnock.BcFO2M&refcode=em221203-1-t3&t=25&akid=4100%2E196590%2ERwoogc)
Thank you for chipping in. I truly appreciate your support.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=4100%2E196590%2ERwoogc). name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: RE: Summer Lee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We wanted to make sure you had a chance to read yesterday’s email from our
Executive Director, Alexandra Rojas about how deeply we supported Summer
Lee’s campaign from launch through victory.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122475?refcode=em20221203-26362&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26362%2E1203867%2E8dR-DG ]Please make a contribution to ensure we have the resources to continue
to defeat entrenched incumbents.

We hope you’ll take a moment to read Alexandra’s email below in full.

Thank you,

Team JD

-------------------------
From: Alexandra Rojas
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: Summer Lee

Peter, I wanted
to personally reach out and give you a behind the scenes look into
everything Justice Democrats did to recruit and support Summer Lee’s
winning campaign.

It all began in 2021, through statistical analysis we identified PA-12 as
a target district for us to recruit a progressive leader who could run
against the political establishment and win.

After talking to over 180 local leaders, organizers, union members, and
activists in Western Pennsylvania, it was clear that State Rep. Summer Lee
was by far the strongest leader and a truly grassroots candidate to run in
this district.

Then, we worked with Summer’s campaign for Congress from day one. We
supported her from launch through victory, helping her campaign create its
branding, media and policy preparations, and helped her secure major
endorsements from national progressives.

We supported Summer’s on the ground organizing and helped her fight off
over $10 million in outside spending against her from groups like AIPAC.
And with grassroots contributions from people like you, we raised over
$100,000 directly for her campaign.

Our team and volunteers boosted Summer’s field operations both during the
primary and general elections. Our volunteers helped her reach 131,000
total calls and 256,000 total text messages to voters in PA-12.

Our team with Congresswoman-elect Summer Lee

This is how deep we go with our candidates. No other organization in the
progressive arena recruits and supports candidates like we do. Now, Summer
Lee will make history in January when she’s sworn in and will be the first
Black woman to represent Pennsylvania in Congress.

But all of this work takes major resources especially when we have to
fight back against right-wing super PACs like AIPAC who will be relentless
in their future attacks against outspoken progressives like Summer.

And because our fundraising continues to decline, we need to see a major
increase in contributions immediately. Otherwise, we’ll have to make some
hard decisions about where to make budget cuts — which will mean pulling
back critical areas of support for our candidates.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122475?refcode=em20221203-26362&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=26362%2E1203867%2E8dR-DG ]Peter, we
know how to win. We’ve been winning. But we’re at an inflection point as
an organization and we need your support now. So what do you say? Will you
contribute $3 (or more!) right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122475?refcode=em20221203-26362&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26362%2E1203867%2E8dR-DG ]Contribute $3

Our work over the last five years has transformed Democratic politics as
we know it. We recruited and helped elect AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush,
and now Summer Lee. Those progressive fighters, alongside every other
Justice Democrat in Congress, are pushing for policies that match the
scale of the crises we face.

To continue electing new fighters to join them in the Squad, where they’ll
fight for us, we need the resources to fund our operation. We completely
rely on grassroots support from people like you. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122475?refcode=em20221203-26362&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=26362%2E1203867%2E8dR-DG ]So with our
fundraising declining, we’re coming directly to supporters like you to
chip in and help us make up the difference.

Whether you can donate today or not, I’m still so thankful for your
support. Remember, it’s because of you that Summer’s win was possible —
and we made history.

With gratitude,

Alexandra Rojas

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122475?refcode=em20221203-26362&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=26362%2E1203867%2E8dR-DG ]Contribute $3

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that

And with grassroots contributions from people like you, we raised over $100,000 directly for her campaign. VoteVets gets results.
We reach voters most progressive organizations can’t, and we move the people we need to help Democrats WIN.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Will you help me beat the freeze?

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/9bq3hRgVLyhm/c2JRendJL3JIZzFkODBEYWhkbEk5bHB0VEF3MHIraWkxT1gyNmx1WkNlbUplNUN2MEJwUmwvUEJMUDRNek9lR1AvUTFtQ0RiWk9jaFJNcXFHMktkTHFWd2l2RGVLVitvcVE3VmlIQlZKbm89S0/UTlpV3ZXUWM1bS9BVjIvQjBwSXR6SFBDQVFjYytiYnlqaHhJVTBvUG9jWT0S1) Friend, At midnight this Friday, I'll stop fundraising for months as Washington state's legislative fundraising freeze begins. I have a long list of priorities for this session, from fighting the climate crisis to continuing to tackle homelessness here in Washington state. **At the top of that list is enshrining the right to choose into our state 's constitution.** But while our fundraising efforts are frozen, far-right anti-choice groups can raise and spend millions in an all-out-attack on reproductive rights here in Washington. We can't afford to be caught flat-footed. So, our team has set a bold fundraising goal: $50,000 before the freeze, this Friday at midnight. [_**Ahead of this crucial deadline, I 'm humbly asking: Will you make a contribution of $10 right now, so we can hit our $50,000 Beat the Freeze goal, protect reproductive rights, and keep moving Washington state forward?**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/x4r9SXm7K3JW/c2JRendJL3JIZzFkODBEYWhkbEk5bHB0VEF3MHIraWkxT1gyNmx1WkNlbUplNUN2MEJwUmwvUEJMUDRNek9lR1AvUTFtQ0RiWk9jaFJNcXFHMktkTHFWd2l2RGVLVitvcVE3VmlIQlZKbm89S0/UTlpV3ZXUWM1bS9BVjIvQjBwSXR6SFBDQVFjYytiYnlqaHhJVTBvUG9jWT0S1) [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/x4r9SXm7K3JW/c2JRendJL3JIZzFkODBEYWhkbEk5bHB0VEF3MHIraWkxT1gyNmx1WkNlbUplNUN2MEJwUmwvUEJMUDRNek9lR1AvUTFtQ0RiWk9jaFJNcXFHMktkTHFWd2l2RGVLVitvcVE3VmlIQlZKbm89S0/UTlpV3ZXUWM1bS9BVjIvQjBwSXR6SFBDQVFjYytiYnlqaHhJVTBvUG9jWT0S1) | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/34WRSYvRmyFK/c2JRendJL3JIZzFkODBEYWhkbEk5bHB0VEF3MHIraWkxT1gyNmx1WkNlbUplNUN2MEJwUmwvUEJMUDRNek9lR1AvUTFtQ0RiWk9jaFJNcXFHMktkTHFWd2l2RGVLVitvcVE3VmlIQlZKbm89S0/UTlpV3ZXUWM1bS9BVjIvQjBwSXR6SFBDQVFjYytiYnlqaHhJVTBvUG9jWT0S1)
---
To be crystal clear: Washington state's fundraising freeze isn't a bad thing. Elected officials, myself included, should be focused on what we got elected to do: passing laws that protect and improve the lives of all Washingtonians.
But while we dedicate this legislative session to making progress in our state, far-right groups can raise and spend millions of dollars lying to the people of Washington and try to stop us from doing our jobs. And make no mistake, they've been successful halting pro-choice legislation in states even more blue than Washington.
All the while, we can't raise a penny.
So, here's the situation: To have the resources on-hand needed to get this done in the face of the outrageous out-of-state attacks we know are coming, we've got to raise $50,000 before Friday. It's just our unfortunate reality this winter.
[_**Please, I 'm asking you directly: Chip in $10 today toward our $50,000 goal, so we can hit our Beat the Freeze goal together.**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/x4r9SXm7K3JW/c2JRendJL3JIZzFkODBEYWhkbEk5bHB0VEF3MHIraWkxT1gyNmx1WkNlbUplNUN2MEJwUmwvUEJMUDRNek9lR1AvUTFtQ0RiWk9jaFJNcXFHMktkTHFWd2l2RGVLVitvcVE3VmlIQlZKbm89S0/UTlpV3ZXUWM1bS9BVjIvQjBwSXR6SFBDQVFjYytiYnlqaHhJVTBvUG9jWT0S1)
As always, I am so grateful for your support.
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/34WRSYvRmyFK/c2JRendJL3JIZzFkODBEYWhkbEk5bHB0VEF3MHIraWkxT1gyNmx1WkNlbUplNUN2MEJwUmwvUEJMUDRNek9lR1AvUTFtQ0RiWk9jaFJNcXFHMktkTHFWd2l2RGVLVitvcVE3VmlIQlZKbm89S0/UTlpV3ZXUWM1bS9BVjIvQjBwSXR6SFBDQVFjYytiYnlqaHhJVTBvUG9jWT0S1)

body:

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Georgia Runoff Tuesday! | Dirty Deal Round 2 w/ Sen. Merkley |
Make Amazon Pay Recap | Solidarity w/ Rail Workers | Khanna Pushes $15
Wage | Member Survey | Bernie Ornament | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8085?t=1011&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8085?t=1012&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]When you become a sustaining member of Our Revolution for $5 or more,
we’ll send you this limited edition Bernie’s Mittens holiday ornament.
Made of seed paper, this is a unique no-waste gift!

★ ★ ★

GEORGIA RUNOFF TUESDAY!

In the 2022 midterms, our movement fended off a red wave, flipped a Senate
seat, and sent 9 new progressives to the House. But, we have more work to
do in Georgia!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1013&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

With the last day to vote on Tuesday, Our Revolution is ramping up our
GOTV operation to make sure we re-elect Raphael Warnock.

This is a must-win race to secure the 51st vote in the Senate, diminish
the power of Joe Manchin, and defeat Hershel Walker once and for all.

In 2020, our targeted voter outreach helped Sen. Warnock win his first
Georgia runoff, and we can be the margin of victory in this race!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1014&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

Our Revolution Phonebank Force made 2 million calls and texts in the
midterms, and we’re keeping it going in Georgia.

Phone banker Paulina Oberg told us how rewarding it is to make personal
connections with voters, help overcome propaganda, and provide a service
to voters.

“One man planned to vote early, but with attempts at voter suppression, I
made sure to send him voter info,” Paulina said. “He was shocked his
polling place was different for the runoff, and we were both grateful for
the conversation.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8017?t=1015&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]This work is vital — and we need your help! Sign up now for a call
shift before Tuesday.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1016&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

If you can’t volunteer, you can help by contributing to our Georgia Runoff
Fund. Every donation helps power our targeted voter outreach to turn out
more than 150,000 Our Revolution members in the state!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8012?t=1017&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]DONATE TO OUR EMERGENCY GEORGIA FUND

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1018&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1019&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

DIRTY DEAL ROUND 2

In September, Our Revolution and our coalition fought to defeat the Dirty
Deal, making thousands of calls to pressure Congress — and won — but we
knew it wasn’t the end.

Now, it’s rearing its ugly head as Manchin moves to attach his Dirty Deal
to upcoming must-pass legislation before the end of the year.

Sen. Jeff Merkley (D-OR) joined our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8076?t=1020&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]National Organizing Call to
organize for Round 2 against this toxic deal that would sacrifice lives
and reverse climate steps.

“We’ve got to say ‘hell no’ to any side deal that fast-tracks fossil
fuels,” Merkley said. “We can’t say we’re fixing the climate crisis while
funding more oil and gas projects.”

You can take action to stop the Dirty Deal by [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7641?t=1021&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]calling your senator,
using this [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8077?t=1022&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]toolkit to set up a meeting with your Reps, or sign up to
be part of our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/dirty_deal_ty/?t=1023&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]Rapid Response Team.

★ ★ ★

MAKE AMAZON PAY

Amazon is squeezing every last drop it can from workers, communities, and
the planet. That’s why Our Revolution led protests across America on Black
Friday as part of a global day of action to Make Amazon Pay.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1024&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

“We’re calling on Amazon to pay — pay their workers, pay their taxes, and
pay for the damage they’re causing through their business model,” Our
Revolution Political Director Aaron Chappell told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8078?t=1025&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]TAG24 NEWS.

We proudly stood in solidarity with 80 unions and groups striking and
rallying against the corporate giant in 32 countries — from Bangladesh to
Germany, Colombia to Italy.

Our Revolution led actions in Philadelphia, PA; Cambridge, MA; Joliet, IN;
Detroit, MI; and more. In NYC, we protested outside of Jeff Bezos’
penthouse; and in Washington DC, we rallied at Amazon Fresh.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1026&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

In Bessemer, AL we stood with Amazon workers fighting for a union. “These
workers — whether they’re working in the plant, the facility, or driving
trucks — deserve to be protected,” Our Revolution Birmingham co-chair Eric
Hall told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8079?t=1027&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]WVTM News.

Amazon workers are going through one of the toughest and longest shopping
seasons after the corporation announced plans to lay off 10,000 employees
last month.

In Detroit, warehouse workers delivered a petition demanding better wages,
safety, schedules, and more. “As they marched on the boss, others
spontaneously joined them, chanting and cheering,” Our Revolution
Massachusetts Organizer Rand Wilson said on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8076?t=1028&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]National Organizing
Call.

“Amazon is being unfair and unjust,” Our Revolution organizer Susan
Steigerwalt told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8080?t=1029&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]WWJ News Radio 950 in Detroit. Susan said the company
should start with workers' rights, recognize the unions and stop illegally
fighting organizing efforts.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1030&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

Workers in St. Louis, Germany, France, Poland, and others also walked out
for strikes, Wilson said. We may be divided by geography, but we’re united
to Make Amazon Pay.

On Nov. 23rd, our activists delivered 70k petition signatures at Amazon HQ
in Seattle in solidarity with First Nations people in South Africa calling
to halt a new headquarters on sacred land.

“The global solidarity we saw was pretty amazing,” said Our Revolution
Comms Director Paco Fabian. “A company like Amazon can operate across
borders, and it’s about time we started taking action across borders in
support of workers.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1031&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

On Monday, President Biden — calling himself a “proud pro-labor president”
— called for Congress to override rail workers’ no-vote on a contract with
zero paid sick days, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8081?t=1032&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]Jacobin reported.

“A ‘pro-labor’ President would force the corporate bosses to take the
workers’ deal, not the other way around,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8082?t=1033&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]VICE quoted Our Revolution
on Wednesday.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1034&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

Bernie Sanders and the CPC made a push to include 7 days of paid sick
leave, but while it passed the House, it failed in the Senate. This is not
the end, we won’t stop fighting against the corporate forces harming
working people.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1035&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

US Rep. Ro Khanna is pushing to attach a $15 federal minimum wage to the
NDAA — the ‘must-pass’ annual military spending bill Dems are working to
pass by the end of the year.

By contrast, Joe Manchin is trying to use the same tactic to pass his
Dirty Deal to fast-track fossil fuel projects.

“If Big Oil wants to hold the NDAA hostage to weaken environmental
protections, then progressives should demand a $15 wage as part of
securing our votes,” Ro told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8083?t=1036&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]TYT.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1037&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

Last week, we asked Our Revolution their priorities in this final stretch
before Republicans take control of the House in January.

Respondents chose their top three issues they’d like to pressure Congress
to take action on, and here are the results!

84% Voting Rights - 69% Codify Roe - 59% Debt Ceiling - 45% Dirty Deal -
39% Child Tax Credit - 32% Fund the NLRB - 28% Student Loan Relief - 26%
Paid Family Leave

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1038&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

ORMD 2023 LEGISLATIVE FORUM

Our Revolution Maryland is already gearing up for action in Annapolis in
2023! Our Revolution leader and State Delegate Sheila Ruth will be leading
a Forum on Legislative Priorities this week with five of our endorsed
progressive allies in the State Assembly.

They’ll preview their top action items for the upcoming General Assembly
Session and we’ll also talk about the issues that matter most to our
members — from criminal justice reform to healthcare to raising wages for
workers.

And most importantly, we’re going to talk about our plan to organize to
win real progress when legislators arrive at the state house in January.

The Maryland 2023 General Assembly Session Forum will be held virtually
from 7-8 pm ET on Wednesday.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8084?t=1039&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]RSVP HERE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1040&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1041&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

Our Revolution is going all-in to re-elect Senator Raphael Warnock in the
Georgia Runoff. Help us out-organize the right-wing money and propaganda,
turn out 150,000 progressive voters in Georgia, and defeat Hershel Walker
once and for all.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8012?t=1042&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]DONATE TO OUR GEORGIA RUNOFF FUND!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1043&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

Our Revolution Phonebank Force is making hundreds of thousands of calls to
tip the balance in the Georgia Runoff by Tuesday. Volunteer with us to
help elect Senator Warnock and defeat Herschel Walker!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8017?t=1044&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]MAKE CALLS TO GEORGIA

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1045&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

When you become a sustaining member of Our Revolution for $5 or more,
we’ll send you this limited edition Bernie’s Mittens holiday ornament.
Made of premium seed paper, this is a unique no-waste gift — simply plant,
water & grow wildflowers! Includes ribbon/hemp tie.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8085?t=1046&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]ORDER YOUR ORNAMENT

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1047&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution for just $5/mo. and get your
official membership card. For $10, get our collectible sticker 6-pack —
$15, get the stickers + a poster — $27, get both + a tote bag — $50, get
it ALL + a T-shirt!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1048&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8075?t=1049&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ][IMG]

WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=3804%2E5885482%2EimhhGd ]Website |

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We beat plenty of the Kanye West-types that Trump has elevated over the years from the fringes of US politics, in November’s election. Now we must do the same to Herschel Walker, so we can keep yet another Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in office, pushing for our goal of full equality for all.
body:
Georgia’s ‘Kanye West’
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T43c5ab05-82e5-45a5-b01c-f6e5313488cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Donald Trump had a dinner at Mar-a-Lago with anti-Semite Kanye West and Holocaust denier Nick Fuentes. At first Trump tried to deny it, but it's been reported in multiple outlets right down to the specifics of the conversation._** **_Since then, Kanye praised Nazis in an interview with Alex Jones that, as one Twitter wag put it, made Alex Jones look like the reasonable person in the room. These are the kinds of friends Trump has._** _**Trump is also a close friend, political mentor and supporter of Herschel Walker's, who's made numerous despicably anti-Semitic remarks. Trump has repeatedly campaigned for Walker in Georgia’s critical Senate race.**_ | [**_$5. $10. $25. These are the kinds of donations that could make the difference between six more years of Senator Raphael Warnock ... or Senator-elect Herschel Walker. The December 6th runoff election matters to the whole country._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf56cacd-65cc-4bc0-a0c2-d3b40ac38418/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Walker's election would further mainstream fringe figures who hold racist, misogynist, anti-gay and anti-Semitic views. It'****s becoming a dangerous threat to inspire more violence, of the kind we've seen most recently in Colorado Springs.**_ **_WALKER’S BRAND OF EXTREMISM PUTS ALL OF OUR FAMILIES IN DANGER._**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Help fight extremism in Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T930352fa-1cec-4aef-af7a-16876852f3ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_We beat back many of the radicalized figures that Trump elevated from the fringes of US politics in November, candidates such as Kari Lake, Doug Mastriano and Tudor Dixon, to elect Democrats devoted to equality. Now we must do the same to Herschel Walker, so we can keep yet another Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in office, pushing for our goal of full equality for all._** [**_Will you join us in sending Senator Warnock $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to keep Senator Warnock in office and stop hate from having yet another representative in the Senate?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e4ead18-3e31-4568-82cf-1d0134e3cfaf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for caring about ALL Americans.**
---
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. body:
I know a good candidate when I see one; they’re hard to come by. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=985ff261142a48dbb36009b108045ec2&_e=eJYr-NplxeaSEt4SlaFNy-sDJn0DEjmyfQuISXBIqy2s7oZYDAw7OH3m8-4jV6H-hkbysqE_MIC9XRdp19FfEZ27pHAS1naVimP0PQSrHvG0B_z7dMPRjMtn4oQwTeF_VrPDCbfVaVqTMxVAfvpMpn_DgVr6rMjIlfdzu2288eUtct134wzKY-WJ0esIC1DCfnrt9sHh-iV1VPi2KiFY2OloqULshAH7yRtqMBpVw4hP1PUf6S2PuJYaMn1UgcUx7NNpt8FLjAO5QZX6vVjLXu4MeZnFGW2dt5_4x5jSWOrzM7vMAgAPh9rQ_m4KOr5Tn_oU9uX7Rz0uVtVpdyzf74kxjBbXkDbLCH0kIW3O8-tp6ZosrcAcdM3RAgrtnR3xSc6q8MxDGsH8nW_isvr-5cTLquviOfQQvGy_pP3ThkRWnCX4XwO6meaq_-9BaAg1wxa7ctfaW3Lsv75eHaTzFg%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

Most folks get into politics for all the wrong reasons. Some candidates run because of their egos or desire for fame. Others want to cash in with a lucrative book deal. Some even run because they want a stepping-stone to a higher office. It's sad, really.

**Herschel Walker is different. He's not a politician.**

Herschel doesn't need fortune or fame. He already has both.

Herschel knows America is going in the wrong direction...and he simply wants to help.

**Herschel Walker is running because Raphael Warnock is a wolf in sheep's clothing and must be defeated.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=985ff261142a48dbb36009b108045ec2&_e=eJYr-NplxeaSEt4SlaFNy-sDJn0DEjmyfQuISXBIqy2s7oZYDAw7OH3m8-4jV6H-hkbysqE_MIC9XRdp19FfEZ27pHAS1naVimP0PQSrHvG0B_z7dMPRjMtn4oQwTeF_VrPDCbfVaVqTMxVAfvpMpn_DgVr6rMjIlfdzu2288eUtct134wzKY-WJ0esIC1DCfnrt9sHh-iV1VPi2KiFY2OloqULshAH7yRtqMBpVw4hP1PUf6S2PuJYaMn1UgcUx7NNpt8FLjAO5QZX6vVjLXu4MeZnFGW2dt5_4x5jSWOqaBiV6K-akVO7qaMNfB-LCIhLDRUIdaX45v3kI3MUyxXFZwjxt2o5hKxPiiRP4lBS-B483CLuJXvpozOIHo_rMgcrvsldoCtqJyFEGCT32Wmv8NizVDNMxytGvbGl36Cb5V-27HpbQPVIFZ5MOzHSFeJbHqfCoYsL7f1ag1SVW0g%3D%3D)
Senator Warnock is a radical liberal who votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time, but he campaigns like a moderate in Georgia. **[We've got one last chance to stop him before it's too late.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=985ff261142a48dbb36009b108045ec2&_e=eJYr-NplxeaSEt4SlaFNy-sDJn0DEjmyfQuISXBIqy2s7oZYDAw7OH3m8-4jV6H-hkbysqE_MIC9XRdp19FfEZ27pHAS1naVimP0PQSrHvG0B_z7dMPRjMtn4oQwTeF_VrPDCbfVaVqTMxVAfvpMpn_DgVr6rMjIlfdzu2288eUtct134wzKY-WJ0esIC1DCfnrt9sHh-iV1VPi2KiFY2OloqULshAH7yRtqMBpVw4hP1PUf6S2PuJYaMn1UgcUx7NNpt8FLjAO5QZX6vVjLXu4MeZnFGW2dt5_4x5jSWOqA7mRGtwmgezHx_c_79Et9XEonNOZQ_Yaosik2_I6Hs6T146jXvz2kfgAW7HzyPnUEUI9nN9sWqCtSyfOFmfGYASIyWYS4SV3ZKjtqrOhF618PmUxJCzcEFx6dQui5wiSpF7BAR5SFRCPUZJmMz1n-OZB9B_7dPvmrE3xFtsAT1g%3D%3D)**

Even after spending nearly $120 million in the general election, Raphael Warnock still couldn't get a majority of voters to support him. Now he's in a runoff election with Herschel Walker, and we're in the final days of this race. We need to win this final Senate race of 2022, **[so I'm asking you to donate to Herschel Walker's campaign today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=985ff261142a48dbb36009b108045ec2&_e=eJYr-NplxeaSEt4SlaFNy-sDJn0DEjmyfQuISXBIqy2s7oZYDAw7OH3m8-4jV6H-hkbysqE_MIC9XRdp19FfEZ27pHAS1naVimP0PQSrHvG0B_z7dMPRjMtn4oQwTeF_VrPDCbfVaVqTMxVAfvpMpn_DgVr6rMjIlfdzu2288eUtct134wzKY-WJ0esIC1DCfnrt9sHh-iV1VPi2KiFY2OloqULshAH7yRtqMBpVw4hP1PUf6S2PuJYaMn1UgcUx7NNpt8FLjAO5QZX6vVjLXu4MeZnFGW2dt5_4x5jSWOp0un1KIhxrYFQqHh_JTh4Z0qUYU4orDC497h-MM3FIT-WGTT0Y9WCgmHb7HMDlUO7LjRa7QS9nXLVsBKIrV0r8WUgm0e99bDlqLW0aDjHv7SbSkhSHhU_rruUwdneE0ar2KvNbjZ5yUu4uVBmfSQcHU1nbU0X9YT9C5lumZud_YQ%3D%3D)**

Herschel's campaign is being massively outraised by Senator Warnock and his liberal allies. There's no sugar coating it - it's been brutal to watch Herschel get outspent 2 to 1 on television. But the race is TIED, so we have a genuine shot at winning on Tuesday.

If you're mad that Republicans lost critical Senate races in Nevada, Arizona, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania on November 8th, **[will you donate $4 right now and help ensure we don't lose a 5th winnable race this year?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=985ff261142a48dbb36009b108045ec2&_e=eJYr-NplxeaSEt4SlaFNy-sDJn0DEjmyfQuISXBIqy2s7oZYDAw7OH3m8-4jV6H-hkbysqE_MIC9XRdp19FfEZ27pHAS1naVimP0PQSrHvG0B_z7dMPRjMtn4oQwTeF_VrPDCbfVaVqTMxVAfvpMpn_DgVr6rMjIlfdzu2288eUtct134wzKY-WJ0esIC1DCfnrt9sHh-iV1VPi2KiFY2OloqULshAH7yRtqMBpVw4hP1PUf6S2PuJYaMn1UgcUx7NNpt8FLjAO5QZX6vVjLXu4MeZnFGW2dt5_4x5jSWOr-TufHn99578bu3jXhEby327hNvOC-u_8bzB6FpgPgw-XBQbtl2MQBGk-5tGkgLTHOfzFGLAJjsZwBysomcmUlp_pF5BbyqDsQxBDWLxJCiqm5ouVsnYilsmXuFTBJXLN9ytDCDQwG4rt0j62jkn7TuoHrceSm46BiL09uzroQ8w%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=985ff261142a48dbb36009b108045ec2&_t=b9wEv36-FMU0dXvyU6sz6y5r9M8BtxxNTrMdJikoN6gYrBAqcmjVbMSbOuEerG5ouj8bRw6_1rFUkcuGDTXldmTBL6TMYVaGvXaV2VJwr2U%3D)._
clean_body: I know a good candidate when I see one; they’re hard to come by. | Fellow American, Most folks get into politics for all the wrong reasons. Some candidates run because of their egos or desire for fame. Others want to cash in with a lucrative book deal. Some even run because they want a stepping-stone to a higher office. It's sad, really. Herschel Walker is different. He's not a politician. Herschel doesn't need fortune or fame. He already has both. Herschel knows America is going in the wrong direction...and he simply wants to help. Herschel Walker is running because Raphael Warnock is a wolf in sheep's clothing and must be defeated. Senator Warnock is a radical liberal who votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time, but he campaigns like a moderate in Georgia. Even after spending nearly $120 million in the general election, Raphael Warnock still couldn't get a majority of voters to support him. Now he's in a runoff election with Herschel Walker, and we're in the final days of this race. We need to win this final Senate race of 2022, Herschel's campaign is being massively outraised by Senator Warnock and his liberal allies. There's no sugar coating it - it's been brutal to watch Herschel get outspent 2 to 1 on television. But the race is TIED, so we have a genuine shot at winning on Tuesday. If you're mad that Republicans lost critical Senate races in Nevada, Arizona, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania on November 8th, Thank you, John Kennedy | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Waffle House [CLICK TO WATCH]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

Just when I think I've seen it all, something new happens in the Georgia Senate runoff.

**Joe Biden campaigned yesterday for Raphael Warnock ... in BOSTON.**

The Warnock campaign is scared to be seen with President Biden on the same stage, so they sent him to NEW ENGLAND where he attended a phone bank at a union hall making calls to voters in GEORGIA.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020193:JJBljEGWN:m:1:3331703221:25BE874F6466D644693E505A44C64C49:r)
**Not only did President Biden make calls into Georgia to get out the vote for Warnock, but he also helped Warnock raise MILLIONS of LIBERAL DOLLARS at a Boston fundraiser.**

Peter, yesterday I campaigned for Herschel IN GEORGIA (I know - a shocking concept). While I was there, I recorded a short video about the race after a quick lunch at Waffle House (a great Georgia-based company). **[Click here to watch the video:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020193:JJBljEGWN:m:1:3331703221:25BE874F6466D644693E505A44C64C49:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020193:JJBljEGWN:m:1:3331703221:25BE874F6466D644693E505A44C64C49:r)
**Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time, but he doesn't want Georgians to know. Biden's policies are so unpopular in Georgia that Senator Warnock sent the President to campaign 1,000 miles away from Atlanta!**

Democrats are pouring money into Georgia from liberal states like Massachusetts and California because they know Raphael Warnock is a reliable vote for their radical agenda.

**[Don't let Massachusetts buy a 3rd senator. Please, help Herschel in the final hours of this race. Chip in $25, $30, or even $34 for #34.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020193:JJBljEGWN:m:1:3331703221:25BE874F6466D644693E505A44C64C49:r)**

With the runoff election on Tuesday, IT'S NOW OR NEVER!

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020193:JJBljEGWN:m:1:3331703221:25BE874F6466D644693E505A44C64C49:r)

Lindsey Graham

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020193:JJBljEGWN:m:1:3331703221:25BE874F6466D644693E505A44C64C49:r)

name: Jessi Melton, Parental Rights Advocate
subject: America’s children are in danger. 🚨
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013984:6QtLNEGHN:m:1:3253819041:E7FB1080758D8DA05FD7F86BD2F76FC7:r)
Peter,

Earlier this year, a Florida school board in Tampa allowed books with instructive **explicit** gay sexual content in _middle schools_.

After this book was brought to parents' attention, many formally requested its removal. Still, the **school committee voted to keep this book even though it provides 'age 11 to 13-year-olds' with explicit instructions on anal sex and gay hookup apps.**

Let me introduce myself. My name is Jessi Melton, President of the Parents Union of America (PUOA).

I'm working with candidates and organizations right now to remove these perverse school board members and have them investigated for attempting to groom American children.

That's why we're raising $25,000 by the end of the month to go after these predatory school boards.

[_**Can you help protect America 's children with a gift of $25, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013984:6QtLNEGHN:m:1:3253819041:E7FB1080758D8DA05FD7F86BD2F76FC7:r)

One particular book,_This Book is Gay_ , includes:
* Instructions to young boys on performing anal and oral sex
* How to use a predatory homosexual hook-up app called Grindr
* A section called "Boy-on-Boy Sex" contains cartoon sketches of a full-grown naked man with facial and pubic hair.

_**[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013984:6QtLNEGHN:m:1:3253819041:E7FB1080758D8DA05FD7F86BD2F76FC7:r)**_

_This Book is Gay_ is just one of the dozens of books available to middle school students that exposes them to lurid sexual material.

[_**Your urgent gift of $10, $25, $50, or more goes towards our efforts to remove these school board members.**__**Click here to protect our children**_ _** >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013984:6QtLNEGHN:m:1:3253819041:E7FB1080758D8DA05FD7F86BD2F76FC7:r)

**Parents Union of America is actively electing conservative school board members in the largest school districts, and Tampa Bay is at the top of our list.**

Our mission is to fully restore traditional American values into our public school system, with God at the center of learning.

PUOA only assists candidates who display the ability and willingness to fight for our values by going on the offensive in defense of our children.

We are focusing on the most populous school districts. Then we will continue to expand throughout the United States...state by state, county to county.

We're fighting for parents and children to take back public schools. Peter, I know this is a lot to ask, but America's children are in danger.

**Can you help PUOA reach our goal by sending your urgent gift today? Click below.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013985:6QtLNEGHN:m:1:3253819041:E7FB1080758D8DA05FD7F86BD2F76FC7:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013986:6QtLNEGHN:m:1:3253819041:E7FB1080758D8DA05FD7F86BD2F76FC7:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013987:6QtLNEGHN:m:1:3253819041:E7FB1080758D8DA05FD7F86BD2F76FC7:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013988:6QtLNEGHN:m:1:3253819041:E7FB1080758D8DA05FD7F86BD2F76FC7:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013989:6QtLNEGHN:m:1:3253819041:E7FB1080758D8DA05FD7F86BD2F76FC7:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013990:6QtLNEGHN:m:1:3253819041:E7FB1080758D8DA05FD7F86BD2F76FC7:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013991:6QtLNEGHN:m:1:3253819041:E7FB1080758D8DA05FD7F86BD2F76FC7:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62013984:6QtLNEGHN:m:1:3253819041:E7FB1080758D8DA05FD7F86BD2F76FC7:r)

Thank you for fighting to protect our children.

Jessi Melton

Friend, I really need your help: **We need to wire $80,000 to the TV stations by 8 p.m. TONIGHT to keep our runoff ads on the air – but right now, we're falling _just_ short.**
GOP donors have already poured over $58 MILLION into Herschel Walker's campaign, and Mitch McConnell and his allies are already flooding the airwaves with attack ads to defeat me and turn Georgia red.
**We know this race is going to be neck and neck, so the ONLY way we can pull ahead and win is if we can stay live on the airwaves and****reach voters with our people-powered message****. That's why I'm asking you to pitch in right now:**

Thank you,

Raphael Warnock
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I'm grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we're in a runoff election against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win.

Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That's why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

name: Indiana Dems HQ
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, Indiana Democrats held the line in November and we’re building momentum going into the end of the year. Something that doesn’t get said enough is __thank you__. Reelecting Frank Mrvan to Congress and making inroads at the Statehouse would not have been possible without the continued generous support of Democrats like you. **We are deeply grateful for everything you do.** In 2023, we have the opportunity to flip key mayoral and municipal races that will help us create a better future for our families and position us for even bigger wins in 2024. As we head into the final weeks of the year, we’re focused on building on what we’ve been doing. And we look forward to doing that work with you. Let’s go! Indiana Democrats

subject: I need 5 minutes of your time ⏰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise with a critical finance update for all Conservative Patriots across America.
[**We just BLEW past our first major deadline since the midterm elections, and we fell short of our critical fundraising goal. We now run a serious risk of losing out on saving our country for good.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014203:JFf5NEGmN:m:1:3331703221:978272A60A166EF4D4CBC9F0DA0978B6:r)
[****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014203:JFf5NEGmN:m:1:3331703221:978272A60A166EF4D4CBC9F0DA0978B6:r)

HELP SAVE OUR COUNTRY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014203:JFf5NEGmN:m:1:3331703221:978272A60A166EF4D4CBC9F0DA0978B6:r)****
****
Peter, when we told you Radical Leftists were moving to remove and replace Conservatives Clarence Thomas, Amy Coney Barrett, and Brett Kavanaugh from the Supreme Court... **too few stepped up.**
When we told you Washington DC's Far Left mayor was hatching a plot to make DC the 51st state and hand Democrats two new senators... **too few stepped up.**
When top Republicans warned illegal immigrants could be voting in our elections soon... **too few stepped up.**
[**If our top grassroots Patriots ignore critical fundraising deadlines like this one, we could be in serious danger of losing to the Democrats.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014203:JFf5NEGmN:m:1:3331703221:978272A60A166EF4D4CBC9F0DA0978B6:r)
[EXTENDED DEADLINE:
HELP SAVE OUR COUNTRY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014203:JFf5NEGmN:m:1:3331703221:978272A60A166EF4D4CBC9F0DA0978B6:r)
Your help to salvage this deadline would mean everything. Election integrity, our Conservative Supreme Court Majority, DC Statehood, and our entire Conservative agenda hangs in the balance. Can you help us? Please?__
Thank you,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014203:JFf5NEGmN:m:1:3331703221:978272A60A166EF4D4CBC9F0DA0978B6:r)
Steve Scalise
Republican Majority Leader-elect

name: Marco Rubio
subject: 3 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I know I've reached out a lot these last few months. I know I've told you again and again how important the Georgia race is. And I know you know what's at stake if we lose. But now July, August, September, October and November are gone. The last End of Month deadline this long cycle has passed.
**Herschel Walker is 3 days away from Election Day and we are out of time.**
Herschel's been outraised every quarter, outspent every month and with Election Day so close my team and I have decided to launch an **[EMERGENCY ELECTION FUND WITH 2X MATCHING](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014588:J8a0NEG2N:m:1:3317145305:B07E30F25B2EA02AC39A5EE6860BAB57:r "EMERGENCY ELECTION FUND WITH 2X MATCHING")** and we're looking to raise $500K before December 6th to try and Save Georgia!

---
---
| | | [CHIP IN TO HELP HERSCHEL](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014588:J8a0NEG2N:m:1:3317145305:B07E30F25B2EA02AC39A5EE6860BAB57:r "CHIP IN TO
HELP HERSCHEL")
---
Your support will go directly towards restoring the American Dream and getting Herschel across the finish line in these final days. **I need the people who care about the American Dream to step up now because we are officially out of time and we need your help RIGHT NOW.**
---
| | | [RUSH IN A 2X MATCH DONATION >>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014588:J8a0NEG2N:m:1:3317145305:B07E30F25B2EA02AC39A5EE6860BAB57:r "RUSH IN A 2X
MATCH DONATION >>>")
---
**[Please know I wouldn't be doing this if the situation wasn't dire. I need you now more than ever. Please step up now so Herschel has the resources he needs to keep defending the American Dream.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014588:J8a0NEG2N:m:1:3317145305:B07E30F25B2EA02AC39A5EE6860BAB57:r "Please know I
wouldn’t be doing this if the situation wasn’t dire. I need you now more than ever. Please step up now so Herschel has the resources he
needs to keep defending the American Dream.")**

Thank you,
Marco
---
| | |

* * *

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014589:J8a0NEG2N:m:1:3317145305:B07E30F25B2EA02AC39A5EE6860BAB57:r "https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/american-dream-footer/?recurring=true")
---

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014589:J8a0NEG2N:m:1:3317145305:B07E30F25B2EA02AC39A5EE6860BAB57:r "Join my fight to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014589:J8a0NEG2N:m:1:3317145305:B07E30F25B2EA02AC39A5EE6860BAB57:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN
DREAM")
---

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014590:J8a0NEG2N:m:1:3317145305:B07E30F25B2EA02AC39A5EE6860BAB57:r "Stop the Dems Footer")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014590:J8a0NEG2N:m:1:3317145305:B07E30F25B2EA02AC39A5EE6860BAB57:r "If
you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.")**
| [STOP THE DEMS](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62014590:J8a0NEG2N:m:1:3317145305:B07E30F25B2EA02AC39A5EE6860BAB57:r "STOP THE DEMS")

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85fd0d2a9d30419c90717c15a9b3e828&_e=1bHXpvT2v8gzRrvax5ucC8G56rWuOkBWVoj3ZZVnFPdwJbCslvk19t4ISwCxgaQ0JZ6_bBVd5-awK7_f2IilGUS6lvHlToyn1KiDcB0QdoUdjyl0fJzoxUfo4TyZeebWOW7jwBI-nXT1D5gt725vX6ROSpr0iSjRLbrKXI_GWNZIrd7en0qbEK-sjejIVSNITff9x9GJqDVui6O32Mz26RfyXLHB5bkARoQAlGhkvshC1m-qgb80eqMGO4I2XZ6y9XM3Gf8L4o21tSUcOY-mYFgdlGdmRIIWsR3kJBxz74ZUDpBnm07hyNBk_LEwMNwhzoBYSxG-n-WA48o28yQgbAn8Bb-KQLWPHts2OTUd8H40Dr7ZDyEU3F9tn5gq8uStkUSN9sjsD7pbyDlANa7Cpg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85fd0d2a9d30419c90717c15a9b3e828&_e=1bHXpvT2v8gzRrvax5ucC8G56rWuOkBWVoj3ZZVnFPdwJbCslvk19t4ISwCxgaQ0JZ6_bBVd5-awK7_f2IilGUS6lvHlToyn1KiDcB0QdoUdjyl0fJzoxUfo4TyZeebWOW7jwBI-nXT1D5gt725vX6ROSpr0iSjRLbrKXI_GWNZIrd7en0qbEK-sjejIVSNITff9x9GJqDVui6O32Mz26RfyXLHB5bkARoQAlGhkvsh3_jFiqjfk-BTpqpC2AwmHdDPZp6niYK-sdEnHb3iEonpAKBlrWXXze_MggNu5h1m5RkGulTwmZnKepL6MpQ0CuDZR5tuiJLl6dksHCUNmMkaFxRhOiZMc8FK8yoskP2BuioISSZ95rCbiiKiZD3tFJrthd-hvKZH9QyzspIuQeg%3D%3D)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85fd0d2a9d30419c90717c15a9b3e828&_e=1bHXpvT2v8gzRrvax5ucC8G56rWuOkBWVoj3ZZVnFPdwJbCslvk19t4ISwCxgaQ0JZ6_bBVd5-awK7_f2IilGUS6lvHlToyn1KiDcB0QdoUdjyl0fJzoxUfo4TyZeebWOW7jwBI-nXT1D5gt725vX6ROSpr0iSjRLbrKXI_GWNZIrd7en0qbEK-sjejIVSNITff9x9GJqDVui6O32Mz26RfyXLHB5bkARoQAlGhkvshwIToqMGnOp9H9c9tU81UoAED-wPJhSRE6Go6GYx8PzrfOBlpyOH9d4toVnpH2_zCz3ZBLGPCFxsejYeo4FEuOWYj0QPGr1zB1DM0xPWpMPrRY_xCfuydNmxC8uuR2KnrzO21eV7GRoC71YBs36Ru3FqZnEd9LJg0zVndNBks4Hw%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=85fd0d2a9d30419c90717c15a9b3e828&_t=jsW7IT5YCX1cPkOcfcMl4MOli5E0MoAp85l6MlQoZijwxxqgsTAxOICXP5_pIfd1CZBUi8VTDyMF_W91Rdikzn0JMVAJoFo8tp3FR53IYRY%3D)

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Will you share what’s on your mind?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
It will only take a few minutes to fill out this survey. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55508761/381893054/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221203_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzdlZGYwMS01ZjczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VuUELz6dBvH5cS_OftQFmWN8rfCGoovdd-NVOh6oMJA=&emci=bd229117-c771-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=e37edf01-5f73-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=252045)

We’re hard at work in the Senate fighting to deliver for New Mexico and our country, folks — and our work is far from over this year. I’m proud of the wins we’ve already secured. Just this week, we passed the _Respect for Marriage Act_ to protect every individual’s right to marry who they love and my _STOP Act_ to prevent exporting and trafficking of stolen Tribal cultural items. Two other huge priorities of mine are passing the _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_ to enact key wildlife protections to conserve animals and plants for generations to come and congressional authorization of New Mexico’s early education constitutional amendment to invest in our children’s futures. [**But hearing your priorities is equally as important to me as we head into the end of the year and the coming months: Will you take just a few minutes to fill out my priorities survey?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55508762/381893055/-265895864?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221203_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzdlZGYwMS01ZjczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VuUELz6dBvH5cS_OftQFmWN8rfCGoovdd-NVOh6oMJA=&emci=bd229117-c771-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=e37edf01-5f73-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=252045) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55508763/381893056/-265895864?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221203_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzdlZGYwMS01ZjczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VuUELz6dBvH5cS_OftQFmWN8rfCGoovdd-NVOh6oMJA=&emci=bd229117-c771-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=e37edf01-5f73-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=252045)

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Getting rich off of taxpayers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
A few data points that show why we need better oversight over private insurance companies.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15520%2E3422442%2EnEKMGz)
Big insurance companies are ripping us all off.
**This spring:** During a congressional hearing, Katie asked experts about the cost differences between private insurance companies and Medicare. They told us that Medicare is a far more efficient steward of taxpayer dollars. **Private insurance companies spend 17% more on administrative costs than Medicare does.** That’s because private insurance companies spend money on things like marketing, commercials, and stock buybacks.
**This summer:** The Justice Department found private insurance companies were **falsifying patient records to profit off of Medicare,** which means they’re essentially stealing taxpayer dollars.
**Just recently:** A new federal audit found that Big Insurance **makes millions each year** by claiming Medicare Advantage patients are sicker than they really are.
In 2021, our country’s largest insurer—UnitedHealth Group—made nearly **75% of their money off of taxpayers.** Meanwhile, they just reported they made over **$5 billion** in profit just between July and September of this year.
**Katie is pushing for stronger oversight of these taxpayer-backed plans so we can finally hold these corporations accountable for their greed.** Our healthcare system should serve patients, not insurance companies profit margins.
--Team Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE03_INS_20221203_V1_F&t=2&akid=15520%2E3422442%2EnEKMGz)**

Peter,

Just when I think I've seen it all, something new happens in the Georgia Senate runoff.

**Joe Biden campaigned yesterday for Raphael Warnock ... in BOSTON.**

The Warnock campaign is scared to be seen with President Biden on the same stage, so they sent him to NEW ENGLAND where he attended a phone bank at a union hall making calls to voters in GEORGIA.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020138:6o8hsEGNe:m:1:3317145305:A84DDEF8B1CC5DD81202E75EBD41BD84:r)
**Not only did President Biden make calls into Georgia to get out the vote for Warnock, but he also helped Warnock raise MILLIONS of LIBERAL DOLLARS at a Boston fundraiser.**

Peter, yesterday I campaigned for Herschel IN GEORGIA (I know - a shocking concept). While I was there, I recorded a short video about the race after a quick lunch at Waffle House (a great Georgia-based company). **[Click here to watch the video:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62020138:6o8hsEGNe:m:1:3317145305:A84DDEF8B1CC5DD81202E75EBD41BD84:r)**

Democrats are pouring money into Georgia from liberal states like Massachusetts and California because they know Raphael Warnock is a reliable vote for their radical agenda.

Peter, we have THREE DAYS until Election Day for the Georgia Senate runoff.

With the race so close, everything is going to come down to how many Democrats we’re able to reach between now and December 6th.

We’re launching a one day donor drive to pull together as much grassroots support as possible to push Rev. Warnock over the finish line.

name: Conservatives Give
subject: It’s ready to ship to you
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b4ee9911dd564ce7a171113616b21a71&_e=Afnq3J1OObXCjC1VR0o5wx1Q2nwgwGWNgbk3tatY0DofWLAs1lYUBYOpG438Xpac6XpMqjYwGu57E1W2RAzmE6cCO5FUQf5tZwdIgIEFkDteMggnjBrFRxtHCfasMIyCpQrDbciXJKpEKBHgW-93mSu9DB3wnD9UMyMrYcBK0S1HjFYQj4--4BoEIEWQRr8hYlPbbchrX6-A5qTo3OGGVLnVAFnkxu_oVb3YlTJaUR8Ob7wcJkWdNDcchvCnMB4gj6qXdPXHShfS5deSqWnVqnaFhk-YDQqpUZcTMEtusqR9JnhNupjZt5FwWrN78VERO0Tmvl2JHHRiXhO9pNt94os-P9QMxcrMioy0EO4_fsgJ2cGaG5bDlHyaeWp-UEe4)
---
| | Dear Friend,
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b4ee9911dd564ce7a171113616b21a71&_e=Afnq3J1OObXCjC1VR0o5wx1Q2nwgwGWNgbk3tatY0DofWLAs1lYUBYOpG438Xpac6XpMqjYwGu57E1W2RAzmE6cCO5FUQf5tZwdIgIEFkDteMggnjBrFRxtHCfasMIyCpQrDbciXJKpEKBHgW-93mSu9DB3wnD9UMyMrYcBK0S1HjFYQj4--4BoEIEWQRr8hYlPbbchrX6-A5qTo3OGGVLnVAFnkxu_oVb3YlTJaUR-tw6Fs6iT4lrBDWwuHZCBdYFckUN6COLjFmP9viE-ZSDxzd-f2DZOHkWg7WmAx31rRhstEnE_DFw0CqrwVhab16mJKbAVFFQHQNjovr_wL6Ife3Ahtd5mobziLwObct3gYKovxlXSzZPYADJ_njtbE)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b4ee9911dd564ce7a171113616b21a71&_e=Afnq3J1OObXCjC1VR0o5wx1Q2nwgwGWNgbk3tatY0DofWLAs1lYUBYOpG438Xpac6XpMqjYwGu57E1W2RAzmE6cCO5FUQf5tZwdIgIEFkDteMggnjBrFRxtHCfasMIyCpQrDbciXJKpEKBHgW-93mSu9DB3wnD9UMyMrYcBK0S1HjFYQj4--4BoEIEWQRr8hYlPbbchrX6-A5qTo3OGGVLnVAFnkxu_oVb3YlTJaUR_xjh_6DumeQ_L5dlrSYYjfUI0ZFPB2ygZAo2IS0EquUn5JR4n0WdhCAL2ZTka0UUzhdt6_Qre2stwpNF4-BExQpKcz0ePHQuo5Rrgm8HanMebdJ9WncMqtkMg6NiwXxQXvGfJwYEWUuPYCJ864X8N6)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b4ee9911dd564ce7a171113616b21a71&_e=Afnq3J1OObXCjC1VR0o5wx1Q2nwgwGWNgbk3tatY0DofWLAs1lYUBYOpG438Xpac6XpMqjYwGu57E1W2RAzmE6cCO5FUQf5tZwdIgIEFkDteMggnjBrFRxtHCfasMIyCpQrDbciXJKpEKBHgW-93mSu9DB3wnD9UMyMrYcBK0S1HjFYQj4--4BoEIEWQRr8hYlPbbchrX6-A5qTo3OGGVLnVAFnkxu_oVb3YlTJaUR98o9X2L1TB9pPAxOMB4nWMfVbuqhgquuVrnrmZ5xT9fsjtOoh46tor9ZhLm488ALA9GXMVE9MidTD2b-lDoAu6NH6oi-h9we5WncNbjBnOFSdBqM9JGF-k_7Xfd4rLTwN1NtHlNS6of5Pz-XWPrSyb)**

name: Warnock, R.
subject: Here's the fact of the matter, friend: If we win Georgia's critical runoff election, I will be the 51st vote for our bold Democratic agenda in the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Here's the fact of the matter, friend: **If we win Georgia's critical runoff election, I will be the 51st vote for our bold Democratic agenda in the Senate.**
The 51st vote for Supreme Court justices who will uphold our fundamental rights. The 51st vote to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law and restore abortion access nationwide. The 51st vote to protect and expand the right to vote. The 51st vote to lower everyday costs, increase access to health care, pass pro-climate policies, and so much more.
But friend, I'm neck and neck with my Trump-backed opponent, Herschel Walker – and GOP donors have already flooded his campaign with more than $58 million to defeat me.
**I've never been one to accept even a cent from corporate PACs, so I'm counting entirely on grassroots folks like you to help me fight back and win here in Georgia. With only 3 days to go until the runoff election, we don't have a second to waste, so please:**
**[Will you chip in $5 or more right now – any amount makes a difference – to keep Georgia blue, expand our Democratic Senate majority, and build a better, brighter future for us all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55492464/381876650/-598064402?amounts=,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5238-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2M1ZmZiMC0zYzczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mvJB03F9pRlcpDll9pFvmiR5xIxKLw8rZ7PplmgVYY0=)**

Together, I know we can win this. Thank you for all you do.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I'm grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we're in a runoff election against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win.

Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That's why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: 2022 December e-newsletter
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# 2022 December e-newsletter
News and information for District 5 in San Mateo County.
---
|
---
|
---
|
#### **Fourth annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive **
---
| After a two-year hiatus due to COVID, I’m delighted to invite you to join me and some of my best friends as we host the Fourth Annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive, 2 p.m. to 5 p.m., Saturday, December 10 at Classic Bowling Center, 900 King Drive in Daly City. Donate a new unwrapped toy and bowl for free. The event is cosponsored by my friend Keith Okada, who goes by Keith O, a world-class DJ and bowler who has been a fixture at Classic Bowling for 20 years now.
---
This is such a fun day to relax and have fun and to get your competitive juices flowing playing some ten-pin. Most importantly, though, it is a way to bring some joy to children in need during the holidays. Thank you to our partner Classic Bowling Center which has become a community gathering place for Daly City residents and hosts generations of family members. Hope to see you there!

To RSVP, contact Mike on my staff: [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org)
---
| **
Happy holidays from my family to yours** As the holidays draw closer and we approach 2023, I am so thankful to serve as your San Mateo County Supervisor. I am also thankful for my beautiful wife Ana and son Piero who both keep me grounded.

Piero was born during my first year in office and watching him grow up every day is the joy of our lives. I am also grateful to my staff for helping me to address the needs of my constituents in San Mateo County and for creating policy that will improve the lives of all county residents. As I finish my sixth year in office, I am honored to be a member of a Board of Supervisors that has made historic investments in reducing homelessness, creating affordable housing, removing guns from our streets, protecting women’s reproductive rights and protecting our environment. As the year comes to an end, I’d like to thank you all for taking the time to read our monthly newsletters and for your support. Happy Holidays, Merry Christmas and Happy New Year from my family to yours!
---
---
| **MTC’s Clipper Baypass Program a huge success ** As a member of the Metropolitan Transportation Commission, I am proud of the agency’s launching of the Clipper BayPass Program, which expanded eligibility to the program to study the impact of a single pass that will provide up to 50,000 Bay Area residents free access to nearly all bus, rail and ferry services in the nine-county region. Residents of 12 affordable housing communities managed by MidPen Housing in Alameda, San Mateo and Santa Clara counties were made eligible for the program in October of 2022. Select affordable housing communities managed by MidPen Housing in San Mateo County received free transit passes to use on any transit system in the Bay Area. The free passes assist socio-economic disadvantaged communities and students. SamTrans — in conjunction with other transit agencies participating in the Clipper fare payment system — is a key part of the program.
---

Clipper BayPass is the first initiative to be implemented based on recommendations of the Regional Fare Coordination/Integration Study, an 18-month study led by MTC and BART that focused on creating a more customer-friendly transit fare system in the Bay Area. Kudos to SamTrans and MidPen Housing for taking part in this program which supports economic empowerment and well-being. MidPen’s residents often face transportation and access barriers, and the Clipper BayPass presents significant cost-savings especially as we emerge from the pandemic. The MTC provides funds to transit agencies to offset the revenue impacts of the Clipper BayPass pilot, which is expected to conclude at the end of 2024. This program has been a huge success and may be expanded further in future years.
---
| **SMC Alert updated** An improved SMC Alert system brings new features for those who live and work in San Mateo County, including maps, images and multiple images in case emergency strikes such as wildfire, tsunami or earthquake. To sign up go to visit www.SMCalert.info. If you have alreaady opted-in to the system, current users are encouraged to create a new account to access the new features but those who do not will continue to receive messages through their existing account. As a member of the county’s Emergency Services Council, I have advocated for the expansion of the program for years and encourage all county residents to sign up for the free service.

---
Those who are signed up can now get messages via text, email and voice that include maps, images and multiple languages. The new features of SMC Alert are meant to empower residents further by providing key information to help keep them safe and navigate away from incidents like major traffic delays and detours, floods and mountain lions. The added capabilities are due to a new vendor, RAVE, which replaces former provider Everbridge, according to the County Manager’s Office. SMC Alert is a free notification system used to immediately alert you of urgent or emergency situations. Senders include the county and its cities; the new alert system has an improved identification component to show recipients exactly which agency sent the message. The new system also lets you choose to receive messages in English, Spanish or Simplified Chinese.
---
| **
COVID and flu vaccines urged** With COVID-19, RSV and flu circulating in our area, the county’s Health System is urging residents take steps to prevent these respiratory infections by wearing a high-quality mask indoors, staying up to date on vaccinations, washing your hands, avoiding touching your face, covering coughs, and cleaning surfaces. COVID-19 vaccines and boosters are widely available from health care providers and pharmacies, such as CVS, Safeway and Walgreens. For County Health’s pop-up clinics, please see the online calendar or go to MyTurn to schedule appointments. Flu vaccines are also available from health care providers and from County Health. See flu vaccine locations and schedules on MyTurn here and County Health’s pop-up flu clinics. To learn more click here: [https://www.smchealth.org/flu](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=7da289c5b5&e=c0babbc643).

**Battling food insecurity **
Food insecurity is a problem some residents may still face as we continue to emerge from the pandemic. Here are some resources residents can access: **CalFresh:**
Is a program for people with low-income who meet federal income eligibility rules and want to add to their budget to put healthy and nutritious food on the table. Website: [https://www.cdss.ca.gov/food-nutrition/calfresh](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=c114b4c484&e=c0babbc643) Contact: (650) 802-6576, [antorres@smcgov.org](mailto:antorres@smcgov.org) **Daly City Partnership:**
DC Partnership is a local partnership that was formed to guide collaborative efforts and connect our community to services that promote well-being. Check out their website for times and locations. Website: [https://www.dcpartnership.org/covid19/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=7b7370e45a&e=c0babbc643) **Second Harvest Food Bank:**
Second Harvest offers food at various locations throughout San Mateo County listed on its webpage. Website: [https://www.shfb.org/get-food/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=7d43862213&e=c0babbc643) Contacts: Call (800) 984-3663 or text GETFOOD to (408) 455-5181 **Interns wanted to join our team **

We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9. You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at mrichardson@smcgov.org

**Follow the Office on Social Media**
If you want to get more insight into our office please connect with us on social media. It’s also a great way to interact with the office and to get notifications on upcoming events. In friendship, David J. Canepa
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | 2022 December e-newsletter News and information for District 5 in San Mateo County. | | | Fourth annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive | After a two-year hiatus due to COVID, I’m delighted to invite you to join me and some of my best friends as we host the Fourth Annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive, 2 p.m. to 5 p.m., Saturday, December 10 at Classic Bowling Center, 900 King Drive in Daly City. Donate a new unwrapped toy and bowl for free. The event is cosponsored by my friend Keith Okada, who goes by Keith O, a world-class DJ and bowler who has been a fixture at Classic Bowling for 20 years now. This is such a fun day to relax and have fun and to get your competitive juices flowing playing some ten-pin. Most importantly, though, it is a way to bring some joy to children in need during the holidays. Thank you to our partner Classic Bowling Center which has become a community gathering place for Daly City residents and hosts generations of family members. Hope to see you there! To RSVP, contact Mike on my staff: mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org | Happy holidays from my family to yours As the holidays draw closer and we approach 2023, I am so thankful to serve as your San Mateo County Supervisor. I am also thankful for my beautiful wife Ana and son Piero who both keep me grounded. Piero was born during my first year in office and watching him grow up every day is the joy of our lives. I am also grateful to my staff for helping me to address the needs of my constituents in San Mateo County and for creating policy that will improve the lives of all county residents. As I finish my sixth year in office, I am honored to be a member of a Board of Supervisors that has made historic investments in reducing homelessness, creating affordable housing, removing guns from our streets, protecting women’s reproductive rights and protecting our environment. As the year comes to an end, I’d like to thank you all for taking the time to read our monthly newsletters and for your support. Residents of 12 affordable housing communities managed by MidPen Housing in Alameda, San Mateo and Santa Clara counties were made eligible for the program in October of 2022. # [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1405%2E5257348%2EORcm5O)
