---
**Early voting data shows that nearly a quarter of young people voting in this runoff election _didn’t turn out on November 8th._**
That’s the clearest indication yet how Rev. Warnock’s voter outreach team is still working to turn out new voters to get to the 50 percent plus one that he needs to prevail over Herschel Walker.
There is nothing more important to our progress in the next three days than winning this race. And we simply cannot have someone as hypocritical, dishonest, and opposed to women’s reproductive freedom as Herschel Walker if we’re going to make the progress the American people are demanding.
**[So Derek, I’m personally asking you to split $10 or whatever you can spare between Rev. Warnock’s campaign and ours.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em_warnock.fJ5pfg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221203_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=11&akid=1405%2E5257348%2EORcm5O)**
This is the very last election of this midterm cycle, and the stakes could not be higher to secure our 51st vote.
Thanks for doing what you can to support Rev. Warnock today.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1405%2E5257348%2EORcm5O) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1405%2E5257348%2EORcm5O)**

---

**Herschel Walker is different. He's not a politician.**

Even after spending nearly $120 million in the general election, Raphael Warnock still couldn't get a majority of voters to support him. Your $3 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.

Fellow American - it's Conference Championship Weekend in college football, so that means it's time for the SEC CHAMPIONSHIP in Atlanta!

**UGA Bulldogs vs. LSU Tigers**
I know what it's like to play in the big games. I was proud to help my fellow Dawgs win a National Championship in 1980! There's nothing like the roar of the crowd and the support of fans to encourage the team on the field, and Team Herschel is hoping for a big Bulldog win this afternoon.

Fellow American, after the big game today, are you ready to **FLIP GEORGIA'S SENATE SEAT** so our state is **BULLDOG RED** on Tuesday?

We're in overtime in the Senate runoff, but it all ends with Election Day on Tuesday. Just like UGA, our campaign has been working hard every day to win back this seat.

Before the game is over today, **[will you help us expand our voter turnout efforts for the final 72 hours of this runoff?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=537c0c30f6194e8bbae00332f82cf15d&_e=ZBTlT6kkejYnC-H95wA_5XGuBndhoE3xTe3Ugd8X-y0i3Q3skivqL1oK9-lnDyanWEwMQvoRSl_zbX5GK5GxF8nSdQDlFukeQ5Eqxt9k-1X4Dunqwq4iai66L9Vqmqv8TJoCXRa2JFQNfd0JChOtmpDSRQt00MMfFP7i-m0NjNQ3o-OUypmccZ8dQxr9WrNqcNblUnzhM_vT_F-Yk6NP6RFRtbTkYlgkG_IaWQ3NRjhsXwoWciOnQt-x89xNIsYUJ_lNh_KSt3WgkNXtkIWZAteW8ignYMrYyj7a8A-ogzCN15JtPxYdJKeH1ehzQ6UmDRmtA3HHqU0EqAKM1lHQ1yFAfAN_DOL7nvSvCVT-YCVgWUTj4Esynb_75imROw24Q2KvBxS8J5KOGT3PsgNj9xIlZ130U3srMd5w494gXlmF5Q87SjqkEtqv-rlX3Ogiasx5PVa2lVwDsanJm_7Tng%3D%3D)**

subject: the courage it takes to stand for freedom
body:
Will you stand for freedom? Sign the pledge today.

| | | [](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=c9244729bd46472a91c09ba5b3c5973a&_e=aju5kMUNqrNuM5DbaEOz1vU5xh9xNz_oAFnEu-cskKEhJMZRtI4x-Z6dFwxyYg3Ra0k4XykfyqCI-z6PwSelgM3JGnuq-830N9v1vquwm4gnrY8XKHl3tr11j4HxQf2qHAdT1yEGXtil9bT_5trW6nHtVGfDSRs6AMMy65ea2HNUqd8WJPeqmXNepOm9SVRVIS9v4yhxl_wl4Za8zCTLVBgpQsuiplQa_4E0LHDYUEx0CuaCXgo-DmkhcvuxxxHqjU_FsgORP3dmNdkYiA7BNiiupvyX8DeKHDDM_NCVmEQqlfO851Ypi6sDhk45QgkFUpPbV8XOiNultMxAsugZQUXTApNrThSPb1KvDn8_oUy544rSE3PZrTL8ErS0uMCoySFSdgU6WuUyy5T8LboT-w%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Iranian women and girls have been killed because they stood up for basic human rights. ** ** Still, the Iranian people continue to speak out and demand freedom. ** ** Just think about the amount of courage it takes to stand up to a murderous regime.** ** Hundreds of people have been killed in the crackdown on ongoing protests, and the regime’s brutality isn’t letting up. ** ** An Iranian soccer player was arrested after speaking out about Mahsa Amini’s tragic murder and calling for the regime to stop persecuting its own citizens. ** ** After the Iranian men’s soccer team protested at the World Cup, Iran threatened their families. ** ** It took unbelievable courage—and every freedom lover worldwide should hope for their safety from the regime’s backlash. ** ** America must support the Iranian people's fight for freedom. ** ** [**Join me and sign the pledge to stand for freedom today.**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=c9244729bd46472a91c09ba5b3c5973a&_e=aju5kMUNqrNuM5DbaEOz1vU5xh9xNz_oAFnEu-cskKEhJMZRtI4x-Z6dFwxyYg3Ra0k4XykfyqCI-z6PwSelgM3JGnuq-830N9v1vquwm4gnrY8XKHl3tr11j4HxQf2qHAdT1yEGXtil9bT_5trW6nHtVGfDSRs6AMMy65ea2HNUqd8WJPeqmXNepOm9SVRVIS9v4yhxl_wl4Za8zCTLVBgpQsuiplQa_4E0LHDYUEx0CuaCXgo-DmkhcvuxxxHqG_zGPBJB9R8F_1QGVbSPDiAa5CRYKVmyqhMbiuZhe8shWKNehRhETrqz_qnvfiiwzcDLegA64KqUgZRLeMRWBfb6bcRqSwaSNTieEy33nhexpetXMaJq5QCtsUIDbAdf2GUZuRgXD1UeFYlC5OWDHw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Will you stand for freedom? Sign the pledge today. | | | Friend, Iranian women and girls have been killed because they stood up for basic human rights. Still, the Iranian people continue to speak out and demand freedom. Just think about the amount of courage it takes to stand up to a murderous regime. Hundreds of people have been killed in the crackdown on ongoing protests, and the regime’s brutality isn’t letting up. An Iranian soccer player was arrested after speaking out about Mahsa Amini’s tragic murder and calling for the regime to stop persecuting its own citizens. After the Iranian men’s soccer team protested at the World Cup, Iran threatened their families. It took unbelievable courage—and every freedom lover worldwide should hope for their safety from the regime’s backlash. America must support the Iranian people's fight for freedom. My very best, Nikki Haley | | | Special Message from Nikki Haley: I’ve been fighting every day to support leaders who believe America is inherently good and who understand that Democrats’ far-left policies undermine our freedoms. name: Sen. Raphael Warnock (via Democrats.org)
subject: Derek, w​e can't risk waking up on December 7 wishing we had done more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I’m relying on you to pitch in what you can so that my campaign and our party have what we need to send me back to the Senate. | |
---
Georgia is showing up -- and showing up _big_. Over one million Georgians voted early, smashing the record for single-day turnout in the state. This is an encouraging sign -- and it wouldn’t be possible without the support of Democrats like you. Thank you, Derek. **But we can’t take our foot off the gas -- until that final vote is cast on Tuesday, we must continue powering this campaign.** Winning this runoff election will come down to fighting for every single vote over the next three days -- and just how many doors we knock, people we call, and voters we can get to the polls depends on grassroots support, Derek. So I'm asking: **Will you split a $10 donation between my reelection campaign and the DNC today? Grassroots donations helped my campaign win our runoff last year, and they’ll make all the difference this year too.**

clean_body: I’m relying on you to pitch in what you can so that my campaign and our party have what we need to send me back to the Senate. | | Georgia is showing up -- and showing up big. Over one million Georgians voted early, smashing the record for single-day turnout in the state. This is an encouraging sign -- and it wouldn’t be possible without the support of Democrats like you. Thank you, Derek. But we can’t take our foot off the gas -- until that final vote is cast on Tuesday, we must continue powering this campaign. Winning this runoff election will come down to fighting for every single vote over the next three days -- and just how many doors we knock, people we call, and voters we can get to the polls depends on grassroots support, Derek. So I'm asking: Will you split a $10 donation between my reelection campaign and the DNC today? Grassroots donations helped my campaign win our runoff last year, and they’ll make all the difference this year too. Whether we can reach and turn out enough folks to protect this seat depends on the support we get from this grassroots team in these final days. I’m relying on you to pitch in what you can so that my campaign and our party have what we need to send me back to the Senate. Thanks, Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. name: Rev. Warnock
subject: Friend, I'd like to tell you a story about my mom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Friend – I'd like to tell you a story about someone who's very special to me: my mom, Verlene Warnock. As a teenager growing up in Waycro
| | |
---
Friend – I'd like to tell you a story about someone who's very special to me: my mom, Verlene Warnock.

As a teenager growing up in Waycross, Georgia, in the 1950s, my mom used to pick somebody else's cotton. She raised 12 boys and girls in public housing on the west side of Savannah – and although money was short, Mom's love was always long. She told us we could do anything we put our minds to.

**Just a few days ago****, Mom used her 84-year-old hands that used to pick somebody else's cotton to pick her son to be a United States senator from Georgia, the first Black senator in our state's history. God bless you, Mom.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55508319/381891247/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5277-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTdhMzQ4OS01NjczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ap6UnUv3uxfgehERron6d8ackUNnSc417mdMx9rsnDQ=)
But my last race was just the beginning, friend. Right now, experts are saying this race will be incredibly close, and GOP super PACs are launching ads to flip my seat and turn Georgia red.

**The only way I can fight back against GOP attacks, protect my Senate seat, and win our critical fight for justice is with your help. That's why I'm personally asking: **[**Will you donate $5 or more now to win in Georgia? A grassroots contribution from you – right here, right now – will make what Mom and I never could have dreamed of a reality.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55508320/381891248/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5277-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTdhMzQ4OS01NjczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ap6UnUv3uxfgehERron6d8ackUNnSc417mdMx9rsnDQ=)
My mom is so proud of what this team has accomplished, friend. So am I. Let's keep Georgia blue – together.
– Sen. Raphael Warnock
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55508321/381891249/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5277-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTdhMzQ4OS01NjczLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ap6UnUv3uxfgehERron6d8ackUNnSc417mdMx9rsnDQ=)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: There is one more Bie Lie supporting, anti-democracy election denier left whom we must stop.
body:
Recount in Arizona’s AG race
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5be9dece-9e02-4201-95e0-5c9e68be1d30/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **_There is one more Bie Lie supporting, anti-democracy election denier left whom we must stop._** We didn't only turn the red wave into a blue crush, but we defeated almost every one of the loudest election deniers running in 2022. [_**But, to finish the job, we must make sure GOP Attorney General candidate Abe Hamadeh isn't able to prevail in the Arizona statewide recount about to begin, where he currently trails Democratic Attorney General-elect Kris Hayes. This is why your support for the Democratic Attorneys General Association is critical at this time.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4c7e1ea4-59e9-484d-9163-caeae83ea1ed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Arizona has been ground zero for Republican attacks on democracy. Kari Lake not only refuses to concede, but still spits out lie after lie about "election fraud" that doesn't exist. **Ruby-red Cochise County, AZ had to be sued by current Secretary of State and Governor-elect Katie Hobbs to force them to submit their vote tallies, as they denied a fair election took place by presenting zero evidence and a whole lot of conspiracies.** A second county, Mohave, also initially refused, until the threat of arrest forced the Republican commissioners to back down. _ __And, of course, Hamadeh himself is spewing every conspiracy theory he can conjure up, damaging the faith Arizonans, and all Americans, have in our democratic process._ __So we must be ready for Hamadeh's team to pull out every trick, including trying to alter and/or destroy ballots, engage in ridiculous lawsuits, propaganda and even intimidation--anything they can think of, legal or otherwise--to try and wrest the election away from the 99% certain winner after a legitimate recount, Kris Mayes._
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE: No election deniers for attorney general**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf46c4f81-3862-4107-9466-0bb7a52845e4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | _We can't make Hamadeh have an ounce of class or respect for the Democratic process and shut his mouth. But we can make sure he isn't able to find a way to illegally or unethically win this election, so he can spout this trash while serving as the highest ranking law enforcement office in Arizona._ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the Democratic Attorneys General Association (DAGA) so they can use these resources to make sure there is a fully aboveboard recount and the legitimate winner--Kris Mayes--ascends to the position of Arizona Attorney General?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tece2fe5c-4dd7-4629-afd2-1072bd86856c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We know fighting these ghouls is exhausting, and **so appreciate** your standing with Blue Amp Action in this fight. Thanks!
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2d0b918-d433-40d3-a42b-4f39c06c94be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia will - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications.

clean_body: The entire political world has descended on Georgia. | Peter, Here we go again. The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia will - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted. However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance. The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, so the 80,000+ votes he received on November 8th are up for grabs. This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes. The entire political world has descended on Georgia. Democrats are spending hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. We need your help RIGHT NOW to fund our 'Get-Out-The-Vote' advertising.
